name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Iowa needs her.

body:
Congresswoman Miller-Meeks is the answer.

| [ ](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=204365c3bab64c6aac35452b4bddddd5&_e=dS6rDcbP8eplopDo2rfE5zpaG89FluYF6Ec2FmmT-08gljeLp8qHLyH8yb8BGuduOb87P24fzOhsmKK9sr1qJzegxoPRS0emvo4GrUXs2NEvQm7-wmZ7gfsLxcNoTKqbTncW7CV4xOs5m-ga4rrb9GNnpgzzA4hSMoDFP1b2V64T-bearNYHhr4rqow9tDQB05Kg1pZuyUOS6REEjaaIYxXgTVAiPrtxofAwQ8kv6GIz63xkOvMLs6Ic-3MQUIh6noFpxi3DNzrh5SrJC2z07n8c4aAt09U6C-cOylRkGj_bWPmN0dJ-Gc51SEKKbSdHQ2uoedAQJ10IqulUlnInp8nfmofMu2xlkN8qRsk9HZIxmADkLLEDIFl2P-wWJYnn15F35NDt6gav5YUGLqCuBjXYqUnnkdMotpnWjkeHWtQ7OU-e0JbBU8YxEer1t_fPeGwbnOQ61otjYULD8cJHvwFHxm-HPdQJC1xyP3sJHMBoOUQnz6SsPNZz_PBxygCUSlaq__qzOVIgHNgMQgX5a057pqip5HTvH0D2azpET08%3D)
---
Friend,

Congresswoman Miller-Meeks has made a huge impact on the state of Iowa during her time in Congress. She is a veteran and a conservative warrior who works day and night to give not just Iowans, but all Americans, the best life possible.

And now -- **_she just announced she is running for Congress in 2022!_** She needs your support, and so does America.
| [**SUPPORT CONGRESSWOMAN MILLER-MEEKS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=204365c3bab64c6aac35452b4bddddd5&_e=dS6rDcbP8eplopDo2rfE5zpaG89FluYF6Ec2FmmT-08gljeLp8qHLyH8yb8BGuduOb87P24fzOhsmKK9sr1qJzegxoPRS0emvo4GrUXs2NEvQm7-wmZ7gfsLxcNoTKqbTncW7CV4xOs5m-ga4rrb9GNnpgzzA4hSMoDFP1b2V64T-bearNYHhr4rqow9tDQB05Kg1pZuyUOS6REEjaaIYxXgTVAiPrtxofAwQ8kv6GIz63xkOvMLs6Ic-3MQUIh6noFpxi3DNzrh5SrJC2z07n8c4aAt09U6C-cOylRkGj_bWPmN0dJ-Gc51SEKKbSdHQ2uoedAQJ10IqulUlnInp70Oikvqq68cXl-vKvrIEet9rv8oGegla1q9AclIM3H8cyyB72WxQ7l9wm00A9b40LyaGuQG28zqavSblZIpGJRWRE_8dT-kGMU8Z-oqPQThjqldi3GUniYG1IWPbztnBGB8LZFQlSlECfns3J8lVJmB5YyxEqRePoAiR-zu21bC1EQvsYnehLjh7EZULjwH57YQ8vYL-RNOjR4LvpSN5jk%3D)
---

Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left are trying to flip the state of Iowa BLUE, and Congresswoman Miller-Meeks has always been their Number ONE target. Democrats are planning to outraise her every single month leading up to the election, and **_we CANNOT allow that to happen._**
[**SUPPORT MILLER-MEEKS, STOP THE RADICAL LEFT!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=204365c3bab64c6aac35452b4bddddd5&_e=dS6rDcbP8eplopDo2rfE5zpaG89FluYF6Ec2FmmT-08gljeLp8qHLyH8yb8BGuduOb87P24fzOhsmKK9sr1qJzegxoPRS0emvo4GrUXs2NEvQm7-wmZ7gfsLxcNoTKqbTncW7CV4xOs5m-ga4rrb9GNnpgzzA4hSMoDFP1b2V64T-bearNYHhr4rqow9tDQB05Kg1pZuyUOS6REEjaaIYxXgTVAiPrtxofAwQ8kv6GIz63xkOvMLs6Ic-3MQUIh6noFpxi3DNzrh5SrJC2z07n8c4aAt09U6C-cOylRkGj_bWPmN0dJ-Gc51SEKKbSdHQ2uoedAQJ10IqulUlnInp_6DpHveB7lp_y0_gPIc02pUt_vQeYsyQoFJ3FLY14GIRizNhaxvd1AOIaKMjwkcUQZ26lZJata4IGMczYv250y62KQHuojGa2bcqQ4oKSJNWOq6h3FIt3F6UCXuTukmjXzdzkfkuW-QrFKI-UpPRjjDuibjKWtLYiZImZWPW9vKF8sVl_DpOZIrQTqYeX13TteymGrNJj6eYJAHag0CxM4%3D)
---

Congresswoman Miller-Meeks needs your help if we want to Take Back the House in 2022. She only won by 6 votes in her last election, and Nancy Pelosi WILL pull out every trick possible to take her down. **_With your help, we can build an army for Miller-Meeks and put America back on track!_**
[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE IN 2022 WITH MILLER-MEEKS!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=204365c3bab64c6aac35452b4bddddd5&_e=dS6rDcbP8eplopDo2rfE5zpaG89FluYF6Ec2FmmT-08gljeLp8qHLyH8yb8BGuduOb87P24fzOhsmKK9sr1qJzegxoPRS0emvo4GrUXs2NEvQm7-wmZ7gfsLxcNoTKqbTncW7CV4xOs5m-ga4rrb9GNnpgzzA4hSMoDFP1b2V64T-bearNYHhr4rqow9tDQB05Kg1pZuyUOS6REEjaaIYxXgTVAiPrtxofAwQ8kv6GIz63xkOvMLs6Ic-3MQUIh6noFpxi3DNzrh5SrJC2z07n8c4aAt09U6C-cOylRkGj_bWPmN0dJ-Gc51SEKKbSdHQ2uoedAQJ10IqulUlnInp9RTuqvN_s8LY8t4zPbe_6GYFsnA-sZ0wvejHjI1H7i_GLazPPNfCoTKhcosx_bcCeDlxH4gHUPnIVOqXkvtAErRmGbdU_p5-mgIL_9WOVdwFvdEbFOoxKDoRb_VMdAr0przU56wUBuAJ15wbjY_1wurMOhy0385OTdaJKJxEnEZ0TkpU0d5npPeYl_1jD9vURJ3vjIu-xm_WrAjgaDTKmw%3D)

[**Can you chip in anything right now, for a leader who has ALWAYS put you first?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=204365c3bab64c6aac35452b4bddddd5&_e=dS6rDcbP8eplopDo2rfE5zpaG89FluYF6Ec2FmmT-08gljeLp8qHLyH8yb8BGuduOb87P24fzOhsmKK9sr1qJzegxoPRS0emvo4GrUXs2NEvQm7-wmZ7gfsLxcNoTKqbTncW7CV4xOs5m-ga4rrb9GNnpgzzA4hSMoDFP1b2V64T-bearNYHhr4rqow9tDQB05Kg1pZuyUOS6REEjaaIYxXgTVAiPrtxofAwQ8kv6GIz63xkOvMLs6Ic-3MQUIh6noFpxi3DNzrh5SrJC2z07n8c4aAt09U6C-cOylRkGj_bWPmN0dJ-Gc51SEKKbSdHQ2uoedAQJ10IqulUlnInp49Sv-ZqGFr2Bl9gXQ43uUNXtUaOzmaXLIrUYTCTRU0tOaPhPTENJx1sZI0si54f-o2-zctDSW0uDMRFo6psFnfMeqQg-G_9rEYGNZdRtd6bRNN9EcrjzpEmd08JP7RuUBBcyKalssOKyTn8KIiJvcMmn5v75oIHbBG9DVX1wSxG10M7xg8EFzNUd896uhiJvbCiRlVqrvnehyPWY0Co9DQ%3D)

body:

---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=65c47aa638&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

I want to take a moment of your time to talk to you about the next election. Democrats are moving to take Texas in 2022 and we need to rally around conservatives like Van Taylor to fight in defense of our way of life.

Van has long been a Christian leader in Texas. Now in Washington, he continues to defend these values from the radical left's unwavering attacks on our faith and freedom. Van has been a conservative voice for Collin County and all Texans for years. I am confident that Hunt County will be well represented in Congress by Van as we advance towards 2022.

I hope you'll join me in supporting Van and stand with us as we press forward in the battle brought against us by Democrats in D.C.
---

subject: I Want YOUR Opinion on Schools
body:

---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-chlfe-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | **When did public schools become a war zone?**
Across the country, parents are speaking out about their level of access to what is being taught in schools. It has become a defining issue in states like Virginia. **Parents are being vilified because they want to speak up about what their kids are being taught.**
I believe parents should have a say; they should have access to their kid’s curriculum.
But, I want to hear from you.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Republicans stacked the cards against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
It’s going to take everything we’ve got.
Those in power stacked the cards against the people of Texas when they passed SB 1 this summer, a bill designed to subvert democracy and keep hundreds of thousands of Texans from participating in our elections.
It’s going to make our jobs on this campaign a lot tougher. But here’s what gives me hope that we can build a movement powerful enough to overcome the challenge:
In our effort to stop the GOP’s voter suppression bill last summer, Texans inspired the rest of the nation with our courage and tenacity. We held some of the largest voting rights rallies that this state has seen in decades and led this nation’s democratic response to the authoritarian threat prompted by the Big Lie.
**Now, it’s time to unseat those who seek to cement their grip on power by undermining our elections and silencing the voices of Texans.**
That’s going to take building the largest grassroots movement this state has ever seen. Together, we can mobilize historic turnout even in the face of these new, unjust, and undemocratic barriers to voting in Texas.
[So please, join us by making a donation to our campaign today. We need you in this fight. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49891?refcode=ema20211118-163112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)
This summer, I traveled across Texas to bring as many people as possible into the conversation about the future of our democracy. We visited counties red and blue, big and small — like Rains and Midland, Harris and Dallas, and Bowie and Jefferson — where it was clear that Republicans and Democrats alike can find common ground in their belief in the right of every Texan to participate in our elections and have a say in our future.
The kind of extreme policies and incompetence we’re seeing now in Texas — on Covid, abortion, guns, schools, and even our electricity grid — are the result of leaders who have stopped listening to the people who elected them into office. Leaders who are more focused on catering to their donors and the fringes of their parties, instead of serving working families across Texas.
We have to hold them accountable and elect leaders who will listen to and care about what the people of Texas need.
[Any amount you can spare right now will help this campaign hire staff, knock doors, and reach as many voters as possible between now and Election Day. Will you pitch in $3 or more to help us do the work to overcome GOP-led voter suppression in Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49891?refcode=ema20211118-163112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49891?refcode=ema20211118-163112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)**
When the stakes are this high, none of us can afford to sit out.
Thank you for being a part of this team,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211118-163112-footer&t=22&refcode2=163112_444211_JwEcnF&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=163112%2E444211%2EJwEcnF)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See What Walz JUST Admitted?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_walz_just_admitted&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Did you see what Walz just admitted? On a phone call with our lazy media, Walz openly stated that the Unilateral Emergency Powers he exercised for well over a year, did not save lives. "We all know, that there's no correlation between me using Emergency Powers, that actually shows that it protected people, or made a difference" stated Minnesota's worst Governor.
## Did he really just say that?!
Audio available here: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_admits_emergency_powers_didn_t_save_lives?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_walz_just_admitted&n=2) The lazy media elites on the call were shocked by what they heard, so they politely asked for clarification. At that point, Walz realized his Freudian slip and started walking it back. But as he did, he also admitted that issuing new Emergency Powers comes at a political cost! And it's that point, that he could not have gotten more correct!!! **Because of your support for our pressure campaigns, Tim Walz admits that issuing Unilateral Emergency Powers means real political pain for him and his cronies in the Political Class. You are the reason my team was able to make 55,000 phone calls and 40,000 door knocks to End Walz' Emergency Powers in June.** Although, you know this battle isn't over. Walz says that because of the vaccines, Emergency Powers are no longer the best "tool" for him to use these days to combat the disease. Which is funny, because his own Lieutenant Governor still got COVID despite being fully vaccinated. Walz, and his pal Joe Biden, want to keep pushing these vaccines down our throats. And they aren't stopping with you and me. They are coming for our children! I need your support again to make sure Walz 100% UNDERSTANDS that there is a political cost for mandating vaccines in Minnesota! My growing team of young liberty professionals will continue making the phone calls, knocking the doors and pressuring the Political Class so they can't stomp on your rights! **We have an URGENT need to build up our resources for this battle against MANDATES. | | | **BREAKING:** The conservative Supreme Court is about to OFFICIALLY hear arguments in a case that could **_overturn Roe v. Wade._**

**Justices Sotomayor, Kagan, and Breyer are ALL sounding the alarm about the Court’s recent moves -- and if we don’t add our voices to theirs, reproductive rights in America could be COMPLETELY stripped away:**

We know exactly where this ends if Brett Kavanaugh and the conservatives get their way -- but we still have time to stand up to them!

**We’ve just DOUBLED our signature goal to 200,000 by midnight tonight. And with _Roe v. Wade_ and the rights of MILLIONS of Americans hanging in the balance, we need YOU to take a stand!**

clean_body: Vaccine mandates must end | | | | | | | | | Friend, The Biden administration’s vaccine mandate is nothing short of tyranny. Not only is this administration trying to tell us what to do with our money, now they are trying to tell us what to do with our health care decisions. Democrats claim to be the party of “my body my choice,” but they continue to prove that they only use slogans like that to get elected. This vaccine mandate clearly exceeds Biden’s constitutional authority. I am leading the fight in Congress to stop it, but I need to know I have your support, we are so close! The government has absolutely no right to enforce these mandates on Americans. The people of America are hard-working and thoughtful. It is time that Biden starts realizing that and letting people make their own decisions about the vaccine. God Bless, Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

body:
| | | **BREAKING: Democratic HQ launches HISTORIC new program to turn out the vote**
Republicans have spent years relentlessly hijacking our democracy and rigging the system in their favor.

But that's not stopping Democratic HQ.

With less than a year before Election Day, we just invested MILLIONS -- _an unprecedented commitment_ \-- to fight voter suppression and turn out every last vote all across the country.

**And at this crucial moment for our House Majority and our democracy, DCCC Organizing Chair Jamie Raskin is calling every grassroots Democrat to jump into action and join him in the fight:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBeVXKWB~)

[**It 's crunch time, and we need your help. Can you rush $25, $10, or even $3 to help fund our voter turnout operation and all our other crucial programs? Every cent you chip in will go straight to electing House Democrats and defeating House Republicans >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_) | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
2021 MEMBERSHIP STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---

We can't afford to sit on the sidelines. That's why our new program will...

_\-- Put boots on the ground with nearly a year to go before Election Day,

\-- Combat disinformation with targeted ads and paid media,

\-- And launch a voter protection team earlier than ever before to ensure Americans everywhere have access to the ballot box. _

**Investing in organizing and outreach is critical to protecting our House Majority --****_but they don 't come cheap._**

[**We have nowhere else to turn, so we 're coming to you directly: Will you join our team, chip in $3, and help us fund all of our historic plans to protect our House Majority? We can't do it without you.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs04k~)

subject: Help us FIRE PELOSI!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
I'm recruiting patriots like YOU in Wisconsin Peter,**Steve Scalise here.** Did you know Republicans are **_JUST FIVE SEATS AWAY_** from flipping the House and **_FIRING Nancy Pelosi_** forever?We've got the momentum clearly on our side after this month's election results. But we can't let up on the gas! [Take Back The House >> ACTION REQUESTED](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikkryd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) When Congressman Scott Fitzgerald told me he wanted to help take back the House and save America, I asked him to step up and help lead the fight in the battleground state of Wisconsin.**[Will you help Fitz raise the funds it will take to _Flip The House_ and save America in 2022?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikkryd-ahkdjtlkr-y/)**Together, we are recruiting **grassroots patriots like you** to get the job done!I need your help gathering the resources to defend our great incumbents like Fitz and expand our map.**Wisconsin is the battleground for 2022.** Whichever way Wisconsin goes, that's the way America will go.[_**Could you chip in $250, $100, $50, $25 or just $10 to show our strength at this critical time?**_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikkryd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Thanks,
Steve Scalise

| | | Welcome to the Angela for Oregon campaign, where I am committed to winning Oregon's brand new 6th congressional district seat. I am grateful for your interest to journey with me on the campaign trail, which I have dedicated to standing up for your constitutional rights! I will send out a few newsletters with what I believe is important information to share with you without overloading your inbox. No fluff here; just facts and a focus on securing a victory for us in the 6th district, Oregon, and America.

Angela

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: State of education
body:
State of education

Hello
<<First Name>>,
Too many
of our leaders are working backwards. They like to start off with
a solution before they really understand the problem. More than
that, they rely solely on their own knowledge and experience
rather than listening to those who know the issue best. Would you
agree?
I think
this is particularly evident when it comes to education.
I'm of
the opinion that our educational system today is dividing our
students instead of uniting them. I believe that it is teaching
them that the color of their skin matters more than the content
of their character. They are being labeled as victims and
oppressors before they even know what those words mean.
However,
this is what I have seen. I want to better understand what you
have seen and experienced.
I'm going
to be talking with many different political leaders and
educational "experts" in the coming weeks. I want to be able to
share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the
issue.

Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute has created a unique survey. We're
trying to gauge the state of America's Educational System by
surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 4 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/
Thank you
for your consideration and for the support you've shown me in the
past.

Regards,
Dr. Ben
Carson
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: American Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8030%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kQsD%2b6Upnb1%2bPwxjEi3xDA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E46MkvNZUgYaRYs0pTP4eg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18793%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XAJKVacKDYzCYfaTbaFIBQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18794%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P%2fV7w6RXGgCNlE9Kk0X58A&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8030%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kQsD%2b6Upnb1%2bPwxjEi3xDA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8030%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kQsD%2b6Upnb1%2bPwxjEi3xDA&sysid=1)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf9d5uot9m1pbqo6sg2a7v1jsomhf9ustaop7rv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr0eapm6shkslqe9cj5curj2t1imlqj8dr2emr68tr26cpn9db6c1ieac9jeorrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllmoo7cob6e5qb6p77m2qmash5u)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7o31k7pfbf0smlevpb23t682q811ptrlb0netvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7t954csos9qrq30n57vl09hlbhb6gg6vh0olrgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2k42o1iqjp6lu43s9m50j2nnjcgps5ign4a6og_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znt36bu2tmsmf3embmedtiafuri8io6ili3rfceo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsslqb73tbhdjaj1ttorbvda157l34h5eoiita8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zomr08ldrbaqodqqrh9olosch24786pmog3374q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthascvmj1l8h8t37odksmagiuin1n35203umt8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zis6rlgb193tiocm6ojvs0bg2gvmngsblrl7356o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs1qfcdvmvtf8mrffm90pg4cphikttbel0pbkhm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zefb50k61mn7dv10u1a37ovn6ttlb5emlgrf7lo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1mnuhl43s8qu4dj9hbi87cdn5o9omkjoj2d6db8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpi69pr4cjh2bs) **
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z6n0q6c5oqcdpkhtnt6a21pgbqg3u18bp871svbo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0jcf2teavakpou32i2tbba5tr47rcu9jjpdmlg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6ctj68p77chie49fg)

In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813630:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813630:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813630:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813630:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813630:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813631:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813632:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58813633:6cV6kq2NZ:m:1:3298722022:ADDCAFDB7CE9EBF3E87F57CBA8E21B36:r)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Parents for Diehl
body:
Join the Movement Today!
| | | |
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
November 16, 2021

Geoff Diehl announced the launch of "Parents for Diehl" initiative today in recognition of the anger and frustration Massachusetts mothers and fathers are feeling about the lack of control over state and local decisions that affect their children.

"Whether it's school committees refusing to acknowledge the presence of Critical Race Theory instruction in its various forms in our public schools, or it's the Governor's policy reversal to mask young children right before the start of the school year despite serious questions about the need or efficacy, or it's federal vaccine mandates that parents fear will ultimately be instituted on their kids, it's a scary time to be raising a child in Massachusetts," said Diehl.

Diehl and his wife, KathyJo Boss, own a performing arts studio in Hanson, MA. During the pandemic, they utilized the large dance rooms and created a state-certified remote "learning pod" for students whose parents had to go back to work and couldn't watch them for the three days each week that they were not allowed to be in the classroom. See Photo, below.

"Geoff and I saw, firsthand, how unprepared state government and school districts were in delivering education under these circumstances," Diehl's wife, KathyJo, explained. "While many private schools immediately switched to online learning, public school basically crumbled in the final three school months of 2020. The following year, parents told us over and over that they wanted their kids back in school immediately. They couldn't interact with their peers most of the week and, when they did, it was with masks. Plus, being glued to a computer six or seven hours each day was not delivering the instruction they needed. During that time, the data also became clear that children were at virtually no risk from the virus. It was basically a lost educational year for our kids."

"Parents for Diehl" will be a group focused on supporting the candidate's pledge to safeguard parental rights when it comes to the decisions which impact their children. From family control over healthcare choices to increased transparency over educational methods and materials, Governor Diehl will re-empower every household that is bringing up the next generation of Massachusetts leaders.

Parents who are interested in getting involved in this initiative can subscribe at [Join Parents for Diehl](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014lqYJKdVhiqbkea0B2L7KlLL6xBA_2ZpAdDNLShFkavXEcpGFSHg_5y5xCUcatzGCwI8HQrRhzTxhC3Hr4eTFoCwoMgy8Mz776T2le2oeSUkHc_09N4Kk3maykXEUeX392xNYeSCdWbttjXImik82J_v97WDMuwLjz48p4M7PDQ=&c=ZLK2O7aTpAcJN38bPc_ORs46pGtBBrypYu-hwdPVvm4ZoDdsfFosrg==&ch=JDhOOLlSaftIejNZcD-Et1hkPA3K6SSRADSqtgX80tVN7oDSBr5HLg==)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj23ufm3ht451v0od1todudq38ei958sqp03rh3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph6ao32cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlc5oncclk6gpr4tr2cdi71cb16oqj8s9n6kp32thleorb6ddmcgpm9chjcapj1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr661ob6p1nmph6ccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0m6b2h16ap71dpnb5ne0lklb9nb5gfcflhsc8ig_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph6ao32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdtqo784lakqba0jhekij45jhte5tji9ku26pj00_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph6ao32cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfcnedeu08ti9fset4f4lam6hrnoe19h7fkgk298_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph6ao32cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Stand Up To Big Tech, Patriot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814718:6nEyrq2hN:m:1:3299561967:31B3A81CBDA10038C0D2B3F3DE02B34F:r)
---

I'm going to be blunt, Patriot: _Big Tech has become far too powerful. _

As tech companies got bigger, they also got a whole lot bolder. _They want to control your politics -- their algorithms decide what you see, when you see it, how you see it and from whom you see it. _

They claim to care about you, and they will tell you that they design their platforms with your safety and protection in mind. What they really mean is that they want to make sure you think the way they want you to think, period.

_**Let 's be clear: when a social media site has the ability to silence the President of the United States, they can also silence YOU. **_

What Big Tech has become is nothing more than authoritarianism cloaked in moral righteousness. It's dangerous, it's scary, and it's just plain un-American. It's time we stand together and say: ENOUGH.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814718:6nEyrq2hN:m:1:3299561967:31B3A81CBDA10038C0D2B3F3DE02B34F:r)
---

Will you join me in signing our STOP BIG TECH Petition, Patriot? By signing your name, we can send a message to these companies that the days of them trying to silence conservatives are OVER.

Unapologetically American,

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z54156m6s9f3seasu5p4j39ap4ho25g72708ojj8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr7dcpj62pracpleko78plh6lgr3dlgmkoeadpgmqrj8pjgejhneojhcoqr6d70cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj30s5jcdjreob664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjmcoj3c3i66oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsi3or6oqbeclqqmifegl44v98gql325r90obnko_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph66o74cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0s828241kr5aejti0btmf73dooc676thbsn20qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph66o74cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqkhc11pcd2a6ksrma81m43sm3hp63cmkfqf00sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cph66o74cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---
Peter,

I wouldn’t be where I am today without educators who believed in me. This week is American Education Week, so I’d like to take a moment to share my story of the power of public schools and discuss my vision for the future of Maryland education.

**Did you know that I was the first U.S. Secretary of Education to get kicked out of high school?** Let me tell you a bit more about my story and how educators helped me reach my full potential.

My mother passed away in October of my fourth-grade year when I was just 8. I then lived with my father, who struggled with undiagnosed Alzheimer’s, and when I was 12, my father passed away as well.

As a teenager, I was angry at life’s circumstances – like many kids who have experienced trauma at an early age. This anger caused me to act out, and I got in trouble so often that I eventually got kicked out of high school in my junior year.

But while many could have seen a young Black and Puerto Rican kid whose life was in crisis and wrote me off, phenomenal public school teachers, mentors, and a school counselor believed in me and gave me a second chance.

**School genuinely saved my life.** It was the very educators who changed the trajectory of my childhood who also inspired me to become a teacher myself. Because of them and the foundation they provided me, I served as the 10th U.S. Secretary of Education under President Obama.

**Now, I am running for governor because as a lifelong educator, I know firsthand just how foundational education is to the long-term success of our economy and our democracy.** Together, we can build a Maryland where all young people, no matter where they grew up or what resources their families have, can reach their full potential.

**But to succeed in electing an educator as governor, I need enthusiastic grassroots support to win this race.[_So today I am respectfully asking for your endorsement._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38778867/317034901/-644249160?contactdata=7TcvuagMNOCVg5sLOuoZgyR3qACZS06U8fprqEAQ3WsPg8DYV6SrbbwiXRxXN0qgZLVSYStITh4iT6HDc0il2TH5En0tnhZwTisV2rF0%2Fza2x4KnayqWz5TBdw5WZdLFsMSbOlKNcwNPEPOADwvDgtTRT24Dp10jzXc8D%2F%2BDo1wB%2BrBglUFG0gVuKHq7MePmuMmlVnUmCYUJY9ZhAWWR4A%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjBkNDdjYy0zYzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEVng7RP5pVR_-hAkHLQb7izJUf67O0YjZ-Eb8gz6oo=&emci=c02ae725-b847-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b20d47cc-3c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)**

The latest election results out of Virginia are a telling sign that Maryland must elect new Democratic leadership with the experience and authority to lead on education. I’m proud to be running with education at the forefront of this campaign, and as governor I will lead by listening and tackling the systemic injustices that have held back seats at the table of opportunity for too many Marylanders.

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue.
#
Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline -- so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical -- and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.**
My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth -- I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ \-- not just those at the top.
Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side -- so I have to ask:
**[Will you split a $10 donation right now between our campaign and Senator Durbin so we can hit our crucial midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38779023/317035840/-339444601?refcode=dd_em_211119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTNmMTE3MC0zZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cSIjh4t-yHM-GkuPvSI7STiX_Yw1iqnUSjygu_aEnc=)**
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power -- and election experts from _The Washington Post_ to _NBC News_ confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, Peter.**
My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:**
**[Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $10 donation between our campaign and Senator Durbin so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38779024/317035841/-339444601?refcode=dd_em_211119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTNmMTE3MC0zZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cSIjh4t-yHM-GkuPvSI7STiX_Yw1iqnUSjygu_aEnc=)**

clean_body: If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline -- so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical -- and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it. My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth -- I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone \-- not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side -- so I have to ask: = With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power -- and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue. But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, Peter. My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking: = Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these -- I appreciate you. Sen. Raphael Warnock **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:

body:
| Had to make sure you saw my team’s message, Peter, because to be perfectly frank, I’m at my wits end here. I consider myself to be a truth-teller. And the truth is that time and time again, Bill Lee has utterly failed to protect Tennesseans from COVID-19. As my team lays out below, Lee operates solely on the basis of what will rile up his extreme right base, because the only thing he ever cares about is remaining in power. For me, the pandemic is not some abstract obstacle to be ignored or manipulated with conspiracy theories and science-denial in order to win an election. **It’s my everyday reality as an ICU physician.** My promise to you is that I will always do whatever is necessary to protect Tennesseans, and I’ll never put party politics over people and families. [**Will you make a contribution to help us put an end to Lee’s irresponsible leadership?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780879/317045490/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119midmonth2_JM_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzdlODYxNC00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cs3n7nULAoKAf9NjBL5dxDJgEU94a4rxT8hLfPszKA=) — Dr. Martin \--------Forwarded message--------
From: MartinForTN.com
Date: November 18, 2021
Subject: Bill Lee is trying to OUTLAW mask mandates | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780880/317045491/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119midmonth2_JM_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzdlODYxNC00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cs3n7nULAoKAf9NjBL5dxDJgEU94a4rxT8hLfPszKA=)

Hey Peter, we have to ask: Is Gov. Bill Lee even aware that we’re still dealing with a global pandemic?
Because just a few days ago, he signed into law a bill that **_almost entirely outlaws mask mandates._**
AND THEN, as if that wasn’t bad enough, he announced yesterday that Tennessee (_our tax dollars_) will cover relocation expenses for law enforcement officers leaving states with strict COVID-19 vaccine mandates. **Let us put that another way: Gov. Lee is saying that if you’re a police officer who got fired because you refused to get the COVID-19, come work in Tennessee!** It’s mind-boggling.
[**We cannot afford another 4 years of Lee’s recklessness and callous disregard for the lives of Tennesseans — make a donation of any amount now to help us ensure that he’s a one-term governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780881/317045492/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119midmonth2_JM_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzdlODYxNC00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cs3n7nULAoKAf9NjBL5dxDJgEU94a4rxT8hLfPszKA=)

The hypocrisy behind this decision about mask mandates in particular is enough to make anyone’s head spin.
Here’s Lee on mask mandates in **July 2020** : “I said to someone the other day, gosh, if we had the hindsight of 2020 and we'd done a mask requirement at the beginning of March, we probably wouldn’t have had to close everything down.”
Lee even issued an executive order that same month allowing mayors to implement mask mandates if they choose to do so!
**So, what happened?** How did our governor go from _clearly understanding and embracing the benefits of mask mandates_ , to outlawing them?
Our guess is that Gov. Lee probably took a look at the calendar, saw the 2022 election rapidly approaching, and decided to throw his lot in with the extreme-right, conspiracy-theorist, science-denying GOP base that has divided our state and poisoned our politics.
**Enough is enough.**
It’s clear that Lee has no interest whatsoever in serving regular Tennesseans, and will do whatever he thinks is necessary to remain in power.
[**We have a chance to put an end to the divisiveness and elect someone who will stand up for ALL Tennesseans. Chip in now to help us kick Bill Lee out of office in November 2022 and elect a doctor who trusts science and will put Tennessee lives first.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780888/317045499/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119midmonth2_JM_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzdlODYxNC00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cs3n7nULAoKAf9NjBL5dxDJgEU94a4rxT8hLfPszKA=)

It’s mind-boggling. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = The hypocrisy behind this decision about mask mandates in particular is enough to make anyone’s head spin. Here’s Lee on mask mandates in July 2020 : “I said to someone the other day, gosh, if we had the hindsight of 2020 and we'd done a mask requirement at the beginning of March, we probably wouldn’t have had to close everything down.” Lee even issued an executive order that same month allowing mayors to implement mask mandates if they choose to do so! So, what happened? How did our governor go from clearly understanding and embracing the benefits of mask mandates , to outlawing them? Our guess is that Gov. Lee probably took a look at the calendar, saw the 2022 election rapidly approaching, and decided to throw his lot in with the extreme-right, conspiracy-theorist, science-denying GOP base that has divided our state and poisoned our politics. Enough is enough. It’s clear that Lee has no interest whatsoever in serving regular Tennesseans, and will do whatever he thinks is necessary to remain in power. = = — Team Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: I'm running for Congress, Why? Duty. Service. This is what I support, and what we need...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
We all deserve a change. We deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth and tries to embody all that is best in this great District. We deserve a Congressman with a vision who can recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who can build a consensus to achieve that vision. **Why I'm running for Congress, what I support, and how you can support me** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780917/317045829/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM3YTIzYS00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sxi5ib8KLCsy3HASABNJPhngkUyVh46xWFrXdU6fVgM=) [WILL YOU SUPPORT ME?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780919/317045831/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM3YTIzYS00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sxi5ib8KLCsy3HASABNJPhngkUyVh46xWFrXdU6fVgM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780921/317045833/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM3YTIzYS00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sxi5ib8KLCsy3HASABNJPhngkUyVh46xWFrXdU6fVgM=) Good morning, Friend. A Congressman is supposed to represents their community members on a national level, someone who advocates for all their constituents. I am running for Congress in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula because we currently have a Congressman who dismisses those who disagree with him, only advocates for his base, and fails to do what's best for the entire District. Jack Bergman is consistently voted against the best interests of all of us. **Why am I running?** **It's what has guided all my professional decisions – service.** I have a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula true, honest and ethical representation. I'm confident I can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I will run a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law. ** ** We all deserve a change. We deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth and tries to embody all that is best in this great District. We deserve a Congressman with a vision who can recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who can build a consensus to achieve that vision. Members of my district deserve a member of Congress that listens and stands on certain principles that will guide my policy decisions. **I support:**
* I support** universal healthcare, childcare, and the expansion of Medicaid and Medicare. **No one should suffer the consequences of not being able to afford access to medical care.
* When I look at my 200 thousand hospital bills from a simple but bad gallbladder problem, I worry about those faced with a similar situation but without my resources.
* We are still in a pandemic, and we must move forward together. Vaccination is the best strategy we have to address COVID along with appropriate masking. I am committed to advocating for science and data to inform our response.
* **I support sound environmental policies to protect our future** and especially for us, our Great Lakes. As our Native American colleagues' Seventh Generation Principle, today's decisions should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future.
* **I support jobs with living wages** \- If an adult is working a full-time job, they should not have to count on food stamps to sustain their family.
* **I support critical investments in our infrastructure**. It will ignite the economy and bring much-needed jobs to our District--putting money in working families' pockets and food on the table, all without raising taxes.
* Especially important for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula is Broadband expansion - A nation without rural connectivity is unacceptable. For our first District, it will be an economic boom for businesses, jobs, and education, not to mention our quality of life.
* For many Michiganders and throughout the nation, we have an affordable housing crisis. Unfortunately, housing costs have risen at rates that are outpacing stagnant salary growth. I want to be part of a national solution to this ongoing challenge in our District.
* **I support our democracy, election, and voters' rights**. I believe our democracy is stronger when it is accessible to as many eligible voters as possible, built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation.

The United States is more divided economically, politically, and culturally than ever before. We are even divided on science. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.I will strive to be a voice of reason in Washington. **How you can help** This campaign requires a lot of resources. Fundraising is all new to me, I'm not a polished politician, and if you ask me, we need campaign finance reform. Until then, we must be able to reach every voter to compete and early contributions are the most valuable. **[Please consider a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780923/317045836/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM3YTIzYS00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sxi5ib8KLCsy3HASABNJPhngkUyVh46xWFrXdU6fVgM=)** to our campaign today to advance our cause and bring authentic representation back to Northern Michigan and the UP. Your investment is critical. Thank you and have a great weekend, – Dr. Bob Lorinser | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38780925/317045839/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM3YTIzYS00MzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sxi5ib8KLCsy3HASABNJPhngkUyVh46xWFrXdU6fVgM=)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814986:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814987:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814988:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58814989:6ozwCq2Nq:m:1:3253819041:2EC10B88550D93A802319A3F73576F44:r)
