name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: I believe, with my whole heart, that we can do better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Friends of Jerry Dickinson
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783021/317053698/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_x-fr-JD-welcome1-new&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5OWNmOS00NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFUoT5Qdozij2xTu0gPKtvCMj2tLyiHqFJEEAJsAd58=&emci=ed75f1e0-afa3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=30799cf9-4549-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25561085)
---
| The greatness we aspire to is right there within our grasp, we just need leaders who are bold enough to grab onto it. Hi friend, I wanted to be the first to reach out, just to say thank you, and officially welcome you to the team. I entered this race because I believe, with my whole heart, that we can do better. **But movements aren’t built by one person—it’s going to take all of us, pushing towards the same goal—and I’m so glad you’re on board.** Pittsburgh is home to some of the nation’s starkest racial disparities, which have only grown starker as a result of the pandemic. We have one of the highest rates of occupation segregation between whites and Blacks in America. One-third of Black women live in poverty in the city. Black adult mortality rates are higher in Pittsburgh than almost every other similarly situated city. I could go on. But I’m not in this race just to talk about our problems, I’m in this race because it’s long past time that we start talking about solutions. We have a responsibility to end Pittsburgh’s segregated past and present and become a world-class city of racial equality. The people of Pennsylvania’s 18th district deserve someone who will put the full weight of the federal government behind policy efforts that address decades worth of failed policies and practices. Pennsylvania’s 18th is a solidly blue district, friend—there’s no reason we can’t be leading this fight. You’ll be hearing from me and our team a lot from now until the primary next year, but for now, here’s my first ask: [**_Will you chip in, whatever you can, and be a founding donor for our campaign today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783022/317053699/-2042008336?refcode=em_x-fr-JD-welcome1-new&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5OWNmOS00NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFUoT5Qdozij2xTu0gPKtvCMj2tLyiHqFJEEAJsAd58=) My pathway into politics is not typical. I grew up in a multi-racial foster home—adopted by two incredible parents with 10 other foster kids. We all came from backgrounds of abandonment and neglect, and through the years I’ve stood by them as they’ve struggled with their burdens and navigated our broken systems. **It’s that very experience that’s led me to where I am now, running for Congress to represent the people of our district.** I wake up every morning thinking about my siblings and the millions of Americans like them who have to fight, tooth and nail, every day just to get by. It doesn’t have to be like this. The greatness we aspire to is right there within our grasp, we just need leaders who are bold enough to grab onto it. I want to be clear from the start, we’re here to run a campaign of ideas—not ideologies. We’re running a campaign that brings people together and empowers those who have been left behind. I can’t wait to get out there and meet you, and start laying out my vision of bold progressive leadership and what I know we can accomplish. But for now, I just need to know that you’re with me. [**_Friend, please consider chipping in whatever you can today. We’re building a new movement, and I want you on board from the start._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783023/317053700/-2042008336?refcode=em_x-fr-JD-welcome1-new&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5OWNmOS00NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFUoT5Qdozij2xTu0gPKtvCMj2tLyiHqFJEEAJsAd58=) More soon—let’s do this, Jerry Dickinson | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783024/317053701/-2042008336?refcode=em_x-fr-JD-welcome1-new&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5OWNmOS00NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFUoT5Qdozij2xTu0gPKtvCMj2tLyiHqFJEEAJsAd58=)**
---
|

If you no longer wish to receive email communications, you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ed75f1e0-afa3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/30799cf9-4549-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5OWNmOS00NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFUoT5Qdozij2xTu0gPKtvCMj2tLyiHqFJEEAJsAd58=&id=129004134).

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Let’s flip PA-01 blue, together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783152/317054333/2124509652?refcode=fl_em_su_20211018welcome1_ae_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJiNzA2MC00NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYD5Sf7DvnnFnHrISJ2jvfZ-wI4GTMlmICrPjbZBplc=)
---
Friend, I’m Ashley Ehasz: U.S. Army Veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democratic candidate for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District. Thank you so much for signing up and showing your support for my campaign to flip this crucial House seat from red to blue in 2022! A big reason I’m running for office is because for too long, people in Bucks County and Montgomery County have been left behind by Republican Brian Fitzpatrick. When it comes to creating good-paying jobs, increasing access to affordable healthcare including substance abuse treatment and mental health services, and taking action to stop the worst impacts of climate change, Fitzpatrick hasn’t delivered. Not only that, but he refused to vote to impeach Trump after the January 6 insurrection, and he opposes reproductive choice. **I aim to be a leader who listens to you, fights for you, and gets the job done.** That starts now. I want to know what issues matter most to you and your families, and how I can best serve you in Congress when we flip this seat in November 2022. **[Will you take my survey to share your thoughts and priorities with me as we build this campaign together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783153/317054334/1524429825?refcode=fl_em_su_20211018welcome1_ae_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJiNzA2MC00NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYD5Sf7DvnnFnHrISJ2jvfZ-wI4GTMlmICrPjbZBplc=&emci=c9b6d4ff-6430-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=febb7060-4649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643323)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38783154/317054335/1524429825?refcode=fl_em_su_20211018welcome1_ae_new_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJiNzA2MC00NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYD5Sf7DvnnFnHrISJ2jvfZ-wI4GTMlmICrPjbZBplc=&emci=c9b6d4ff-6430-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=febb7060-4649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643323)
---
I look forward to hearing from you!
— Ashley

clean_body: | = Friend, I’m Ashley Ehasz: U.S. Army Veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democratic candidate for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District. Thank you so much for signing up and showing your support for my campaign to flip this crucial House seat from red to blue in 2022! A big reason I’m running for office is because for too long, people in Bucks County and Montgomery County have been left behind by Republican Brian Fitzpatrick. When it comes to creating good-paying jobs, increasing access to affordable healthcare including substance abuse treatment and mental health services, and taking action to stop the worst impacts of climate change, Fitzpatrick hasn’t delivered. Not only that, but he refused to vote to impeach Trump after the January 6 insurrection, and he opposes reproductive choice. I aim to be a leader who listens to you, fights for you, and gets the job done. That starts now. I want to know what issues matter most to you and your families, and how I can best serve you in Congress when we flip this seat in November 2022. | I look forward to hearing from you! — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. ---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIzLWZhODMxYWQ4YzI3NzRmZDI4NzhhYjRhNWNmNjQxYmYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzExMTgyMDIxJnNjPU1LOTIxRU0xMg&K=0RKlz0qtgMqMVmRDi7-F3Q)

| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.********You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzIzLWZhODMxYWQ4YzI3NzRmZDI4NzhhYjRhNWNmNjQxYmYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzExMTgyMDIxJnNjPU1LOTIxRU0xMg&K=U1bdCE4Doo7wiH6opspWuQ)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A major, historic victory for the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
We did it.
Today, House progressives succeeded in passing the historic, life-changing investments in the American people contained in the _Build Back Better Act_ — over the objections of conservative obstructionists, who were fine with not passing the bill at all.
Through our successful strategy of insisting on passing both of President Biden’s economic bills — the bipartisan infrastructure bill for roads and bridges and the _Build Back Better Act_ for working families — House progressives helped President Biden keep his promise to the American people. His presidency will be much stronger for it.
This historic legislation will provide some of the greatest investments in the American people that we have ever seen.
I’m particularly excited that this bill includes provisions I championed such as ensuring high-quality, universal child care, expanding Medicare and Medicaid, cutting the costs of prescription drugs, making historic investments in affordable housing, and addressing climate change with bold action that creates millions of good-paying jobs every year for the next decade.
And there is so much more in this bill. This legislation is critical to Democrats keeping their majority in next year’s elections.
As someone who grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, and who went to work with my grandma when day care was too expensive, I know how life-changing the _Build Back Better Act_ will be for working families across America, and I look forward to getting these benefits out to the American people as soon as possible.
_Progressives held the line, and we delivered._ Now, we have to get this bill passed in the Senate.
**[Friend, I’m committed to continuing the fight to pass historic, transformative legislation for working families. But this isn’t easy, and I need your help. Please chip in a donation of any amount to support my re-election campaign and help me keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38785223/317063123/-1116019946?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_2021119_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzljOGY2ZS00OTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqMCKSzGwvPP-H1Ru-BZUU6vJlzxfAZ2laLoUp7ULTY=)**

clean_body: Friend, We did it. Today, House progressives succeeded in passing the historic, life-changing investments in the American people contained in the Build Back Better Act — over the objections of conservative obstructionists, who were fine with not passing the bill at all. Through our successful strategy of insisting on passing both of President Biden’s economic bills — the bipartisan infrastructure bill for roads and bridges and the Build Back Better Act for working families — House progressives helped President Biden keep his promise to the American people. His presidency will be much stronger for it. This historic legislation will provide some of the greatest investments in the American people that we have ever seen. I’m particularly excited that this bill includes provisions I championed such as ensuring high-quality, universal child care, expanding Medicare and Medicaid, cutting the costs of prescription drugs, making historic investments in affordable housing, and addressing climate change with bold action that creates millions of good-paying jobs every year for the next decade. And there is so much more in this bill. This legislation is critical to Democrats keeping their majority in next year’s elections. As someone who grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, and who went to work with my grandma when day care was too expensive, I know how life-changing the Build Back Better Act will be for working families across America, and I look forward to getting these benefits out to the American people as soon as possible. Progressives held the line, and we delivered. Now, we have to get this bill passed in the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Between the relief in this bill and the relief in the American Rescue Plan like the $1,400 stimulus checks, expanded Child Tax Credit, and Paycheck Protection Program — Democrats have shown that we’ll continue to roll up our sleeves and fight for working people. Let’s work together to invest in our present and our future. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Democrats have razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate, and those majorities are the _only_ reason we’ve been able to make any progress on issues like infrastructure and Covid-19 relief.
But Republicans want to use the midterm elections as a way to take back control of the House -- and they’d only need to flip _five seats_ to do so.
The President’s party tends to lose seats in midterm elections, so we need to get out the vote aggressively this year to ensure vulnerable Democrats hold their seats and that we flip more seats from red to blue -- like Charles is planning on doing.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38785604/317064965/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM3MTllNi00OTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSOo7RbS9WBQgCZLN2EZEEiOMRHJRcGcO9GTTmCqidk=)
This week has been historic for our nation’s progress, folks. President Biden signed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act,_ which Michael has been fighting for, into law and Democrats in the House just passed the Build Back Better bill. Michael secured, in the bill, an additional year of monthly payments through the expanded Child Tax Credit, and now it’s time to get this across the Senate finish line and deliver for working families. This legislation is an overdue investment in the American people by making child care more affordable, addressing the climate crisis, and creating good-paying jobs. Michael is fighting to get this bill across the finish line and begin transforming the lives of families in Colorado and across the country. We want to show Michael this grassroots team has his back on this historic bill. **Please sign our petition asking the Senate to get this critical legislation across the finish line and show Michael he has your support.** | | **[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38785605/317064966/796526262?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211119_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM3MTllNi00OTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSOo7RbS9WBQgCZLN2EZEEiOMRHJRcGcO9GTTmCqidk=&emci=bd6b2c2b-dd48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0d3719e6-4949-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1295540)**

clean_body: | = This week has been historic for our nation’s progress, folks. President Biden signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which Michael has been fighting for, into law and Democrats in the House just passed the Build Back Better bill. Michael secured, in the bill, an additional year of monthly payments through the expanded Child Tax Credit, and now it’s time to get this across the Senate finish line and deliver for working families. This legislation is an overdue investment in the American people by making child care more affordable, addressing the climate crisis, and creating good-paying jobs. Michael is fighting to get this bill across the finish line and begin transforming the lives of families in Colorado and across the country. We want to show Michael this grassroots team has his back on this historic bill. Please sign our petition asking the Senate to get this critical legislation across the finish line and show Michael he has your support. | | Thank you, team, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

I wanted to personally reach out today. I announced my run for governor a few weeks ago and as I continue my work for justice and equality, I need your support. So please, can I count on you?

subject: Can Tony and I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/32860ad9-4949-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/04ac2947-4a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFjMjk0Ny00YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zLiWrJOW8jOzAgF_J55-0HQ9o2P4cku7ohFGpzamTNQ=&id=117942571) During this unprecedented and challenging time, please only donate to our campaign if you can afford to do so.

| | Team,

Thank goodness, Gov. Tony Evers just **_shut down_** another Republican attempt to rig our democracy.

The GOP-controlled state legislature sent new congressional maps to his desk, where he vetoed them after calling it like it is: **Gerrymandering 2.0**. Even though Wisconsin remains a 50-50 state politically, rigged maps have made it so the GOP controls over 60% of the seats in the legislature no matter what.

But we haven’t won fairer maps yet. Republicans are going to stop at nothing to inject partisanship in what is _supposed_ to be a fair and clear redistricting process. This is why we must do everything we can to re-elect Governor Evers.

body:
The House just took a huge step forward for working people by passing the Build Back Better Act. Here’s some of what this legislation will do for families and our future: | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38786245/317068154/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ2A_BBB_E_20211118_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzZlODU2ZS00YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OK1SO4rGCk_5Wb_1bnIjnMFhWpAqhsgYlV1-iT53CwE=&emci=37d65f68-4a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=836e856e-4a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9027908)
---
The House just took a huge step forward for working people by passing the Build Back Better Act. Here’s some of what this legislation will do for families and our future:
* Bring down costs that have been zooming up and crushing families for decades — like child care (you know I’ve been in the fight on this one), prescription drugs, housing, home- and community-based care, and more
* Make a big down payment in solving the climate crisis
* Get giant corporations to pay a fair share with our plan for a Corporate Minimum Tax

I want to recognize that passing this bill was only possible because Democrats took back the House in 2018, and held onto our majority in 2020. Everyone who knocked on doors, made phone calls, or pitched in a few bucks owns a piece of this victory. So thank you, thank you, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team. Now the Senate must act — we’ve been talking for long enough. I’ll keep pushing to make sure we get this done as soon as possible. And as we get ready for the 2022 midterm elections, let’s remember: Democrats are doing all this without any help from the GOP. **Not a single House Republican voted for quality, affordable child care. Or universal pre-k. Or paid leave. Or lower prescription prices. Or fighting climate change. Or making giant corporations pay a fair share.** _**[So we’ve got to do everything we can to keep Republicans from taking back power. Can you pitch in $3 or more to support our re-election and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot? Your contribution right now would go a long way to lay the groundwork for victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38786246/317068155/-1292854963?refcode=EMZ2A_BBB_E_20211118_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzZlODU2ZS00YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OK1SO4rGCk_5Wb_1bnIjnMFhWpAqhsgYlV1-iT53CwE=&emci=37d65f68-4a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=836e856e-4a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9027908)**_ | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
We have to beat the GOP across the country because they’re only on the side of the rich and powerful. They’d rather point fingers than lift a finger to help working people, and they won’t do anything to upset their corporate backers — like Big Pharma and Big Oil.
They just want to sit back while droughts, wildfires, and hurricanes devastate communities. While millions of women can’t go to work because they can’t get child care. While babies don’t get the good start in life that they need with quality early education. While child care workers — mostly women and women of color — aren’t paid enough to make ends meet. While families ration insulin.
So Democrats will keep working to get the Build Back Better Act over the finish line in the Senate and onto President Biden’s desk. And we’ll keep fighting to make our country work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.
[_**But we can only make big, structural change and protect and expand our Democratic majorities in Congress if we work together as a grassroots movement. Please make a donation if you can today to help power our work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38786290/317068201/1273089971?refcode=EMZ2A_BBB_E_20211118_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzZlODU2ZS00YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OK1SO4rGCk_5Wb_1bnIjnMFhWpAqhsgYlV1-iT53CwE=)

Elizabeth

clean_body: The House just took a huge step forward for working people by passing the Build Back Better Act. Here’s some of what this legislation will do for families and our future: | | | The House just took a huge step forward for working people by passing the Build Back Better Act. Here’s some of what this legislation will do for families and our future: Bring down costs that have been zooming up and crushing families for decades — like child care (you know I’ve been in the fight on this one), prescription drugs, housing, home- and community-based care, and more Make a big down payment in solving the climate crisis Get giant corporations to pay a fair share with our plan for a Corporate Minimum Tax I want to recognize that passing this bill was only possible because Democrats took back the House in 2018, and held onto our majority in 2020. Everyone who knocked on doors, made phone calls, or pitched in a few bucks owns a piece of this victory. So thank you, thank you, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team. Now the Senate must act — we’ve been talking for long enough. I’ll keep pushing to make sure we get this done as soon as possible. And as we get ready for the 2022 midterm elections, let’s remember: Democrats are doing all this without any help from the GOP. Not a single House Republican voted for quality, affordable child care. Or universal pre-k. Or paid leave. Or lower prescription prices. Or fighting climate change. Or making giant corporations pay a fair share. ** | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | We have to beat the GOP across the country because they’re only on the side of the rich and powerful. They’d rather point fingers than lift a finger to help working people, and they won’t do anything to upset their corporate backers — like Big Pharma and Big Oil. They just want to sit back while droughts, wildfires, and hurricanes devastate communities. While millions of women can’t go to work because they can’t get child care. While babies don’t get the good start in life that they need with quality early education. While child care workers — mostly women and women of color — aren’t paid enough to make ends meet. While families ration insulin. So Democrats will keep working to get the Build Back Better Act over the finish line in the Senate and onto President Biden’s desk. And we’ll keep fighting to make our country work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2021 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. | | |
---
Friends — I know we send you a lot of emails. But in just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Maggie Hassan's. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances. Here is the truth: On Sunday night, our weekend fundraising drive comes to an end. And when it does, we’re going to take stock of the ads running against us and the resources we need to fight back. It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. They spent millions against us in 2020, and they’re already doing it again in this election. We won last time because we built the largest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. That’s just a fact. We received millions of donations and ran an unprecedented volunteer effort. But the dark money groups are already back, and that means we need to rebuild a grassroots campaign of similar size, or even larger, if we’re going to win again. Right now, only about 10% of the people who gave in the last campaign have given to this one. So we have to pick up the pace, and this weekend's fundraising drive is an important marker. And that’s why it’s so important for me to ask: **[Can you please split a $5 contribution between my re-election campaign and Maggie Hassan's before our weekend fundraising drive comes to an end on Sunday? name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We passed the Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter --

Middle class families deserve a break. That's why I proudly voted for the Build Back Better Act.

For too long, families have struggled to keep up with the costs of child care or caring for an elderly parent. Folks can't afford the price of health care, prescription drugs, and housing. Wages have stagnated for the workers who care for our seniors and people living with disabilities. And the threat of climate change has become impossible to ignore, and it's damaging our infrastructure and hurting our communities.

Congress can, and should, address these challenges that keep us all up at night. It's time to recognize that we need a "new normal." **It 's time to Build Back Better.**

The Build Back Better Act will...

**...Lower costs for families** by saving most working American families **more than half** of their spending on child care. The bill provides FREE universal Pre-K for all 3 and 4-year-olds, permanently improves Medicaid coverage for home care services for seniors and people with disabilities, caps the price of prescription drugs for seniors, and lowers premiums for health care.

**...Ensure people have economic opportunities.** The bill includes my bipartisan legislation, the RECOMPETE Act, to empower communities to develop their local economies and create jobs. The bill also makes the largest and most comprehensive investment in affordable housing in history.

**...Take critical action to combat the climate crisis.** The bill includes investments to reduce greenhouse gas pollution and accelerate the transition to clean energy. It includes a new Civilian Climate Corps to conserve our public lands and bolster community resilience. It advances environmental justice and invests in coastal restoration, forest management, and soil conservation.

**And much, much more, Peter!** The Build Back Better Act is a promise that our federal government will do a better job of protecting workers and communities so that no one gets left behind. This legislation is about ensuring people have economic opportunity regardless of what zip code they live in -- period.

I'm proud we passed this historic legislation through the House. But as always, we aren't finished yet! There's much more Congress can do to help strengthen our economy and help working families make ends meet, and I'll keep fighting for you every step of the way.

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAhlQpHPG7h6Z-eYYkI73ZDKAyWA8mpPtye7ZgbXBkQ=/MiKDmMNLzBxrXnCkxhczoQVO1a3KqKgiKPsIE541-Us=?refcode=em21_211118_BBB_engg_gq_act_RR_DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211118_BBB_engg_gq_act_RR_DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* My opponent raised $8.4 million and I was outraised AGAIN last quarter.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

Hey friend — Congressional Democrats did it!
Sure wasn’t easy, but today Democrats in the House upheld the promise they made to the American people in the 2020 election and passed the Build Back Better Act. This historic, once-in-a-generation legislation includes this incredible list of accomplishments:
✅ Tax breaks for the middle-class

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: BREAKING: House passes Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38788459/317078560/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119bbb_gv_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmZlZDBiMy01MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tq_ajvDPmnzh4ErRDJBnirGJ8INsGe6OFnwVC5PrlfU=)

**** Great news, team: **The U.S. House just voted to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better Act, a historic legislative package that will make huge investments in families, communities, and future generations.** Here are just some of the highlights of what this bill will achieve:
* Universal and free pre-kindergarten for all 3- and 4-year-olds, the largest expansion of free education in 100 years;

* Medicaid expansion, lower prescription drug prices, lower healthcare premiums, and 4 weeks of paid leave;

* Extension of the child tax credit, giving 39 million households up to $3,600/month in tax cuts;

* _The largest effort to combat climate change in American history,_ with tax credits for households who invest in clean energy, creation of hundreds of thousands of clean energy jobs, environmental justice initiatives, and coastal/forest restoration.

And a whole lot more! **But can you guess who voted against all of these historic advancements for the American people?_My opponent, Rep. Yvette Herrell._** Herrell once again put party politics ahead of doing what’s best for the people of NM-02, but we can remove her from office next year by building a strong campaign today. **[Show Herrell that there are consequences for voting against the people she was elected to serve: pitch in a contribution of $10 or more to help me replace her in Congress in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38788461/317078563/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119bbb_gv_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmZlZDBiMy01MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tq_ajvDPmnzh4ErRDJBnirGJ8INsGe6OFnwVC5PrlfU=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = ** Great news, team: The U.S. House just voted to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better Act, a historic legislative package that will make huge investments in families, communities, and future generations. Here are just some of the highlights of what this bill will achieve: Universal and free pre-kindergarten for all 3- and 4-year-olds, the largest expansion of free education in 100 years; Medicaid expansion, lower prescription drug prices, lower healthcare premiums, and 4 weeks of paid leave; Extension of the child tax credit, giving 39 million households up to $3,600/month in tax cuts; The largest effort to combat climate change in American history, with tax credits for households who invest in clean energy, creation of hundreds of thousands of clean energy jobs, environmental justice initiatives, and coastal/forest restoration. And a whole lot more! But can you guess who voted against all of these historic advancements for the American people?My opponent, Rep. Yvette Herrell. Herrell once again put party politics ahead of doing what’s best for the people of NM-02, but we can remove her from office next year by building a strong campaign today. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can assure you that when we win this race and flip this seat back to blue, I’ll fight for transformational changes like the Build Back Better Act in Washington. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press@NickForNJ.com November 19, 2021
JOSH GOTTHEIMER VOTED TO RAISE TAXES AND SUPPORT AOC'S RADICAL AGENDA
FAIR LAWN - Today, Nick De Gregorio, Marine veteran and Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's Fifth Congressional District issued the following statement in response to the passage of Joe Biden's $1.75 trillion spending bill: "Let's be clear about one thing: Josh Gottheimer cannot hide behind the SALT deduction in justifying his support for one of the most economically devastating bills to ever hit the State of New Jersey. The self-proclaimed 'problem solver' has once again solved nothing, and he has fallen far short of the goal of total reinstatement. More importantly, the modest gains New Jerseyans might see will be completely wiped out by the crushing taxes coming to New Jersey job creators in the form of raising individual and corporate tax rates, as well as the continued upward inflationary pressure it will place on prices at the grocery store and the gas pump," said De Gregorio. He continued, "Does Josh Gottheimer really think that a combined federal and state tax rate of over 50% for corporations and nearly 60% for individuals is lives up to his slogan of 'Lower Taxes, Jersey Values?' Because I have a different name for it: confiscation." He concluded, "Not only did Josh Gottheimer vote to raise our taxes tonight, but he also once again voted with AOC, this time for taxpayer-funded payments to people who have come to our country illegally and IRS snooping in the bank accounts of the vast majority of New Jerseyans. Josh Gottheimer can pay lip service to opposing socialism all he wants; the reality is that tonight he has voted once again to decimate entrepreneurship, private enterprise, and the dreams of small business owners, while dangerously increasing the size of the federal government and forcing Americans' reliance on it."
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press@NickForNJ.com November 19, 2021 JOSH GOTTHEIMER VOTED TO RAISE TAXES AND SUPPORT AOC'S RADICAL AGENDA FAIR LAWN - Today, Nick De Gregorio, Marine veteran and Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's Fifth Congressional District issued the following statement in response to the passage of Joe Biden's $1.75 trillion spending bill: "Let's be clear about one thing: Josh Gottheimer cannot hide behind the SALT deduction in justifying his support for one of the most economically devastating bills to ever hit the State of New Jersey. The self-proclaimed 'problem solver' has once again solved nothing, and he has fallen far short of the goal of total reinstatement. More importantly, the modest gains New Jerseyans might see will be completely wiped out by the crushing taxes coming to New Jersey job creators in the form of raising individual and corporate tax rates, as well as the continued upward inflationary pressure it will place on prices at the grocery store and the gas pump," said De Gregorio. He continued, "Does Josh Gottheimer really think that a combined federal and state tax rate of over 50% for corporations and nearly 60% for individuals is lives up to his slogan of 'Lower Taxes, Jersey Values?' Because I have a different name for it: confiscation." He concluded, "Not only did Josh Gottheimer vote to raise our taxes tonight, but he also once again voted with AOC, this time for taxpayer-funded payments to people who have come to our country illegally and IRS snooping in the bank accounts of the vast majority of New Jerseyans. Josh Gottheimer can pay lip service to opposing socialism all he wants; the reality is that tonight he has voted once again to decimate entrepreneurship, private enterprise, and the dreams of small business owners, while dangerously increasing the size of the federal government and forcing Americans' reliance on it." | | | | == | == == == | | NICK DE GREGORIO FOR CONGRESS INC | PO Box 999, Edison, NJ 08818 | | Sent by mailto:press@nickfornj.com powered by

body:
Team,

We just wanted to check in and make sure you read Matt’s email from yesterday.

There is too much at stake this election, and Elise Stefanik continues to show where her loyalties lie — and they’re not with her constituents.

If you can, please support our campaign today and help us defeat Elise Stefanik in the 2022 Midterms. New Yorkers deserve a representative who will give them a voice at the table, not one who actively puts their own interests before our own! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25]

Thank you,

All of us @ Team Castelli

--- Begin Forwarded Message ---

Team,

After years of Elise Stefanik failing to put our district first in Congress and failing our nation on January 6th, I knew we could no longer wait for change and the time to act was now.

Since launching our campaign in September, Elise Stefanik has continued to put her own interests ahead of ours and I need your help more than ever.

Please make a donation today to help us, not only defeat Stefanik in 2022, but to send a true voice to Congress who will work for ALL Northern New Yorkers, not against us! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25]
Here are just a few ways Elise Stefanik has failed to put our districts priorities ahead of her own: *
She

his

that

in

January

attack
against
our
Capitol.
*
Now,
she’s
trying
to
defund
NPR
instead
of
focusing
on
the
issues
that
are
truly
impacting
NY-21.
That’s why we need your help today. Every donation made between now and election day will help us defeat Stefanik in 2022. Any amount helps → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25]
DONATE $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=10] DONATE $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=25] DONATE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-fr-2111?amount=50]

It is time we had a representative who works for the people, instead of someone intent on advancing their own career, no matter the cost.

Thank you for being part of our team!

Matt Castelli

Matt Castelli is a former CIA officer and Director for Counterterrorism at the National Security Council who served in both the Obama and Trump White Houses. He lives in Saratoga County and is running to represent the people of NY’s 21st Congressional District.

|
| | |
_**First** Biden's job approval hit a record low of 41%.

**Then** 70% of Americans think the economy is in shambles.

**Now** 51% say they would vote Republican over Democrat._

**[That’s why we need to know: if the 2022 election was held today, would you vote Republican?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljt7-4qqlpo5/ "That’s why we need to know: if the 2022 election was held today, would you vote Republican?")**

---
| | | [TAKE POLL NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljt8-4qqlpo6/ "TAKE POLL NOW")
---

This is our one and only chance to take back the House. We need Republicans in charge in order to save the future of our country from Biden's disastrous socialist agenda.

_But it won’t be easy_. Pelosi has millions on hand to spend destroying freedom-loving patriots across the nation and obliterating Trump’s allies in Congress.

**[We need to know if you are a committed Republican voter. Take this poll and let us know if you plan to vote republican.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljt9-4qqlpo7/ "We need to know if you are a committed republican voter. Take this poll and let us know if you plan to vote republican. ")**

We're showing this list to House Republican Leadership and we want to make sure your name is on it. We need your response **IN THE NEXT HOUR. **

**[Take the Official House Republican Poll NOW and tell us where you stand.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljta-4qqlpo7/ "Take the Official House Republican Poll NOW and tell us where you stand. ")**

Your decision to vote Republican could be the reason we do or don’t take back the House.

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljtb-4qqlpo8/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w3rp-1ljtc-4qqlpo9/ "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Carleah Summers
subject: URGENT: Volunteer Opportunity Tomorrow (11/20)!
body:
Team Carleah, ready to put some boots on the ground?

Apologies for the last minute notice, but we will be joining [Karen Simpson](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/08eae83bd4bdef2ba59c132e41dff7a30b047936?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.karen4maryland.com%2F&userId=7788844&signature=83e3e68f27b53b1c), a candidate for delegate representing District 3A in Frederick, for her door knocking kickoff. We will be sharing campaign materials/resources and dispersing a bunch of our swanky new Vote Carleah palm cards!

**When?** Saturday, November 20th from 10am to 12:30pm (leave whenever you need!)
**Where?** Starting from the Frederick Dems HQ at 1080 W Patrick St., Frederick, MD (Suite 4, tucked in the corner to the right of the ALDI grocery store in the Vista Shoppes/Hillcrest Plaza)
**What to bring?** Comfortable walking shoes and excitement!

Please reply if you're able to join us so we have a good idea of how many people we're bringing!

If you're unable to come but still want to support, [consider donating $20 or so](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/54d1cc3055f5da74ade3a3278c55ecee5ca2e0b1?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=7736899d94e35c77) to help cover the costs of our campaign materials in the future!

See you there,

Brett
Campaign Advisor

\--

**Vote Carleah Summers**
[Website](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/15e7e9874998140b2f2eb73f517f16e365c35b6f?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.carleahsummers.com%2F&userId=7788844&signature=780038c1e9dcf0d2) | [Facebook](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/b8c9cc502edd8a7b4b1c12df6bcd7437eb6ff2bb?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers%2F&userId=7788844&signature=50b599d65404585f) | [Twitter](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/697475e29bd5bac4ebc0341cf749622de9c4d1d3?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fcarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=05714afb1d35d79d) | [Instagram](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/5afc7f8622fa574de08d79d239fd7d319a4c47e3?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=6c0487b8ebe5aa2c)
[Donate](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/c1d15844eabe6a79b67b7abf9412b15929aca682?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=af7d951f6f4c13da) | [Volunteer Form](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/42996f1d3c07dbaa4267151e2c4d07561373339b?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2Fteamcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=1c30fb40d472efe0)
[carleahsummers@gmail.com](mailto:carleahsummers@gmail.com)

name: Eric Gash For Congress
subject: REPORT: Democrats "can win" in NC-14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38791003/317091196/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2ZmEwYS01NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHtyiU-wIqZuiNZNZCD5OGKaDFmlTx3HGfPW7-9bc6o=)
This can't be ignored, friend.

After redistricting, NC-14 just became one of the few competitive House races in North Carolina.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38791004/317091204/1573898945?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2ZmEwYS01NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHtyiU-wIqZuiNZNZCD5OGKaDFmlTx3HGfPW7-9bc6o=)
In case you missed it, NC-14 covers a huge chunk of Western North Carolina and saw a +7 shift toward Democrats due to population growth.

**_The Citizen-Times_ is now saying Democrats "could have a chance" to flip this seat. That's a big reason why extremist Madison Cawthorn vacated this seat to run in a neighboring district. He was afraid to lose here. Plain and simple.**

Make no mistake: National Republicans will not go down lightly in NC-14. Not because they care about our community, but because they’re hell-bent on retaking the House majority. Eric's race in NC-14 just became one of the major roadblocks that can stop them.

**[We set an urgent goal of raising $15,000 in online contributions before the end of the week to set the tone now that our race is on the map. We can win this race, but it's going to take overwhelming grassroots support. Please rush in $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38791005/317091207/1573898945?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2ZmEwYS01NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHtyiU-wIqZuiNZNZCD5OGKaDFmlTx3HGfPW7-9bc6o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38791006/317091208/1573898945?refcode=em-111921-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM2ZmEwYS01NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHtyiU-wIqZuiNZNZCD5OGKaDFmlTx3HGfPW7-9bc6o=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Against all odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I wanted to share some thoughts with you after a pretty big morning, when we passed the President’s Build Back Better plan in the House just moments ago. A little less than a year ago, we were still deep in the tumult of Donald Trump’s final months in office. It was pure chaos. A new abuse every day, all leading up to one of the worst days in our democracy’s history. We were more divided than ever, with Republicans in the thrall of Trump’s cult of personality. But let’s take a step back. Because what’s happened is _monumental_. Imagine if on this day last year, I told you that we would be able to cut child poverty in half and provide _well over_ $1 trillion in relief for working families, hundreds of millions of vaccines, and help for workers. All in only President Biden’s first year in office. _That would be pretty great_ , you’d probably reply. What if I told you that we decided to put together one of the biggest investments in the American people since the New Deal? A new, New Deal, if you will. Universal preschool for all 3 and 4 year olds. Capping child care costs for all families. Expanding Medicare. The biggest investment to fight climate change ever — $550 billion in clean energy and green jobs. Major funding for workers just struggling to get by. Taxing billionaires and corporations to pay for it. _Wow. Just wow._ That’s incredible, you’d think. Now, what if we didn’t stop here. What if I also told you that we would somehow bridge the partisan divide and come together to agree to a $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill? _Holy cow_ , you’d exclaim! And you’d be right. That’s what we’ve done. That’s what Democrats have accomplished. And that’s what you helped make happen thanks to your work, your calls, your donations, and your persistence. **_You. You did all of this. And it’s a BIG F-ING DEAL, as Joe Biden would say._** Often in politics, it’s hard to see the forest for the trees. You focus on what didn’t get done, or make it into the bill, instead of what did. And what was accomplished. When we passed the _Affordable Care Act_ , some focused on what didn’t make it into the bill as opposed to what we _did_ — giving tens of millions health care. We can’t afford to make that same mistake this time. _Because this bill is huge. And will make a huge difference for millions of Americans._ That’s what I came to Congress to do. To help people. To help our neighbors live a better, more dignified life. To help our planet. To help families. **_To help._** And for the first time in a long time, we’re accomplishing just that. We need to get out that message, and we need to do it now. **_Democrats in the House want to help people and we have. And Republicans tried to block it all._** Now, we still need to get this Build Back Better bill through the Senate and to the President’s desk. A bill to expand universal preschool, help parents afford child care, fight climate change, and expand health care and paid family leave. We must fight to ensure the Senate doesn’t water down these provisions, particularly the significant progress we made on prescription drug pricing and paid family leave. Because we need to get this done, and we need it to be right. I’m going to fight with everything I’ve got. Because I came to Washington, DC to help people, not to tread water. We can enact real change. And we will. We already have. Because of you. — Adam P.S. If you’re as ready as I am to defend these monumental legislative achievements and ensure that voters know that Democrats are trying to help people, please consider pitching in a donation today: | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38790767/317090278/-751938712?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20211119_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmNjNWVjMC01NDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjyRFqDarNDTJI6f_vjM6U_GbQq0Snzh_k5LD10RZbA=)

Friend,

Thanks to our Democratic majorities in Congress, as well as President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, Democrats are passing bold legislation that's making a meaningful difference in the lives of Americans. And thanks to the American Rescue Plan, direct stimulus checks went out to the people, small businesses got the help they needed and COVID vaccinations have ramped up big-time.

**I'm more determined than ever to move our country forward and Build Back Better – but as I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to hear from this team __ about what issues are most important. **
I'm running because I never tire of fighting for the issues that matter most. But there's a lot of work to do in the months ahead, and when it comes to acting on what's most urgent, I rely on the input of this grassroots team.
So I have a simple ask for you: complete my custom survey for you and share your feedback directly with me. I'm still looking for 82 more responses from your area before our strategy meeting at 8 a.m. tomorrow, so can you take 60 seconds to fill out this survey right now? You can use this link: **[https://survey.valdemings.com/demings-senate-priorities-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38795345/317098905/579985531?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1729-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2IyZTZkMS01YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7dzuHkCp87T02djglqmLIPf667CBNFv0ym80f6PUTRg=&emci=578a5bc9-2147-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9cb2e6d1-5a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100)** *

---
Dear Friends and Allies, Today marks the end of **Transgender Awareness Week** , but it’s not the end of the fight for transgender and non-binary people who deserve to feel safe, accepted, respected, empowered, and seen in a country and world that is dominated by patriarchy. This week past week, we honored people who are no longer with us on **Transgender Day of Remembrance** (November 20th), and we reflected on our country’s history of ignoring victims whose lives are taken in acts of transphobic-violence. We feel fortunate to learn from transgender leaders who are paving the way for a more inclusive country for our transgender friends and family. Every year, we strive to do better at uplifting these voices. Although we strive to create a safe space within our progressive community, we must continue to educate ourselves as an organization, and find ways to be better allies in our personal lives. For those who do not identify as transgender or non-binary, we encourage you continue supporting policies and promoting values that will help us bend the arc towards justice, equality, and inclusion. To those who identify as transgender or non-binary: we are listening.

******In solidarity,**
**_Barrier To Entry PAC_******

clean_body: We have so much work to do. | | | = = Dear Friends and Allies, Today marks the end of Transgender Awareness Week , but it’s not the end of the fight for transgender and non-binary people who deserve to feel safe, accepted, respected, empowered, and seen in a country and world that is dominated by patriarchy. This week past week, we honored people who are no longer with us on Transgender Day of Remembrance (November 20th), and we reflected on our country’s history of ignoring victims whose lives are taken in acts of transphobic-violence. We feel fortunate to learn from transgender leaders who are paving the way for a more inclusive country for our transgender friends and family. Every year, we strive to do better at uplifting these voices. Although we strive to create a safe space within our progressive community, we must continue to educate ourselves as an organization, and find ways to be better allies in our personal lives. For those who do not identify as transgender or non-binary, we encourage you continue supporting policies and promoting values that will help us bend the arc towards justice, equality, and inclusion. To those who identify as transgender or non-binary: we are listening. ****In solidarity, Barrier To Entry PAC** ****************** **************** **********************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC********************** **********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> ____= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

| Here's why we need to bring back Trump and nominate him as Speaker of the House:

* Prices are rising.
* The southern border is wide open.
* Democrats just added $367 billion to the deficit by passing their radical spending bills.
* And more and more Americans think the country is heading in the wrong direction.

If President Trump takes the Speaker's gavel away from Nancy Pelosi, he could put an end to all of this madness.
But we can't wait any longer! clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | BREAKING: Mark Meadows, President Trump's Chief of Staff, has endorsed my proposal to nominate Trump as Speaker of the House. Five months ago, I committed to nominating Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House, and now one of the President's closest allies has come aboard. Just watch: | == | Members of the media mocked me, including the "journalists" at Fruitpunch news who claimed to have spoken to "Trump world." But I know that President Trump is ready to make his return to politics, and I just can't wait to have him back! If you're ready to join Mark Meadows and me to bring Donald Trump back AS SOON AS POSSIBLE, I need you to rush in your support right now. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Here's why we need to bring back Trump and nominate him as Speaker of the House: Prices are rising. The southern border is wide open. Democrats just added $367 billion to the deficit by passing their radical spending bills. And more and more Americans think the country is heading in the wrong direction. If President Trump takes the Speaker's gavel away from Nancy Pelosi, he could put an end to all of this madness. But we can't wait any longer! Democrats seem to find new ways to destroy our country every day, so we need another term of President Trump and a shot of America-First policies to == | | | == | God bless America, Matt Gaetz Republican, FL-01 | == | | | | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Fighting for a clean planet is brave. Standing up to the NRA is brave.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey friend! Malcolm's fiancé, Matt, here.
I’m reaching out today to ask you to do something for Malcolm. But first, I’ll explain why.
Malcolm has a saying that I really love, and it goes: _"Bravery is contagious."_
And when you think about it, that's what this whole movement is about.
Trying to change the idea of who should and shouldn't run our country is scary. But running to be the first openly gay man in the U.S. Senate is brave.
Passing legislation that will make our families safe and healthy is difficult. But fighting for a clean planet is brave. Standing up to the NRA is brave.
Do you see what I mean? The work we're doing takes incredible courage.
And, sure enough, it's catching on. Every day our movement for working families gets bigger and bigger.
**But the success of our movement depends on our ability to bring a huge coalition of folks together, and we must keep our foot on the gas if we want to win this thing.**
[So I'm personally asking: Will you do a brave thing today and pitch in $3 to fuel my fiancé Malcolm's campaign for U.S. Senate? Every donation adds up in a big way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38798460/317102729/-360183459?refcode2=5624f276-5e49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211119-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjI0ZjI3Ni01ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QA9gKs4pZ92D1r5qhgOsyFyhR5HZuYXBUa1hGfwn_Hc=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38798461/317102730/-360183459?refcode2=5624f276-5e49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211119-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjI0ZjI3Ni01ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QA9gKs4pZ92D1r5qhgOsyFyhR5HZuYXBUa1hGfwn_Hc=)**
Thanks for being a part of this team. We couldn't do this without you.
Onwards and upwards,
Dr. Matt

* * *

subject: We missed our Mid-Month Deadline by $1,500…
body:
We have some news on the ground from the Lombardo campaign about this month's fundraising...

| Peter,

We have some news on the ground from the Lombardo campaign about this month's fundraising...
We fell short of our mid-month deadline this month, and with Election Day being less than a year away now, every budget goal needs to be met when we get into crunch time like this!
We looked over the numbers, and we fell short by $1,500.
Normally, missing our goal would mean budget cuts and less manpower on the ground, but we just got off the phone with the Sheriff...
...he told us not to scrap anything from the campaign budget until his top supporters were given another chance to get us back on track and make up our deficit! That's why we're sending you this message today - [will you help us shore up our mid-November finances and keep our mission going strong?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014wct-r8dtgoxPzwjmV04pz4MKaRYU6ZLkWVHBgTjV7_w1c6h7HI21QmDooGTvx6HB9fBEI8yYzcCacrUD2En41atC13CewFb6WcI7z-tUq6nASl4OFelYouCftS58bvGJViJAdPX2iHlFGmnaOpLQiLFxdxZgxSv2sgYMnFk8vFsKmyE506X5xAh5mZLahACQk8-zjeh_kqHdrDKEw93Fh3HUaGlxRkv&c=fHk2G6CYCyVayQ4sMGhiCpPgqZOBFKnXaQneVFN9kA5RnbPWBfT7Hg==&ch=0_pE7E6xJd6juTfnXSugG2lvKx2TRxv1FlTRVVsadW_DLFwvoEFV3A==)

Hey there, Friend! I reached out last week because my friends at Defend the Senate needed some help to hit their mid-month fundraising goal and it was coming down to the wire. Well I’m glad to say that with your help they were able to cross the goal line and get it done. Republicans have the best shot they’ve had in forty years to take back the Congress, reinstall Mitch McConnell as the majority leader, and unravel all the progress we’ve made. **T****his is a 5 alarm fire and if we don’t wake up and get our acts together we could find ourselves back in the minority. name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/60b17cd6a0dfce1dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, As we head into Thanksgiving, we have a lot to be thankful for. Our campaign continues to make B.I.G. strides and build support across all of Georgia. It wouldn't be possible without you, and we're grateful to have you on our team.
---
---
# **_Endorsements Of The Week_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/5ca7dd1e2bc6760bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Thrilled to share with you that 101 County Commissioners across all of Georgia have endorsed our campaign! These local leaders are on the frontlines of the issues facing our state, I've worked with them for many years, and I'm humbled by the trust they've placed in me to serve in the U.S. Senate. Our grassroots organization and support is unmatched, and it's going to continue to make the difference.
---
---
# **_HUGE! OSHA Halts Its Mandate_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/ca19a7a6d3b81fd6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
This week, OSHA announced it's halting implementation and enforcement of the vaccine mandate on businesses pending future litigation. This is a major win, but the work has just begun. As Georgia's Agriculture Commissioner, I'm suing Joe Biden to stop his mandate for federal contractors, and we're going to keep up the pressure. We will not let Georgia businesses and workers become Biden's COVID police.
---
---
# **_Outside The Beltway_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/ec36e4ad8cf2f00ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Joined John Fredericks on _Outside The Beltway _to talk about our campaign and why we're the _only _conservative Republican who can defeat Raphael Warnock and take back the U.S. Senate with one conservative vote. We won't be outworked and we're not afraid of the tough questions. [**Watch the interview here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/82f4bc9fe91ef81dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One on One_**
---
---
Challenged Malani Kai to a one-on-one basketball shoot off after last Saturday's U.S. Senate Candidate Forum! [**Watch it here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/011df3a73c861772c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/2f484853bc3f0b87c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/e47e2345f688be7bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/32d6aec365396df2c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! As we head into the final weeks of 2021, it's absolutely vital that we start 2022 with momentum and resources. [**If you're able to contribute, I hope you'll do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/31e90ad8da84b513c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/8dbc5340084a515dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/7d8fec6a90b8d0f2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c/ccbdd70e2d36a033c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c&d=d45bbf482e689856c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c9d3fcf2c9cf9f2c).

name: Gwen Moore
subject: We did it! Updating you immediately about this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers, Wisconsinites, and all Americans, I am exuberant to tell you that today, Democrats in the House passed the Build Back Better Act! **My Sisters and Brothers, Wisconsinites, and all Americans, I am exuberant to tell you that today, Democrats in the House passed the Build Back Better Act!** As a single mother who literally depended on food stamps to feed my family and relied on programs like CHIP, I personally can tell you that this bill is so much more than just a piece of legislation that expands our social safety net – it is strengthening the fiber of the soul of America. It shepherds in a new way of life that lifts up single parents with affordable child care and paid family leave, lowers the cost of healthcare for our seniors and dramatically decreases the cost of live-saving prescription drugs, relieves struggling caregivers by paying them an honest wage, gives all children the jumpstart they need to succeed with universal pre-K, and that’s only the beginning. As a member of the Ways and Means Committee, I am proud that we were able to advance critical provisions including extending the Earned Income Child Tax Credit and key investments in senior care and childcare. Democrats are getting it done for the American people! We are truly building back better! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38799442/317107223/-231470522?refcode=1119&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ZmNjJlNC02MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q55hGkZBNjdqclEzWUBH4fYBn2TlNXnZ-bagQnKl51M=) Now we must take our voices to the Senate and make sure we are heard louder than ever before to get them to pass the Build Back Better Act and send it to President Biden’s desk! We must show that the Democratic Party, our big-tent Party, can get things done to move America forward. [**We must represent! Are you with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38799443/317107229/-231470522?refcode=1119link&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ZmNjJlNC02MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q55hGkZBNjdqclEzWUBH4fYBn2TlNXnZ-bagQnKl51M=) Together #WeRepresent, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38799444/317107231/-1802529380?refcode=101521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ZmNjJlNC02MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q55hGkZBNjdqclEzWUBH4fYBn2TlNXnZ-bagQnKl51M=)

subject: Will you tell me if it’s any good?

body:
Trying My Hand at Poetry
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze9lrvtl28ok2s6e51crm1re1gsp6qndkqfq1k08_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpgmao34s1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbc33econ4cdleiqnephme5imcc5l63hm2chhcpinaspimer36stnm9im0tph6srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo75ddm6up3aphkciqj0ptgmlin49fg)
Trying My Hand at Poetry

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvdodunlfvj3s32kfii9sm8dkf94cstre5ti6gi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpgmao34s1h2bs)
---

Friend,

I’ve been trying my hand at poetry. **_Could you let me know if it’s any good after reading?_**

_Roses are Red, the Southern Border is open

Joe Biden’s incompetence is as deep as the ocean

If I had a dollar, I’d try my hand at saving

Before Pelosi came for the Socialist’s taking_
