subject: Belleair Mayor Mike Wilkinson Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress
body:
Mayor Mike Wilkinson is announcing his support for Amanda Makki in her race for Congress in FL-13 | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=39e9a19891&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
# Belleair Mayor Mike Wilkinson Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=00ccb49085&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
|
---
| [Join Mayor Mike Wilkinson in Showing Your Support for Amanda!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=eadcca964d&e=c2296cffff "Join Mayor Mike Wilkinson in Showing Your Support for Amanda!")
---
| Hi Friend,

We have some exciting news to share with you. Mayor Mike Wilkinson is announcing his support for Amanda Makki for Congress! Amanda has now been endorsed by seven Pinellas Mayors - more than any other Republican or Democrat in the FL-13 race.

**"Amanda Makki knows Pinellas County. She understands the issues that face our local communities. Amanda's commitment to her work as a public servant is admirable," said Mayor Mike Wilkinson. "It's important Amanda wins this race for Florida's 13th Congressional District because she genuinely cares about the people of Pinellas County."**

**"Mayor Wilkinson has done so much for the town of Belleair and I admire his wisdom, enthusiasm, and leadership," said Amanda Makki. "I am grateful to have Mayor Wilkinson's support in this race."**

This endorsement comes one week after the Republican House Conference Chair and E-PAC founder Elise Stafanik announced Amanda Makki earned a spot on the "Women to Watch" First Slate 2021-2022 E-PAC candidates.

We want to thank you for your continued support for Amanda.

Want to learn more about Amanda Makki? Check out these links:
* [Where Amanda Stands on the Issues](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=605e5b7fb6&e=c2296cffff)

body:
This has been a long time coming. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38800868/317112649/823540626?refcode=ea.8db91c66-6749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.8db91c66-6749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGI5MWM2Ni02NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHQZZkdzt56SH0BYKM_bAdAX8UxJ1xHVwS3eJNxLI7A=&emci=6e3b07b2-6649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8db91c66-6749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
We have BIG news to share! **Roy just signed North Carolina’s budget, paving the way for critical resources to get to communities, small businesses, and families in need.** Peter, it’s been a long time coming, and it’s taken a lot of hard work. _Roy is proud to have delivered this win for North Carolinians._ But the fact is, there’s still work to be done and policy priorities that Roy is committed to achieving — like expanding Medicaid so more than half a million North Carolinians can access the care they need. **[Roy will never give up the fight, but he needs Democrats in Raleigh who will work WITH his administration on behalf of our communities. clean_body: This has been a long time coming. | We have BIG news to share! Roy just signed North Carolina’s budget, paving the way for critical resources to get to communities, small businesses, and families in need. Peter, it’s been a long time coming, and it’s taken a lot of hard work. Roy is proud to have delivered this win for North Carolinians. But the fact is, there’s still work to be done and policy priorities that Roy is committed to achieving — like expanding Medicaid so more than half a million North Carolinians can access the care they need. = Let’s be clear: This budget moves North Carolina forward in important ways. We’re expanding high-speed internet access, investing in our clean water infrastructure, giving much-needed raises to public school teachers, and so much more. These are critical funding opportunities that we must seize now, despite the places where the budget falls short. After nearly two years of this pandemic, our communities need help — this budget provides it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Peter, Did you see the breaking news? _A jury in Kenosha, Wisconsin just found Kyle Rittenhouse NOT GUILTY, of murder._ Peter the evidence in this case clearly showed that Rittenhouse acted in self-defense during the 2020 Kenosha riots, and this case never should’ve gone to trial. **But leftist media outlets and woke social media activists launched a 24/7 smear campaign on Kyle Rittenhouse. And weak-kneed prosecutors gave in and charged him with murder. ** _I’m grateful that the truth prevailed in this trial. But this case serves as a frightening example of the far left’s ability to manipulate our justice system._ As your representative in Congress, I’ll always stand up for your right to defend yourself. And I’ll never stop fighting to keep our court system fair and impartial. [**Will you chip in your best gift right now to help me DEFEAT the radical left next year and stand up for our Constitutional rights?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/983e97b3bf4fc8f9/22c30306bb4584c8c3d6b838967d376c/36963)** ** As Americans, we MUST defend the rule of law with every ounce of strength we can muster. And I’m counting on you to help me stop progressive Democrats from turning our courts into a political circus. Thank you for your support, Casey Wardynski

| Gobble up these trainings...
---

## 🦃**It’s giving... thanks!**
_From all of us at NDTC, we hope you enjoy a fabulous Thanksgiving holiday with family and friends._ _And whether you’re Building Blue (NDTC’s Version) or looking how to get involved in your community, we’re here to help._ _2022 is just around the corner, so gobble up these extra special events!_ **_In the meantime_** , [**_don’t forget to head on over to our new and improved home page!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ON_POr0Sh8MS-Yb4GfhZn1HZ-HSLVlMh4GiefwSVoCg)

* * *

[**Trainer Talks: "Do You Even Debrief?"**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O0lz1vM-x6TnYDT3TV-lmWRBdVNsLxZtaAK9aBRjjLY)
**Tuesday, November 30, 8pm ET** Our next installment of Trainer Talks will be going over all things debriefing, from how to run one to getting the most out of it. This interactive Q&A will feature three training experts, and you’ll have the opportunity to ask them questions directly. Bring your insights and questions to this event, space is limited!
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O0lz1vM-x6TnYDT3TV-lmWRBdVNsLxZtaAK9aBRjjLY)
---

* * *

[**What is a Democratic Precinct Chair**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wehTncLVvRsotYoeMzs5NL2yav6qX9mb-cMhvQXoUY0)
**Tuesday, November 30, 1pm ET**
A Democratic Precinct Chair is one of the most important roles in a local party. But do you know all that they do?
Learn about the role, how to further get involved, and how you can become a precinct chair yourself at Tuesday’s training.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O0lz1vM-x6TnYDT3TV-lmWRBdVNsLxZtaAK9aBRjjLY)
---

* * *

[**Non-Electoral Organizing for Your Local Democratic Party**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Bm9IHzV9RKyU_CIGTOSKphxT-bU6H2iI4ciLXBfZdyA)****
**Thursday, December 2, 1pm ET**
Between elections, it’s important to keep voters engaged. Join this training to review the best practices of organizing year-round so when elections roll around, you’re all set!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Bm9IHzV9RKyU_CIGTOSKphxT-bU6H2iI4ciLXBfZdyA)
---

* * *

[**Setting Up Your Local Democratic Party's Structure**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMTkyMV9UTERSJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.PvonOymgT17oRxB7XBghRiduaJTgGFpczMZKs1C2zIM)
**Friday, December 3, 1pm ET**
Buildings and bridges need support beams to operate. Your local Democratic Party is no different!
On Friday, our experts will go over how to optimize structure within your local party, explore examples of what this looks like, and discuss how you can maximize your leadership capabilities. Don’t miss out!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMTkyMV9UTERSJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.PvonOymgT17oRxB7XBghRiduaJTgGFpczMZKs1C2zIM)
---

* * *

**✨ Blog Spotlight ✨**[**How Democrats Can Lift Up and Engage Veteran Voices**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pK-dLx6-LwAAk_DSsBNjSlp-QY3QlxXq7-a-xK9lOLk)
Veterans are an essential part of every community, with unique needs, challenges, and aspirations.
From ensuring your campaign listens to veteran concerns, to finding ways to engage veterans within your own local party, read about how you can empower veterans to get involved and genuinely address their needs.

[READ NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pK-dLx6-LwAAk_DSsBNjSlp-QY3QlxXq7-a-xK9lOLk)

subject: Checking in
body:
Where do you stand? | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=6a0b1caf9c&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
|

Friend,

We have less than a year till the 2022 election and after the red wave we saw this past election momentum is building and we have a real opportunity to make a change here in New York.

Change starts with us, so please fill out this brief 5-question survey - we want to hear what you have to say.
---

[ TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=e4a542b1b8&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| _Remember, your response will not be shared and only be used for our campaign planning. _
Earlier this month Americans all across the country stood up for their values and cast their ballot for change. Even here in New York with wins across the state, the calls for change have arrived.

[**Please take our brief 5-question survey. >>>**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=c7153aa6f0&e=3ca66fc65a)
---

[ TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=c119a4afe4&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Thank you,

Astorino Polling
---
|
[ TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=a7c65190f5&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=678bfdf02f&e=3ca66fc65a)._

clean_body: Where do you stand? | | | | | Friend, We have less than a year till the 2022 election and after the red wave we saw this past election momentum is building and we have a real opportunity to make a change here in New York. Change starts with us, so please fill out this brief 5-question survey - we want to hear what you have to say. | Remember, your response will not be shared and only be used for our campaign planning. Earlier this month Americans all across the country stood up for their values and cast their ballot for change. Even here in New York with wins across the state, the calls for change have arrived. | Thank you, Astorino Polling | | | Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children. You can learn more by visiting . | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Friends of Rob Astorino, All rights reserved.

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820094:6pHTKq2N5:m:1:3298722022:1B44215CF171446BAC3D276D42FD9877:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820094:6pHTKq2N5:m:1:3298722022:1B44215CF171446BAC3D276D42FD9877:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820094:6pHTKq2N5:m:1:3298722022:1B44215CF171446BAC3D276D42FD9877:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Time sensitive, act fast, Fellow Patriot!
body:
This is all hands on-deck.

|
---
| | | Fellow Patriot, I really need your help.

My fundraising deadline was yesterday, and I missed the goal by only $5,000... I was crushed when I heard the news.

**But I 've extended it for 30 minutes because I believe in our team and your dedication to our fight to take back the Senate!**
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
I know you won't let me down, friend. You've always gone the extra mile to help, and I know you're one of the most key members of President Trump's team too.

So I'm asking for your help one last time before this deadline permanently ends in 30 minutes. _**[Can you be the grassroots supporter who sends us to success?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "Can you be the
grassroots supporter who sends us to success?")**_
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "CHIP IN $25")
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| | [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| | [CHIP IN $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "CHIP IN $250")
---
I can't stress enough how much I need your help. I can't let my team down - and we can't let the radical Left win.

They've already destroyed our border and skyrocketed our inflation rates. It's terrifying to think of what they will do if we let them surge ahead of us. You have to help before it's too late.
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820127:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
_I 'm counting on you._

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

* * *
---
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820128:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| | _A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Friend, as the liberal Left seeks to eradicate President Trump's legacy from our country, I will always work to protect our America First Agenda. I couldn't do it without your help.

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820128:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "please, click
here to support my efforts if you can. ")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter and Trump Patriot,

Marsha Blackburn
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820128:6ngRKq2MN:m:1:3299561967:2D0CDF45CBD854C0C5CEF44DBAB5BBD6:r "SUPPORT MY FIGHT")

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
If you haven’t had a chance to follow Peter Franchot on Twitter yet, now is a great time to do so as our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Every week, Peter uses social media to reflect on the news, provide updates from the campaign trail, and share his bold vision for the future of Maryland with his followers.
2022 is right around the corner, and we want to make sure that you never miss an update! Click here to follow Peter Franchot’s Twitter page. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot]
We’d love for you to join the discussions about the future we are building together. Thousands of fellow Marylanders are currently following Peter on Twitter, so make sure you aren’t missing out! Together, we’re going to build the critical mass of online support needed to secure a better and stronger future for Maryland in 2022.
Stay Connected,
Team Franchot Digital
P.S. After you’ve followed Peter on Twitter, make sure to forward this email to five of your friends. Peter is building an inclusive people-powered movement to change the way that government does business, and everyone’s invited.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em111721]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer

Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: The Holiday Season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It’s hard to believe we’re less than a week away from Thanksgiving, but with the holiday just days away things are busy with your Indiana Republi.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470946?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**The Holiday Season**_ It’s hard to believe we’re less than a week away from Thanksgiving, but with the holiday just days away things are busy with your Indiana Republican Party. Earlier this week, our legislative supermajorities held the annual organization day to gear up for the upcoming legislative session. Also, Indiana Republicans in Senate District 46 caucused and elected a new state senator. More information on both of those events are below.

Speaking of Thanksgiving, do you remember earlier this year when the Biden Administration was touting $0.16 saved on your Fourth of July cookouts? Well, this week news came that, because of the policies of Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is soaring at rates not seen in over 30 years. Which means, your family’s Thanksgiving meal will cost much more this year than it did last year. And with gas prices the way they are, getting over the river and through the woods to Grandmother’s house will cost you more, too! Thankfully, we have a chance next November to put a check on the Biden agenda and you can believe your Indiana Republican Party is going to keep the pedal to the metal for the next 12 months!

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer presides over the SD46 caucus earlier this week in New Albany_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **visited Mayor Moore in Kokomo. There's a lot of good happening in Kokomo under his leadership!

**Governor Holcomb** thanked Indiana Commissioner for Higher Education Teresa Lubbers for her 12 years of service. See his full statement here:
_**"Indiana has been fortunate to have Commissioner Lubbers devote her time in public service to the benefit of Hoosiers with her work in higher education and workforce issues for our state for many years. We are grateful for her passion for students and employers and for helping Indiana make strides toward ensuring all Hoosiers have the education and training they need to prosper."**_
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb visits with Mayor Moore._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Congratulations Senator Boehnlein**_ Hoosiers in Senate District 46 elected a new State Senator earlier this week. Congratulations to Kevin Boehnlein on your election!

_**Photo:** Retiring State Senator Ron Grooms, new State Senator Kevin Boehnlein, and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on IN Focus**_ Chairman Hupfer was on IN Focus this past Sunday. You can watch his interview here: [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/in-focus-indiana-gop-dem-chairs-react-to-sen-mike-braun-campaign-audit/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=630fcb4ec9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| _**Organization Day**_ Earlier this week, the Indiana House and Senate gathered in the Statehouse for Organization Day, which marks the ceremonial start of the 2022 Legislative Session.
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[November 19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7980f08718&e=1acd9bb3d6): Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner

clean_body: It’s hard to believe we’re less than a week away from Thanksgiving, but with the holiday just days away things are busy with your Indiana Republi.. | | | | | | | | The Holiday Season It’s hard to believe we’re less than a week away from Thanksgiving, but with the holiday just days away things are busy with your Indiana Republican Party. Earlier this week, our legislative supermajorities held the annual organization day to gear up for the upcoming legislative session. Also, Indiana Republicans in Senate District 46 caucused and elected a new state senator. More information on both of those events are below. Speaking of Thanksgiving, do you remember earlier this year when the Biden Administration was touting $0.16 saved on your Fourth of July cookouts? Well, this week news came that, because of the policies of Joe Biden and his handlers, inflation is soaring at rates not seen in over 30 years. Which means, your family’s Thanksgiving meal will cost much more this year than it did last year. And with gas prices the way they are, getting over the river and through the woods to Grandmother’s house will cost you more, too! Thankfully, we have a chance next November to put a check on the Biden agenda and you can believe your Indiana Republican Party is going to keep the pedal to the metal for the next 12 months! Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer presides over the SD46 caucus earlier this week in New Albany | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana For All Governor Holcomb visited Mayor Moore in Kokomo. There's a lot of good happening in Kokomo under his leadership! Governor Holcomb thanked Indiana Commissioner for Higher Education Teresa Lubbers for her 12 years of service. See his full statement here: "Indiana has been fortunate to have Commissioner Lubbers devote her time in public service to the benefit of Hoosiers with her work in higher education and workforce issues for our state for many years. We are grateful for her passion for students and employers and for helping Indiana make strides toward ensuring all Hoosiers have the education and training they need to prosper." Photos: Gov. Holcomb visits with Mayor Moore. | | | Congratulations Senator Boehnlein Hoosiers in Senate District 46 elected a new State Senator earlier this week. Congratulations to Kevin Boehnlein on your election! Photo: Retiring State Senator Ron Grooms, new State Senator Kevin Boehnlein, and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer. | | | Chairman Hupfer on IN Focus Chairman Hupfer was on IN Focus this past Sunday. You can watch his interview here: | | | | Organization Day Earlier this week, the Indiana House and Senate gathered in the Statehouse for Organization Day, which marks the ceremonial start of the 2022 Legislative Session. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner IFRW Annual Holliday Luncheon : 2021 Annual Holiday Luncheon Adams County GOP Christmas Reception | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._

**THE RAYNER RUNDOWN**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802445/317120232/-1570160113?refcode=em21_211119_rundown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjllMjgzYy02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua3M3_6KiKbfTNCQfEXsieaqXO2q8YE-yQky9JxTZ0E=)

Peter, welcome back to the #RaynerRundown Newsletter!

Elections around the country didn’t go as we expected. We took some tough losses, and have been forced to have some serious conversations around how we’re going to ensure that Republicans do not win the congressional majority next year.

**_The last thing we need is the far-right’s agenda being advanced and endangering our communities. _**

November means we’re officially less than a year away from the 2022 elections. We are beyond ready to continue the fight for the people and for our democracy. We would not be in this position without your help all along the way. The doors knocked, the phone calls made, the events attended, the yard signs placed in front of homes, the contributions made -- all of those came together to help us make it to the next step in this election, and I am so excited.

**So during this holiday season, from the bottom of our hearts, thank you.**

We have a lot of work left to do. Long days and nights of pounding the pavement, making phone calls, and visiting each corner of our district are ahead. **But we’re ready. **

P.S. If you celebrate Thanksgiving, please enjoy with your families next week, and be safe in all gatherings you partake in.

clean_body: = | | THE RAYNER RUNDOWN = Peter, welcome back to the #RaynerRundown Newsletter! Elections around the country didn’t go as we expected. We took some tough losses, and have been forced to have some serious conversations around how we’re going to ensure that Republicans do not win the congressional majority next year. The last thing we need is the far-right’s agenda being advanced and endangering our communities. November means we’re officially less than a year away from the 2022 elections. We are beyond ready to continue the fight for the people and for our democracy. We would not be in this position without your help all along the way. The doors knocked, the phone calls made, the events attended, the yard signs placed in front of homes, the contributions made -- all of those came together to help us make it to the next step in this election, and I am so excited. So during this holiday season, from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. We have a lot of work left to do. Long days and nights of pounding the pavement, making phone calls, and visiting each corner of our district are ahead. But we’re ready. P.S. If you celebrate Thanksgiving, please enjoy with your families next week, and be safe in all gatherings you partake in. #RunWithRayner ON THE SOCIALS OUT AND ABOUT = "Today, I had the honor of meeting the winner of the “2022 Art in the Capitol” for Pinellas County! Evelyn attends Thurgood Marshall Fundamental Middle School right in District 70. Her artwork is beautiful and about protecting our beautiful Florida ecosystem. Congrats Evelyn!" = “ Thank you all so much for coming out to tonight's reception for our campaign! My friends, colleagues and supporters came through to put on an amazing event at the newly reopened 22southfoodhall .” = "Michele met Maxine Waters, a pillar in the campaign for progressive change and a personal hero." ENDORSEMENTS = = | This is a people-powered campaign. Help us keep the momentum going -- and if you’re able, take it a step further and become a monthly recurring donor! | = = | | | ---|---|--- P.O. Box 35218 St. Petersburg, Fl 33705 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . PAID FOR BY MICHELE FOR FLORIDA

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802468/317120339/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=) Friend, we're just over halfway through the month of November and it's already been a packed month on the campaign trail.

For starters, we got our first look at what the lines will look like for our new congressional district. This race is poised to be highly competitive and Montanans' first chance to send a Democrat to Congress in decades.

As always, we’re continuing our work meeting voters where they’re at and amplifying the issues and challenges that Montana families face. Below are some highlights to give you a sense of what we're up to.

If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to respond to this email directly. Otherwise, I hope you enjoy the update!

Cora
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802470/317120341/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)**
---

* * *

This month, Team Cora joined voters for a **Coffee Meet and Greet in Big Sky.** We discussed important issues like childcare, housing, wildland fire issues, and the role Montanans can play in getting things done in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802471/317120342/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)

Last week, we were honored to observe Veterans Day at the **Bozeman Veterans Day Ceremony** alongside the American Legion and Veterans Alliance of Southwest Montana. We were moved by Zone Commander Len Albright's speech about the sacrifices our men and women in the armed forces make.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802473/317120343/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)
We stopped by the **Teamsters Local 2 Meeting in Bozeman** to discuss labor priorities and policies with Secretary-Treasurer Erin Foley. In Congress, Cora will always be a staunch supporter of collective bargaining and the rights of workers.
****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802474/317120345/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)****
**We'd like to extend a huge thank you to state Rep. Moffie Funk and former Lt. Governor Mike Cooney for hosting an incredible Meet and Greet in Helena.** These two have done so much to lead Montana through good times and rough patches. With them on our team, we're confident we can win this new seat.
********[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802476/317120346/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)******** ********[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802477/317120347/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)********
**And finally, we'd like to highlight the latest stop of Cora's #HometownTour.** We met with Carrie and Cameron of Bread Zeppelin in Sheridan, and talked about challenges running a small business and hiring workers here in Montana.
********[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802479/317120349/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)**************** ********
With your support, we've been able to run an issue-focused campaign and meet voters face-to-face across this district. Running a grassroots campaign in a district as large as ours can get expensive. And since we're not taking a dime from corporate PACs, we're depending on support from individual donors like you.

**[We're still short of our end-of-week fundraising goal and can use a boost before the weekend hits. Can you chip in a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802481/317120351/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)**

Thank you,

Team Cora

** ** ********[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802484/317120354/102973118?refcode=em-111921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE1ZmQ2NC02ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkay07CYMp4FTCE3vPbJZMm2Ie8i469Yliqm6htFYaw=)********

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820027:6WUFHq2jN:m:1:3253819041:888F98F5DA8C8F5BA7D22C57C2058399:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820027:6WUFHq2jN:m:1:3253819041:888F98F5DA8C8F5BA7D22C57C2058399:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820027:6WUFHq2jN:m:1:3253819041:888F98F5DA8C8F5BA7D22C57C2058399:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out. And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision. Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills. | | Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free. You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you. With love, Wendy Rittenhouse | | | | Copyright(C) 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. Free Kyle USA PO Box 5322 Reno, NV 89513 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. Peter, did you see the news? Marjorie Taylor Greene's buddy Paul Gosar has now joined her in being kicked off of their committees in Congress. [**Donate $10 today and we can ensure Marge never sees a committee again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38802607/317120812/-804235033?refcode=em1119&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBmOGU1Mi02ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lARgH-hoC5zqDyZXQiIyNtO5_MEDK9IMvc1FcU3uV4U=)
Two far-right representatives being kicked off committees is hardly a problem for the GOP – but it is a problem for the American people. We need our representatives to govern and represent our interests and you can't do that while throwing tantrums from the sidelines.

Rep. Kevin McCarthy thinks that Paul Gosar and Marjorie Taylor Greene “should expect to be on committees if Republicans take the House majority.” **Not if we have anything to do with it. **

The people of Northwest Georgia are tired of her broken promises. Instead of working for the people, Marge chooses to defend insurrectionists, defy mask mandates, and pull publicity stunts. We want a leader who knows our struggles, not a politician that parachuted into GA-14 for an easy win.

**[Marjorie will not be on a committee in 2022 because she won't be in Congress. Team Holly.

body:
“no matter what accomplishments you make, somebody helped you.”
#

Friends -
Althea Gibson was the first African-American to win a Grand Slam championship in tennis. Reflecting on her career, she said “no matter what accomplishments you make, somebody helped you.”
That’s true whether making history on the tennis court, or in an election for U.S. Senate.
No one person can get elected to the Senate all by themselves — and especially not one hoping to become only the third African-American woman ever elected to the chamber.
It takes a team. That’s the only way.
And right now, Cheri Beasley needs your help. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for Senate today? clean_body: “no matter what accomplishments you make, somebody helped you.” Friends - Althea Gibson was the first African-American to win a Grand Slam championship in tennis. Reflecting on her career, she said “no matter what accomplishments you make, somebody helped you.” That’s true whether making history on the tennis court, or in an election for U.S. Senate. No one person can get elected to the Senate all by themselves — and especially not one hoping to become only the third African-American woman ever elected to the chamber. It takes a team. That’s the only way. And right now, Cheri Beasley needs your help. name: Marco Rubio
subject: I don't do this often, Fellow Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
It hurts me to write this, Fellow Patriot.
|
---
| | |
It hurts me to write this, Fellow Patriot.

I just can't believe that after everyone reached out, we still failed to reach my goal.

_Mike Pence reached out.
Mike Pompeo reached out.
Donald Trump Jr. reached out.
Mark, my Campaign Manager, reached out._

We are on the doorstep of making history, Fellow Patriot. But by continuing to miss goal after goal after goal, we are now putting my campaign in jeopardy -- these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democrats here in Florida.

**[Because of this, I have NO CHOICE but to activate a 3X match for the next 60 minutes to try and save my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58818486:6aBphq2N9:m:1:3299561967:1ACE3CEA8680B6D825B0E42FAFD24A58:r "Because of this, I

subject: Happy #Strikesgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92543/images/Deluzio-Logo-450W.png][https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/616537777064796837463461626B59714F4E566C674E4D4C4771793232654F2F50456979496A336D2F344773456B546E7045617065696A42536A6D4A6C765369/editor_images/FREEDOM-Chris-UPMC.png]
Derek,
Yesterday, Chris stood with striking UPMC workers on the front lines. He talked about an issue core to the strike and core to this campaign: fighting for our common good. UPMC has posted record revenue during the pandemic, while workers and patients have suffered.
Chris is committed to fighting corporate greed at every level - and we know that the Republicans are going to have well-funded, corporate-backed candidates trying to protect their interests.
Every dollar matters in this fight for our common good - can you chip in $10, $20, $50 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chris-deluzio-for-congress-email-q4_2021?refcode=em_fr_211119] Let’s show corporate interests that they are on notice, and Chris isn’t going to back down from the fight.
In Solidarity,
Team Deluzio

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Not looking good for Republicans in Ohio
body:
The Democrats are throwing everything at the Senate race, and will do anything to win.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iHVngsgSt3ZEh13nZJqH32NcLyG0_U0Wc3sLtiSMT47ZfM90HBFUsUTgR8wr5hHoHWrdRmWt_P9uSKozZVChtIoP3S_bdslu8J8DF3mkPxLkZSuH-wVxAdiVbGpb0qw9eiEgJCgyifllCp5PcHA3FoPj78PZ8yQnITN9ej7XYMqdBM5FQ6eF2A==&c=-AOU7iUi_SAdtlcTuASYVdQV7h-wpfbGZNWItCefxa-t_Bmxxt4phg==&ch=o7iT4Egma8Dez78ojuUf9gyOkDABmje1r8rBc794OQbF8LqSfLjLYw==)

Peter,
The Democrats are throwing everything at the Senate race, and will do anything to win.
Tim Ryan and Morgan Harper have received MILLIONS in campaign contributions.
Unlike the Democrats I do not rely on corporate interests and PACs to win, I get my support from everyday Americans who are tired of the Radical Left destroying this country. The Democrats can't stand on their own.
[Click here to support my campaign >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iHVngsgSt3ZEh13nZJqH32NcLyG0_U0Wc3sLtiSMT47ZfM90HBFUsUTgR8wr5hHoHWrdRmWt_P9uSKozZVChtIoP3S_bdslu8J8DF3mkPxLkZSuH-wVxAdiVbGpb0qw9eiEgJCgyifllCp5PcHA3FoPj78PZ8yQnITN9ej7XYMqdBM5FQ6eF2A==&c=-AOU7iUi_SAdtlcTuASYVdQV7h-wpfbGZNWItCefxa-t_Bmxxt4phg==&ch=o7iT4Egma8Dez78ojuUf9gyOkDABmje1r8rBc794OQbF8LqSfLjLYw==)
The Democrats have raised over 6 MILLION DOLLARS on this race, we cannot let them win, their campaigns aren't supported by Ohio, they are supported by coastal elites.
This is the most important race in the country. It will determine the outcome of the U.S. Senate. Reclaiming the Senate is our only chance to stop Biden and his agenda before 2024.

name: David Palmer
subject: Two Systems of Justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Friends,

This afternoon, a jury in Kenosha, Wisconsin, not that far from where we live, found Kyle Rittenhouse not guilty on several charges. This seventeen-year-old traveled from our state of Illinois to Wisconsin, armed with an AR-15-style rifle to join in the unrest after a Kenosha police officer shot Jacob Blake, a Black man. It is not under debate that Rittenhouse then killed one person, and injured two others.

I’m extremely disappointed in this verdict. Clearly it was delivered because of extreme bias shown during this trial. Once again, we are showing that there is a great need to reduce all gun violence for all reasons. Once again, we are showing Black children across our nation that there is a different system of justice for Black and white children. This should never be the case. Justice is only justice if it is applied fairly for everyone. Laws need to be applied equally to everyone.

I know that you are likely having strong feelings following this verdict, and I hope that you will take the time you need to process this and find a way to demonstrate calm and unity in the face of a difficult and unjust result.

David Palmer
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on. Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/sqIEO42bkkSnOJ23w8ohrQ2] , or you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/079b9bb7-6d49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/d7a9a8c9-7049-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2E5YThjOS03MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAJ_ZjCWOL-Qgg1E7otDnWlKJ2aQbZOIdUHOMtO5Uhc=&id=125088311 .Paid for by Palmer for Illinois

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: BREAKING: Build Back Better just passed
disclaimer_text: paid for by making the largest corporations and wealthiest Americans begin to pay their fair share in taxes
body:
The Senate must act quickly to send the Build Back Better Act to President Biden’s desk — so we can finally make investments in working people, families, and our communities.
#
Peter, we did it: **The House just PASSED the Build Back Better Act!**
Our historic legislation delivers on the promises that Democrats made to invest in working people across America, allowing them to wake up feeling better about their daily lives and the opportunities their families have.
We will continue working to level the playing field as we not only build back better but fairer. Now, the Senate must act quickly to send the Build Back Better Act to President Biden’s desk — _so we can finally make it law and invest in our communities._
[**I'm calling on the Senate to immediately pass the popular Build Back Better Act because working families can’t wait any longer. But I can’t do this alone. Can you chip in $3 or more to fuel our work to pass these transformative investments in working people once and for all? It’s time to deliver.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8689?refcode=em20211119-813&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=813%2E420207%2EbadeDH)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8689?refcode=em20211119-813&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=813%2E420207%2EbadeDH)**
I’m so excited about what we were able to accomplish here, Peter. Thanks to our organizing, the Build Back Better Act invests in:
* Universal preschool for all 3-year-olds and 4-year-olds
* Affordable, high-quality childcare
* Paid family and medical leave
* Home and community-based care
* Historic climate action
* Health care, Medicare expansion, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs
* Affordable housing
* An extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit
* Humane immigration reform
* Higher education and workforce development
* And MORE!

This is critical funding for so many of our progressive priorities that will directly improve the lives of working people — fully paid for by making the largest corporations and wealthiest Americans begin to pay their fair share in taxes. And we got it done with the slimmest of majorities and zero Republican votes.
But we know that this legislation still faces unprecedented opposition from Corporate PACs, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and fossil fuel companies as it heads to the Senate. **That’s why it’s so important we keep our eye on the ball and not let up until the Build Back Better Act is signed into law.**
**[This won't be easy, but if we can keep building a movement big enough to pressure the Senate to pass these transformative investments quickly — we will win. Chip in $3 or more now to help us keep up the fight for the full Build Back Better Act.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8689?refcode=em20211119-813&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=813%2E420207%2EbadeDH)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211119-813-footer&t=22&refcode2=813_420207_badeDH&akid=813%2E420207%2EbadeDH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Sign my petition: say you believe New York State should have free, universal 3-K, Pre-K, after school programming and summer enrichment opportunities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future
body:
Tax the wealthy. Revolutionize public education. Good policy meets good politics.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803417/317124834/1246564788?refcode=em-logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=)
Team -
Today in New York City, nearly 70,000 children enjoy free full-day Pre-K as a universal right, and 40,000 more take part in 3-K across all 32 community school districts.
More than 150,000 middle and elementary school children have access to free, quality after school programming.
More than 200,000 children enrolled in our Summer Rising program that offers free, full-day summer education and enrichment for any child in grades K-12.
We revolutionized public education in this city to give every child a chance of success in life.
We did it to give working parents the flexibility to keep their jobs.
We did it because these investments are some of the best steps we can take to reduce inequality in our city.
Now it’s time to expand these programs to ALL of New York State. Add your name if you agree:
**[Sign my petition: say you believe New York State should have free, universal 3-K and Pre-K, after school programming and summer enrichment opportunities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803418/317124835/1793723400?source=em-211118-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=&emci=91a5e51a-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8766248b-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803419/317124836/1793723400?source=em-211118-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=&emci=91a5e51a-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8766248b-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)
I know some people will immediately say there is NO WAY this will ever happen in New York.
I heard the same thing before we did it in New York City.
They’ll say we can’t afford it.
But we can make the wealthiest among us pay their fair share to fund the investment.
They’ll say it’s too complicated.
But we did it in NYC, the largest and most diverse city in America.
Because here is the truth:
Research tells us that there is no more important time in a child’s social and educational development than their early years.
It tells us that for every $1 invested in early education, taxpayers save around $13 long-term.
It tells us that when kids have reliable after school programming they’re less likely to commit crimes.
It tells us that there's a need — that hundreds of thousands of children would be enrolled in summer programs but they are either too expensive or unavailable.
And it tells us these programs are POPULAR with overwhelming support of Democrats, Republicans and Independents alike.
You know what else is popular? Making the wealthy pay their fair share.
A win-win. Tax the wealthy. Revolutionize public education. Good policy meets good politics.
Let’s make it happen.
**[Add your name if you agree New York State should have free, universal 3-K, Pre-K, after school programming and summer enrichment opportunities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803420/317124837/1793723400?source=em-211118-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=&emci=91a5e51a-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8766248b-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)**
New York can become the first state in the nation to offer a comprehensive education plan that offers universal 3-K, Pre-K, extended day and summer programming year round.
But only if you demand it.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803421/317124838/1793723400?source=em-211118-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=&emci=91a5e51a-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8766248b-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)

Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/91a5e51a-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/8766248b-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY2MjQ4Yi03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhTh5fvl4OJZkuT76pCDYxntLCNHqSQKnseJSxa29wo=&id=116643580), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

#
Peter,
**The fight to keep the Senate blue starts in Washington state.**
Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat in the next election -- but the latest polls show Republicans are gaining momentum as they fight for control of the Senate majority in 2022.
**[We’ve got a big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and your $5 donation will make a huge impact toward reaching our goal and defending the Democratic Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38803422/317125056/881441298?refcode=pm_em_211119_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDY5Y2ZhYy03MjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EE6ZFVjPOf8IwWKqBlJCLcP3KTJX5JfsKKG5r4AJmlM=)**

name: John Kovacs
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse found not guilty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm happy beyond words for Kyle and his family.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/df90243b742e31a4/f5058fea7dc36998c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
Fellow Conservative, The verdict is in – Kyle Rittenhouse, on trial for murder, has been found not guilty on all counts.

**Truth and justice prevailed today in Kenosha, Wisconsin. This was a clear case of self-defense, and I’m happy beyond words for Kyle and his family**.

The decision to bring charges in this case was 100% political. Interviews and video proved Kyle’s innocence – but he was charged anyway.

This young man went to Kenosha, Wisconsin, to help clean up graffiti and put out fires amid horrific and violent rioting in the summer of 2020.

When he was attacked and a weapon was pointed at him, he responded in self-defense.

All the evidence showed that he acted appropriately. Yet the media and the “woke” activist mob demanded he be charged with murder, and local prosecutors bowed to them. Kyle has been smeared as a “terrorist” and “white supremacist” with zero basis in fact.
---

Prosecutions driven by politics have no place in our country. We cannot allow our justice system to be weaponized by the radical left.

**We MUST take back America in 2022, and I’m counting on your help here in Nevada’s Third Congressional District**.

body:
It is with great excitement that my colleagues and I passed the Build Back Better Act in the House.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38804067/317130547/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVhZjQ5NS03NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OOTTDD1FGc8ZMMX7aQMHH8Rj5aBpt0s_tnAvMiZkhw=)
---
| Friend,

I was so proud to stand with President Biden earlier this week as he signed the historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal, or BIF, into law. **And today, it is with great excitement that my colleagues and I passed the Build Back Better Act in the House.**

The BBB will affect the lives of millions of American families and workers. I’m particularly excited that we were able to push for historic investments in child care and universal pre-k.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38804068/317130548/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVhZjQ5NS03NTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OOTTDD1FGc8ZMMX7aQMHH8Rj5aBpt0s_tnAvMiZkhw=)
The Build Back Better Act lowers costs for the American people on child care, elder care, prescription drugs and health care; invests in housing that is affordable; fights child poverty; and combats climate change. **And I know that this kind of unprecedented legislation is only possible with a Democratic majority in Congress.**

As we look ahead to the 2022 midterm elections, I hope I can count on you to stand with me so I can stay in office and continue this vital work for American families. clean_body: It is with great excitement that my colleagues and I passed the Build Back Better Act in the House. | = | Friend, I was so proud to stand with President Biden earlier this week as he signed the historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal, or BIF, into law. And today, it is with great excitement that my colleagues and I passed the Build Back Better Act in the House. The BBB will affect the lives of millions of American families and workers. I’m particularly excited that we were able to push for historic investments in child care and universal pre-k. = The Build Back Better Act lowers costs for the American people on child care, elder care, prescription drugs and health care; invests in housing that is affordable; fights child poverty; and combats climate change. And I know that this kind of unprecedented legislation is only possible with a Democratic majority in Congress. As we look ahead to the 2022 midterm elections, I hope I can count on you to stand with me so I can stay in office and continue this vital work for American families. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you can spare towards my re-election campaign means so much to my team and me. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Gross Incompetence! 😡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings. And now Michigan residents pay the price. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

The gross incompetence of the Whitmer administration has been on full display in recent weeks.

>From the botched response to the Benton Harbor water crisis to the latest unemployment benefit fiasco, this hasn’t been a good stretch for Governor Whitmer.

In Benton Harbor, the _**Governor ignored the scientific evidence and the pleas of the community**_. For three years she did virtually nothing to help Benton Harbor residents suffering with overly contaminated water. It wasn’t until a request was filed for intervention by the Environmental Protection Agency that the Governor finally pulled her head out of the sand.

She belatedly issued an executive order vowing to replace pipes within 18 months. While that action was necessary and should be applauded, _it’s still very troubling why she would wait and delay when the situation was more dangerous than the Flint water crisis several years back._

**Was it callous disregard for a poorer community in the state, or just blatant incompetence?**

When I first learned of the water problems in Benton Harbor, _I immediately visited the community and volunteered along with local residents to distribute bottled water to the citizens_. I talked with those most impacted, and quite frankly, was appalled at the Governor’s inaction.

Residents hadn’t heard from or seen the Governor in their city. Instead, she quietly slipped into town under cover of darkness one night. No public appearances to reassure residents, just a secret visit that didn’t help the situation at all.

It’s also a sad fact that none of the other candidates for Governor visited Benton Harbor to help. There will be other Benton Harbors to deal with, and Michigan residents deserve a Governor who will be proactive – leading, not hiding. That’s what I bring to the table: _**leadership**_.

**$3.9 Billion Lost**

Then there is the $3.9 billion “error” by the Whitmer administration._A report from the Officer of the Auditor General documents that the state paid out “at least” $3.9 billion in unemployment claims to people who were not eligible to receive the payments, according to auditors._

And because it was the state’s mistake, **the money will never be recovered**.

$3.9 billion in taxpayer money lost because of bureaucratic incompetence. The auditors stated that Whitmer’s process allowed “individuals without any prior attachment to the workforce” to collect payments. That’s bureaucratic jargon for people who did not have jobs to begin with.

$3,900,000,000 is a mind-boggling number that most people can’t wrap their heads around. Think of it this way: **3.9 billion seconds is the equivalent of 123.67 years.**

_But to Governor Whitmer and her cronies, $3.9 billion is no big deal – it’s just an “error.” Our tax dollars are just play money to them. And that’s not right._

So how did this “error” happen?

Steve Gray, Unemployment Insurance Agency Director at the time, _warned the Whitmer administration_ of the risk in their plan to push out new benefits rapidly. In a slide deck presentation in April of 2020, Gray stated, “we have a choice between speed and overpayment risk.” The faster money was paid out, the more risk that they would be paying people who weren’t eligible to receive benefits.

The Whitmer administration chose speed over accuracy. The result was a $3.9 billion loss. Director Gray resigned, but _Whitmer bears the ultimate responsibility_.

As her new director stated recently, one of the causes of the error was “shifting nearly our entire staff to remote operations.”

**That’s right, Whitmer’s own administration is now saying the Governor’s forced “work at home” scheme was a cause of this huge error.**

The _U.S. Labor Department warned the Whitmer administration_ in June of 2020 of issues with the criteria Michigan was using. Whitmer ignored those warnings.

The audit also noted that the Unemployment Insurance Agency “continued to include the four unauthorized eligibility criteria on its forms and sent conflicting documentation” to the U.S. Department of Labor.

The UIA now says it has corrected eight of the eleven findings from a January review, but the audit concluded the agency’s efforts were “not effective.” More disturbing, the audit found that there was an inappropriate “tone at the top” regarding internal controls and delays in corrective action.

**The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings.
**
Whitmer _ignored the warnings_ in Benton Harbor.

Whitmer _ignored the warning_ of her former UIA director.

Whitmer _ignored the warning_ of the U.S. Department of Labor.

And now Michigan residents pay the price.

It’s time to Dump Whitmer. Michigan deserves better.

Please join my campaign and together let's Dump Whitmer.

[Your generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or any amount will help us take back Michigan from the radical left.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=c1e35fe987&e=0636b97700)

Please make your most generous contribution today, and if you are able, please [volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ea602e4b1d&e=0636b97700) to help too!

We need all hands on deck.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
_Conservative for Governor_

name: Roger Misso
subject: With liberty and justice for all? Really?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/RNsNlNRTW82O4ADTbe-BkS-sTBJJOrskB0HN-_GlmZI=)

Peter,

The verdict in the Kyle Rittenhouse trial is in: not guilty. Many across our country are feeling pain at the result of this very public, very questionable legal proceeding.

It signals how much further we must go to live up to the ideals of our nation - ideals like [_**" liberty and justice for all."**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/H0tm6aHesfcA6CnBRbtpaJAMJamxgva0X1lcLmCZInw=)

It also signals something else: [_**elections matter.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/H0tm6aHesfcA6CnBRbtpaJAMJamxgva0X1lcLmCZInw=)

From judges and district attorneys to members of Congress, [_**we cannot take a seat for granted.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/H0tm6aHesfcA6CnBRbtpaJAMJamxgva0X1lcLmCZInw=) Because when the wrong person gets ahold of the public trust, they can undermine the values of our nation. When they make justice for some, but not for all, they harm the democratic foundation of our republic.

That's why we work to mentor, support, and elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. And as we contemplate today's news, [_**we invite you to join us in our mission.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/H0tm6aHesfcA6CnBRbtpaJAMJamxgva0X1lcLmCZInw=)

If we are to be a nation that guarantees liberty and justice for all, [_**we have to elect honorable leaders who will make it so.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NqnrgZ1Ki8nafBLr3vOXQtUIZ0SylKELOhvgX7GQ5do=/H0tm6aHesfcA6CnBRbtpaJAMJamxgva0X1lcLmCZInw=)

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director, Taking the Hill PAC_

That's why we work to mentor, support, and elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. And as we contemplate today's news, = If we are to be a nation that guarantees liberty and justice for all, = In solidarity, Roger Roger Misso Executive Director, Taking the Hill PAC = To make a contribution, = "=". Friend,
---
**_Steve Bannon was just INDICTED on bogus charges of ‘criminal contempt of Congress.’_**

name: Team Rosen
subject: What's on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Senator Rosen needs your input:
#
Team,
We’ve celebrated some big victories for the American people in the Senate this year, like passing the American Rescue Plan and President Biden’s historic infrastructure deal.
Senate Democrats have been focused on beating this pandemic and helping working families and small businesses come back even stronger than before. **Now, Senator Rosen needs your input:**
**[Take the 2-minute survey now and tell Jacky what fights are important to you in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38804238/317131315/-296559967?ms=jr_em_nd_211119_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_211119_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTliOTFjMS03NjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2GQhS-QB4VCCN93iOI3q9VMStcSjzGspv3np5k9y8=&emci=475e6257-8c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5a9b91c1-7649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3800590)**
We aren’t finished making progress. But there are so many issues that are top of mind, from tackling climate change to addressing income inequality to safeguarding women’s rights. That’s why it’s so important that you make your voice heard about our future fights.

Team Rosen

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: BREAKING: The House just passed the Build Back Better Act. Here's what's next:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The Senate must pass this bill.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4008?t=3&akid=12899%2E53494%2EymOUKq) Friend, **The House just passed the Build Back Better Act, the most significant investment in climate action in U.S. history.** Now, we're one step closer to staving off the worst impacts of the climate crisis and fulfilling the climate promises that Biden ran and won on. **Now, the Senate must pass the bill and send it to Biden's desk without delay.** [**_Will you sign our petition calling on Senate Democrats to finish the job? After you sign, we'll give you a chance to double your impact and call your senators directly to make sure they get the message!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4008?t=4&akid=12899%2E53494%2EymOUKq) | [FINISH THE JOB](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4008?t=5&akid=12899%2E53494%2EymOUKq)
---
Historic investments. Millions of good jobs building the clean energy economy. Environmental justice. Pollution reductions. Clean energy tax incentives. Civilian Climate Corps. Clean Energy Accelerator. When we say this bill contains transformational climate action, we mean it.
I really need to emphasize this: If passed, this will be a huge victory for climate champions across the movement and in Congress who've been fighting for this for years. (Today's vote is already a huge victory for this community. In no small part due to our recent organizing campaign targeting conservative House Democrats, which many of you participated in, all but one—Jared Golden (ME-02)—voted for this bill!) This bill is an essential investment toward President Biden's goal of cutting climate pollution in half over the coming decade and avoiding the worst impacts of this crisis.
**But we're not in the clear yet: Senate Democrats must pass the Build Back Better Act ASAP, and we need to make sure our senators are hearing from us directly.** [**_Add your name right now to urge Senate Democrats to pass the Build Back Better Act—with its bold climate investments—ASAP. Then, we'll give you a chance to call your senators directly. (It's quick and easy. We'll even give you a script!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4008?t=6&akid=12899%2E53494%2EymOUKq)
This is our moment. Let's get this passed and then keep building toward a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future together.
Onward,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4008?t=7&akid=12899%2E53494%2EymOUKq)
---

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Will you share your thoughts?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We've put together a brief priorities survey to learn more about what you're looking to see from this campaign.
#
The truth is this campaign is about so much more than just one person. **It's about all of us, joining together and stepping up to build a bigger, bolder vision for Texas.**
To elect Beto as governor and defeat Greg Abbott, we'll need to form a coalition the likes of which Texas has never seen before — Democrats, Independents, Republicans, and first-time voters.
That's why we've put together a brief priorities survey to learn more about what you're looking to see from this campaign. Listening to you and all Texans is how Beto and our team make decisions about what to prioritize in our campaign and how to allocate the budget.
[So, will you take a few seconds to tell us your thoughts?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/nov-campaign-priorities-survey/?source=em20211119&t=1&akid=163093%2E444211%2EZPTddF)
**[Start the survey »](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/nov-campaign-priorities-survey/?source=em20211119&t=2&akid=163093%2E444211%2EZPTddF)**
If there's one thing we know about Beto, it's that he loves talking and listening with everyone he meets. Beto truly believes that listening to people's concerns and responding with action is what being a good leader is all about.
[Please, take a moment to fill out our survey. Then, forward this email to any friends and family who might be interested.](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/nov-campaign-priorities-survey/?source=em20211119&t=3&akid=163093%2E444211%2EZPTddF)
It's important to Beto to hear your perspective.
Looking forward to reading your responses,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211119-163093-footer&t=4&refcode2=163093_444211_ZPTddF&akid=163093%2E444211%2EZPTddF)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

| | | **Democrats in the House just passed President Biden’s Build Back Better Act!** This bill is a historic investment in our communities -- it will expand Medicare, lower housing costs, invest in clean energy, and more. This progressive bill is exactly what our country needs right now -- but as it heads to the Senate, its fate hangs in the balance. Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema have voiced their opposition to Biden’s revolutionary plan, and with a 50-50 split in the Senate, we need them on board. If Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema don’t support the progressive Build Back Better Act, President Biden’s agenda and everything we’ve fought for will unravel. We need to dial up the public pressure and convince them to do the right thing. [Sign the petition to tell Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to stop blocking progress and pass the Build Back Better Act >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88e69b33-6d22-4f77-82aa-aec928c3c54f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Team -- President Biden's new bipartisan infrastructure law is a CRITICAL step in America’s recovery -- providing BILLIONS of dollars to fix our roads and bridges, fight climate change, and so much more.

This is HUGE progress after years of empty promises from Republicans and **_failure_** by Donald Trump.

**Now, a brand-new poll says 65% of Americans APPROVE of President Biden's new law -- but we need to confirm these numbers internally before midnight tonight, and we’re counting on YOU to weigh in.**

**Tell us: Do you approve of President Biden’s new infrastructure law?**

body:
