Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2w64f--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Official Message From The Chairman Of The Republican National Committee
---
**FORMAL NOTICE FROM REPUBLICAN HQ:**
A FEW MORE SPOTS JUST OPENED TO BECOME A TOP TRUMP PATRIOT
* * *
Hello Fellow Conservative,
President Donald J. Trump just sent out a clear directive to Conservatives everywhere: we must win back the House for the American People.
I'm taking his call to action with the utmost seriousness. I certainly hope you do too.
[**Consider this your formal notice directly from Republican Headquarters: the next American Patriots to answer his call and respond to this email will be added to the list of TOP PATRIOTS.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w64f-1lmdi-4qqlpo3/)
**I managed to reserve a spot specifically for you. You have from RIGHT NOW until midnight to claim it. After that, we'll be forced to move on!**
This is your formal notice: I reserved your spot under the following email: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w64f-1lmdj-4qqlpo4/) \-- please claim it before tonight.
[**But if you believe in President Trump’s vision for the future of America, now is your chance to go on the record. We’ll list you as a TOP PATRIOT if you step up right now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2w64f-1lmdk-4qqlpo5/)
Sincerely,
Ronna McDaniel
Chairman of The Republican National Committee

subject: Happy Birthday, Dr. Jensen!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
We need your support. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/37da14251980/happy-birthday-dr-jensen?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Today is Dr. Jensen's birthday! We're so glad he's taking some time to celebrate and be with his wife Mary today. You know he's been working hard out on the campaign trail - sharing his message of Safe Streets, Focus on Students, Science (NOT Political Science), and Secure Elections with Minnesotans! He is proving that he's a Republican who can win statewide with that message.

Let's surprise Dr. Jensen today with some birthday contributions! In fact, he doesn't even know I'm writing this email to you. Any amount helps - and I know he'd be so humbled to receive campaign donations on his birthday. It will help fuel us to victory!

[Give $11.19 today](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e63ef35703&e=33b11688c1) (Dr. Jensen's birthdate) [or more](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=1a4d12b5aa&e=33b11688c1)!

Your contributions will help us continue to take our message of freedom, healing and hope across the state! Thank you for your support, and don't forget to wish Dr. Jensen a [Happy Birthday](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f219f1ed6a&e=33b11688c1)!

-Angela Cooperman
Campaign Manager
Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor

clean_body: We need your support. | | | | | | | Peter, Today is Dr. Jensen's birthday! We're so glad he's taking some time to celebrate and be with his wife Mary today. You know he's been working hard out on the campaign trail - sharing his message of Safe Streets, Focus on Students, Science (NOT Political Science), and Secure Elections with Minnesotans! He is proving that he's a Republican who can win statewide with that message. Let's surprise Dr. Jensen today with some birthday contributions! In fact, he doesn't even know I'm writing this email to you. Any amount helps - and I know he'd be so humbled to receive campaign donations on his birthday. It will help fuel us to victory! (Dr. Jensen's birthdate) ! Your contributions will help us continue to take our message of freedom, healing and hope across the state! Thank you for your support, and don't forget to wish Dr. Jensen a ! -Angela Cooperman Campaign Manager Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. body:
As of 9:00 AM, we DO NOT have a response from you. So I'm touching base one last time...
Hi Friend --
This is Jordan from Republican Headquarters. I heard my colleague, Sarah, reached out to you a few times. name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: BREAKING: The House passed the Build Back Better Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Earlier this week, Kim joined President Biden at the White House for the signing of the historic bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. This bill will make great progress for our nation by investing in our infrastructure, creating new jobs, and more -- but Kim isn't stopping there. | **BREAKING: "House passes Biden’s Build Back Better bill, sending measure with free preschool, climate initiatives to the Senate"
\-- _USA Today_ **
---
Peter,

Earlier this week, Kim joined President Biden at the White House for the signing of the historic bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. This bill will make great progress for our nation by investing in our infrastructure, creating new jobs, and more -- but Kim isn't stopping there.

**This morning, Kim voted to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. This is another critical piece of legislation that will:**

✅ Lower prescription drug costs;
✅ Expand access to free, high-quality Pre-K;
✅ Extend the Child Tax Credit;
✅ Provide paid family and medical leave;
✅ Invest in childcare and home health care;
✅ Cap ACA health insurance premiums;
✅ Address the urgent threat of climate change;
✅ Invest in forest management;
✅ And more!

As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows this legislation is a historic investment in middle class families. The Build Back Better agenda is exactly what Kim promised to accomplish when she was first sent to Congress.

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Honoring Transgender Awareness Week🏳️‍⚧️
body:
I stand in solidarity with the trans community in Maryland - not just this week, but every week. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlhvYlzlcGeKI0osoL0os7kn2j3DZXAvIqSd5Yqpd_W75THv1WuKC3q-av4VS_CxJwQGo8HJRKulHKkt914UrWIVJ_d1irkpXHppYc_G-bXbufpMJzSqSyvisPejTrkTxRvh-TfZE--6zCmea-bNpRpX8e58XvUT7cV49W4L69URrd0XtMVlDqQ5JM7a74abRwo4JDBbtnA0OFXCXSnge90ukhBGN2zdNjuU22MKaCvWKLEfaVNlfTEOJ0AThj6ZrjJEYloV5-_8IB8w1sMFRDA/3h5/VigO_mRtTD2cZ9R36rV45w/h0/xPeSYNmsTNRC4mXifPz_rK9w_y_G5zMf-LdSbqZTmTg)
---
Hi friends,
---
In honor of Transgender Awareness Week,**** I wanted to take a moment to say that **I stand with the transgender community,****and reiterate my promise to fight for every****Marylander's****right to be treated with respect.** No one should be discriminated against or denied opportunities simply for being their true and authentic selves. Unfortunately, that is not reality and many trans and gender non-conforming people continue to face prejudice and violence. 2021 has been the most deadly year for trans people in recorded history. At least 46 trans people have been killed - the majority of these people were Black and Latinx transgender women.**** Two of these 46 were killed in our own state of Maryland. Let us take a moment to think about those who were lost and the families and loved ones they leave behind. **We, as a society, must commit to doing better.** This week is a time of reflection and action for allies of the trans community. So today, I'm reaffirming my commitment to the trans and LGBTQ+ community as a whole. **If elected Governor, you have an ally in me.** I promise to defend the rights of all Marylanders to live free from violence and discrimination and will make sure to protect and defend trans lives. If you're with me, like and share my posts about Transgender Awareness Week on your social media to spread the word.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlhvYlzlcGeKI0osoL0os7kn2j3DZXAvIqSd5Yqpd_W75THv1WuKC3q-av4VS_CxJwQGo8HJRKulHKkt914UrWJHEmLSMvhLmquh3N54jGidRTLpx1t5jygvCPdSdK6gPZJvRfWIB_fJYRXy5HSK58SqYUBNylF8pC5OTaycR_BzynPk8U93JImP0siG0WbLScvKBq1ymaX56D-abTc0a8hdbeg087Vv8ypH_y5zQh8BVW9O7c_uPSqq0XcqdUL96MyJWXHqtJX6B5U1uROJn0I/3h5/VigO_mRtTD2cZ9R36rV45w/h1/7OjstuqurFu75Lb6_oLHv_NQ7HQn_10cBVI2tgM7IZ8)
---
[ **RETWEET AND LIKE ON TWITTER ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlhvYlzlcGeKI0osoL0os7kn2j3DZXAvIqSd5Yqpd_W75THv1WuKC3q-av4VS_CxJwQGo8HJRKulHKkt914UrWKkwbHC9D4YQxIvlT21EYCpbmgRIZikbIdpQsTTiFcVxB8Zr3vuCX0k8F-1WyR3fIcGzhHz45zW0mIVK4YQBTCG_UnkcKEKTj6pXJej0wQVDXBrz9fzYf0g-9nbMyn8lgPD8WJ4mPrpyCxXr4RVspJUhkhE3dbGxAxL2pMeUKfibl9yKBshgy7YIBq9up-4LTQ/3h5/VigO_mRtTD2cZ9R36rV45w/h2/K2IfH4uTHZt8CD0cd6JaK3FORjljxxcZSKf4BlBwwjk)
---
[ **SHARE AND LIKE ON FACEBOOK ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PNCse__agGx-rgkx4CU12f68UQCMEHVha_1UwiLfvGlnj8n1sDUIixTbJOC6i-LN0mY1ypVprQWj7ImuZPjYz9Q8oKIGrzVrvYDi4tvdO9Et72L6SOofeQrXyqVbp2t2KEK_c4prvwyRSAG0P0iCTql91rdY2_4NPOYU3JfdGzMu-PSN2X6li2mP7p3AzDjiermS4SrrSl5_XZ0brxmv6g7MxuzhYPbF7PXS5T1VutNY/3h5/VigO_mRtTD2cZ9R36rV45w/h3/W2mDnjXzTHFrn0qP-NurRvJN6fijoJYSVrXyFc90dL4)
---
I stand in solidarity with the trans and gender non-conforming community in Maryland - not just this week, but every week. **I have been honored to fight for your rights and safety in the past and I will continue to do so as Governor.**
---
Thank you, Doug
---

clean_body: I stand in solidarity with the trans community in Maryland - not just this week, but every week. | | Hi friends, In honor of Transgender Awareness Week,** I wanted to take a moment to say that I stand with the transgender community,**and reiterate my promise to fight for everyMarylander'sright to be treated with respect. No one should be discriminated against or denied opportunities simply for being their true and authentic selves. Unfortunately, that is not reality and many trans and gender non-conforming people continue to face prejudice and violence. 2021 has been the most deadly year for trans people in recorded history. At least 46 trans people have been killed - the majority of these people were Black and Latinx transgender women.** Two of these 46 were killed in our own state of Maryland. Let us take a moment to think about those who were lost and the families and loved ones they leave behind. We, as a society, must commit to doing better. This week is a time of reflection and action for allies of the trans community. So today, I'm reaffirming my commitment to the trans and LGBTQ+ community as a whole. If elected Governor, you have an ally in me. I promise to defend the rights of all Marylanders to live free from violence and discrimination and will make sure to protect and defend trans lives. If you're with me, like and share my posts about Transgender Awareness Week on your social media to spread the word. | I stand in solidarity with the trans and gender non-conforming community in Maryland - not just this week, but every week. I have been honored to fight for your rights and safety in the past and I will continue to do so as Governor.** Thank you, Doug By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Friend, you're one of my most dedicated supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I've been so grateful to have dedicated grassroots supporters like you
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805439/317137140/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRae09qeaaL9XE1oWTPEQyIveSqjQWx4cERkRHK3me0=)

Peter,

I've been so grateful to have dedicated grassroots supporters like you by my side as I've embarked on my reelection campaign over these past few months. **We're off to a strong start – but I need your sustained support to show the GOP that our state is not up for grabs.**
**[We can't lose our momentum for even one moment, Peter, or my Republican challengers could gain ground. Will you donate $5 today to help me reach my $150,000 end-of-month goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805440/317137141/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRae09qeaaL9XE1oWTPEQyIveSqjQWx4cERkRHK3me0=)**
It's been the honor of a lifetime to lead our grassroots movement as governor of our great state – and we've already accomplished so much together. **In just two short years, we've:**
* **Saved lives from the COVID-19 pandemic** by responding to the crisis early and implementing one of the most successful vaccine rollouts in the country.
* **Put money into the pockets of struggling families** by overhauling tax laws and raising the minimum wage.
* **Invested in small businesses and created jobs **by providing pandemic relief to small businesses and legalizing cannabis, which will bring a burgeoning industry to our state.
* **Strengthened public education** through our education moonshot by raising teacher pay and expanding access to early childhood education.

Your grassroots support has helped our movement accomplish all of this and so much more – but the Republican Party is pushing harder than ever to wipe away all of our progress. We need to keep New Mexico blue to continue our bold agenda, and the only way to do that is to hit our fundraising goals every step of the way.
**Because of a special legislative session, I won't be able to fundraise _at all_ from early December to all the way through February, so I need your help to raise $150,000 to power me through to the new year. It's my most ambitious goal yet, but I know this team has the power to move mountains if everyone lends a hand.**
**[Peter, if we don't hit our $150,000 goal, then my resources will dry up before the new year, so I need your help today: Will you contribute $5 – or whatever you can afford – to keep New Mexico blue and support Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805441/317137142/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRae09qeaaL9XE1oWTPEQyIveSqjQWx4cERkRHK3me0=)**
Thank you for joining our grassroots movement, Peter. New Mexico needs people like you who are dedicated to creating a brighter future for our state.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805442/317137143/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRae09qeaaL9XE1oWTPEQyIveSqjQWx4cERkRHK3me0=)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: My grandfather taught me I have a seat at the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805443/317137145/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU92gEBFyvYX45bXLfvb7Zv4_6bD0NkpI4mAoZFswQg=)
Peter: In a week when many of us will be sitting around kitchen tables with our families, I’m reminded of my own seat at my grandparents' kitchen table that shaped me, from a very early age. My upbringing is important to why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA), so I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain.
Like many of you, I come from a family with a wide range of political beliefs. I had a Democratic grandfather, a Republican uncle, a Democratic uncle and plenty of family members who found themselves somewhere in between the two parties (or totally sick of them both!). But still, we'd come together around the dinner table as a family to talk about what was going on in the world. We got into heated debates – but we'd always end the night with hugs and an "I love you."
**Now, I'm fighting for my seat at the table once again – this time to raise up the voices of working families like my own. You see, my opponent, Sen. Grassley (R-IA), failed those families. **He's turned his back on Iowans, defended Donald Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories, eagerly accepted Trump's endorsement and advanced far-right ideologies that are just plain wrong. **It's time for new leadership – and 64% of Iowans agree with me.**
**Some people will tell me that it's not my place to challenge a man who's been a senator since before I was born, but my family taught me otherwise.[So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to help me win a seat at the table. That's why I'm asking you to donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – to help me defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and fight for for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805444/317137146/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU92gEBFyvYX45bXLfvb7Zv4_6bD0NkpI4mAoZFswQg=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805445/317137147/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVmNDU1OS03YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU92gEBFyvYX45bXLfvb7Zv4_6bD0NkpI4mAoZFswQg=)

Thank you for being by my side in this fight.

– Abby

Fellow Conservative,

My opponent, Abigail Spanberger, fashions herself as a “moderate Democrat,” and recently said to a press outlet that “ _**nobody elected Joe Biden to be FDR**_.”

She talk’s a good game, but then just this morning she voted for the biggest expansion of government since the 1960s.

Turns out that politicians can be bought and this one in particular has no backbone.

**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805614/317137958/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1721-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWNmYWMwYy03ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NgqrXl2kuwHky-zokPP6jsVnT8o8RFUcwxmfqADr0_Q=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline – to elect Val Demings and defend Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805615/317137959/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1721-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWNmYWMwYy03ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NgqrXl2kuwHky-zokPP6jsVnT8o8RFUcwxmfqADr0_Q=)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: If it weren’t for the Squad...
body:
Progressives have never wielded this much power in Congress and used it to protect policies that will help the people and the environment.
#
Peter,
The Build Back Better Act just passed the House! Without our Justice Democrats fighting in Congress, progressive priorities would have been cut from this bill.
We only have things like Medicare expansion, paid family and medical leave, universal pre-K, and action on climate change in this bill because of the Squad, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Pramila Jayapal, and our other Justice Democrats in Congress. Progressives have never wielded this much power in Congress to protect policies that will help the people and the environment.
But this is only a big first step, Peter.
**Now,** we need to continue our pressure on conservative Democrats in the Senate to protect progressive policies in this big bill.
**THEN,** we need to elect more Justice Democrats to Congress so we can pass Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. We must transform the Democratic Party so we have a majority willing to pass single-payer health care and the drastic action we need to address the climate crisis.
[Can you step up today to help us continue our momentum? Donate $3 right now to fuel our work to protect our progressive priorities in the Build Back Better Act AND expand the Squad so we can pass even bigger policies, like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84416?refcode=em20211119-20568&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=20568%2E1203867%2EPt5X5r)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84416?refcode=em20211119-20568&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20568%2E1203867%2EPt5X5r)**
We have a slate of five progressives running against the Democratic establishment in 2022: Jessica Cisneros, Odessa Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, and Summer Lee. They all support Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and our full fight for the people.
This win in the U.S. House wouldn’t have happened without Justice Democrats in Congress holding the line. We won’t stop fighting, and we need you there with us the whole way.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=20568%2E1203867%2EPt5X5r) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=20568%2E1203867%2EPt5X5r) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211119-20568-footer&t=23&refcode2=20568_1203867_Pt5X5r&akid=20568%2E1203867%2EPt5X5r)**
---

---
| Peter,
---
| Perhaps America isn't lost after all...
Kyle Rittenhouse (a future Team Gaetz intern?) never deserved the slander that the radical Left, the RINOs, and the Fake News put him through. At the very least he deserved a not guilty verdict, and now, thankfully, justice has prevailed!
The BLM Mob that burned Kenosha and cities across the country was rooting for the Second Amendment and the right to self-defense to lose today... But these lawless thugs and the media propagandists who cheered them on were the ones who ended up taking the L instead.
As someone who's also been a popular target of the Fake News, I hope Kyle gets his due for all of the attacks and smears!
---
| | | [STAND STRONG AGAINST THE MOB](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byy7SofENZ3k-Q18Z-cuXFsmfuhqe6xNQbgbd539jKYRcAXc48FtfcxEoxknQ3WQmssaAIA_C8BsY7-w2Vcue0sGH1XPvgW5VXWgpPCHcbd0d65A7HdUWzIzXK7IH5VbewlHXzGxIEuoPRS6meyqEn8pExX11bqBUXH_VnMK0aLlEnc1VWtCbQ==&c=USidCBT4gIiwqMWKHFoc51dn-16glI3lmuppucGjhrx5_feFUINwGg==&ch=9hYAlKIObunXAwwEkW2Hf-TlpBXaLS7S7hBgFmEivhv8ooYgq9L8aQ==)

| But Kyle and anyone who believes in the rule of law aren't out of the woods yet...
The propagandists and Democrat politicians are CONTINUING to attack this kid even though he was literally just acquitted in a court of law \- House Judiciary Chairman Jerry Nadler is even calling for the DOJ to continue tormenting him!

body:
Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z721qh5prj3vumk5mbo1trcubnt5a16c42hb0cvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe8o32m3g6acdgsormdd72mjij3cb6eso74shhetij2t9k63gn6c9he2qmbdr7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj30t5lmdg74cb66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjmcpb3cli62oh5u)
|

**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Fellow Conservative,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc5fgaksnq36fguorvobm22q1akp1m39b6vtu728_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. Please chip in $5, $10, $34 or even $100 right now.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze9velrdop76s58stlj2o1qh3ga596nl0gktpfq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)**

[**Chip in $10 ->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9ngfemqmcd1bkhdjecih5559q5dc9m2aqjm5m3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)

[**Chip in $50 ->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51ojnic3hf3a1q2cbleu2cqotq8n4geedvc27e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)
[**Chip in _MORE_ ->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9kuuuhv75utnb2fnnnqf5l0pbjrvfqhfs80vbrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)
My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game.

While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment.

Thank you,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi1qctup73akakklo9fpfneqc54l006monl7qbb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim6pb4c5h2bs)

clean_body: | Peter, Here's the deal about Christy: When it comes to fighting climate change and making sure Californians are safe from devastating wildfires and droughts -- you're going to want her in the room. When it comes to making sure someone is standing up for reproductive rights -- you're going to want her in the room. When voting rights are under attack and our democracy is being threatened -- you're going to want her in the room To put it simply, when it comes to big decisions for CA-25, you're going to want Christy in the room. = = = At this very moment, some of the biggest policy decisions in Congress are being made. And the wrong person is in the room, just look at Mike's vote today on Build Back Better. Mike Garcia only has two goals in Congress: 1. further his own personal political ambition and 2. abide by the tenets of Trumpism. That's not real leadership. And like you, we are sick and tired of Mike Garcia throwing CA-25 under the bus. = Thank you so much for standing up to and getting the right person in the room. \--Team Christy = = *

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805929/317139545/-911644977?amount=10&&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_21119_1_1&refcode2=12ddb0b2-7f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRkYjBiMi03ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Egq8Df-iBP6zlZd2vHllVy7jnRQXyNn7ri1PsYFow=)

| | Folks,

After months of deliberation, the House of Representatives has passed President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda! I voted for the bill for a few simple reasons. I believe working families should be able to afford health care and child care for their kids. I believe that Medicare should be able to negotiate lower drug prices for our seniors. I want the middle class to get tax breaks, and big corporations like Amazon to actually pay taxes. I want America to lead the world to clean energy. And I want the American people to see their government working for them again.

While we still have work to do in the Senate, I’m optimistic that we will send a bill to President Biden’s desk that keeps the promises I made when I first ran for Congress. And all this is thanks to you — your work to elect our narrow majorities in the Congress is what made it possible.

[Add your name right away to help us celebrate our success and to press the Senate to move the Build Back Better agenda forward. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805930/317139546/1387825954?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_21119_1_1&refcode2=12ddb0b2-7f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRkYjBiMi03ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Egq8Df-iBP6zlZd2vHllVy7jnRQXyNn7ri1PsYFow=&emci=e160d42a-7e49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=12ddb0b2-7f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19214294)
[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38805931/317139547/1387825954?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_21119_1_1&refcode2=12ddb0b2-7f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRkYjBiMi03ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Egq8Df-iBP6zlZd2vHllVy7jnRQXyNn7ri1PsYFow=&emci=e160d42a-7e49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=12ddb0b2-7f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19214294)
I’m also proud to say that the Build Back Better bill we passed today includes a deal I helped negotiate that fully restores the SALT deduction for over 96% of taxpayers for 9 years. This is a huge win for homeowners in my district, and for every state in America where voters have chosen to pay for better schools and services with higher state and local taxes. We managed to do it in a way that won’t add to the deficit, cut other investments or raise other taxes.

I can’t wait to run a positive campaign in 2022 on the promises I have kept, and the work that must still be done. I hope you’re as happy as I am that our work together is paying off.

Thank you for being on this journey with us!

Tom Malinowski

name: David Palmer
subject: Two Systems of Justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Friends,

This afternoon, a jury in Kenosha, Wisconsin, not that far from where we live, found Kyle Rittenhouse not guilty on several charges. This seventeen-year-old traveled from our state of Illinois to Wisconsin, armed with an AR-15-style rifle to join in the unrest after a Kenosha police officer shot Jacob Blake, a Black man. It is not under debate that Rittenhouse then killed two people, and injured one other.

I’m extremely disappointed in this verdict. Clearly it was delivered because of extreme bias shown during this trial. Once again, we are showing that there is a great need to reduce all gun violence for all reasons. Once again, we are showing Black children across our nation that there is a different system of justice for Black and white children. This should never be the case. Justice is only justice if it is applied fairly for everyone. Laws need to be applied equally to everyone.

I know that you are likely having strong feelings following this verdict, and I hope that you will take the time you need to process this and find a way to demonstrate calm and unity in the face of a difficult and unjust result.

David Palmer
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on. Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/sqIEO42bkkSnOJ23w8ohrQ2] , or you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/282d796f-8049-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/fe232f8a-8049-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIzMmY4YS04MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OqVUAz2ocOja2HlQ-_p1ISk9vgJzAEXxriU6rkt_1g=&id=125088311 .Paid for by Palmer for Illinois

And I will **NEVER** sit by and let Republicans like these be the reason we lose the House.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | It’s official! President Biden and Indiana Democrats André Carson and Frank Mrvan have delivered major infrastructure investments for each of Indiana’s 92 counties. The historic Infrastructure and Jobs Act (Let’s call it The Jobs Act!), signed this past Monday, delivers a brighter future for our entire state. As we conclude our “Small Town, Indiana'' tour this week, we want to share once again what an extraordinary investment the Jobs Act is for Indiana:
* $7 billion to revitalize roads and bridges in Indiana’s 92 counties
* $680 million to improve public transportation systems for Indiana’s cities
* $100 million to expand broadband internet access
* $751 million to bring safe, clean drinking water to all Hoosiers
* $20 million to fight extreme weather events across Indiana
* $100 million to expand Indiana’s electric vehicle charging network

More details about the Jobs Act’s impact in our state can be found by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806235/317140908/-722644037?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). With the help of the Biden Administration, Indiana Democrats have fully funded our public schools, expanded broadband internet access, created thousands of good-paying jobs, started solving the state’s childcare crisis, and raised public school teacher pay. The Jobs Act is just the latest piece of legislation to push past the partisanship that has defined state politics to deliver for Hoosiers. As Indiana’s towns large and small begin to put these investments to work, Democrats are continuing to invest and deliver a brighter future for Indiana and its families. Further, Indiana Democrats will take this success on the road throughout 2022. We look forward to seeing you at future tour stops in the coming months.
Indiana Republicans have wasted no time in trying to denounce the American Rescue Plan and the Jobs Act as “socialism.” While some INGOP members like [Indiana House Speaker Todd Huston](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806236/317140909/1254511919?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) and [State Senator Mark Messmer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806237/317140910/1073456117?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) have been quick to celebrate the Democrats’ investments for Indiana, leaders such as [Senator Todd Young, Representative Jackie Walorski, and Representative Victoria Spartz](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806238/317140911/-237124388?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) have been quick to describe investments in clean water, roads and bridges, and broadband access as “socialism”. As a reminder: not one Indiana Republican voted for the Jobs Act or the American Rescue Plan. The INGOP is literally betting against Indiana’s future. Here’s how we know: [Sen. Todd Young even admitted that his “NO” vote wasn’t on behalf of Hoosiers but because of partisanship](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806239/317140912/922465292?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). The INGOP has demonstrated they prefer a form of extreme partisanship that divides Hoosier families and communities, promotes unnecessary (and factually false) culture wars, and a “NO” on issues they even campaign on across Indiana. They have become too extreme for Indiana and it’s on us to build up a big, broad, welcoming alternative for people.
Lastly, the Indiana Democratic Party announced this week its full support for legalizing recreational cannabis across the state. Legalizing marijuana in some form is already supported by about 80-percent of Hoosiers and is an opportunity to create good-paying jobs, strengthen Indiana’s ag and business communities, provide medicinal opportunities for Hoosier veterans and seniors, as well as to begin expunging criminal records for simple possession. Another 78-percent of Hoosiers agree that simple possession of cannabis should not be an arrestable offense. Democrats are calling on the Republican supermajority in the General Assembly to pass this “win-win” opportunity for Indiana this legislative session. But top GOP leaders such as[ Governor Eric Holcomb and House Speaker Todd Huston](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38806240/317140913/2036183770?FFF.11.19.21.=FFF.11.19.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzY0ZGUwZi04MTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQynqldddEtTNtwV-uu8ClKtId7kJWuCSM9QZfw1RVo=&emci=dea1e7b8-7749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4364de0f-8149-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) have come out against legalizing marijuana. Their partisanship comes as Indiana is lagging behind neighboring states like Michigan and Illinois, which have legalized recreational marijuana. Ohio currently has medicinal use and Kentucky is considering following suit. Let’s be clear: waiting for the federal government to act on marijuana legalization, like the INGOP insists on doing, is leaving Indiana’s farming, manufacturing, and small business economy behind on a real opportunity.

“Hoosiers have seen the impact that recreational and medicinal cannabis use has made on the states around us, and not only are they contributing to neighboring states’ economies, Indiana is on the verge of losing out altogether. The Republican supermajority at the statehouse is losing its economic common sense if they do not join Democrats this session in making this opportunity a winner for the Hoosier State in the upcoming election years,” said Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party.

The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
#### Intern Duties
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
#### Qualifications
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
#### Start/End Dates and Schedule
Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility.
* * *
#### How to Apply
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org).

The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org. Party Leader Trainings -Your Election Board Member and Protecting the Vote- Wednesday, December 1 | 6:00pm EDT \- Public Record Requests- Thursday, December 2 | 6:00pm EDT Join IDP and attorney Bill Groth for a training and toolkit on Public Record Requests. -County Party Delegates Tracker Training with Megan McCullough- Tuesday, January 11 | 7pm EDT -Candidate Training Series with Rust Belt Rising- What Makes Stories Effective with Paul at Rust Belt Rising Tuesday, December 7 | 7pm EDT Data Micro Training Series: Scripts with Megan McCullough Thursday, December 9 | 7pm EDT Using Values in Your Language with Paul at Rust Belt Rising Thursday, December 16 | 7pm EDT HOLIDAY BREAK -Data Micro Training Series: Call Lists & VPBs with Megan McCullough - Thursday, January 13 | 7pm EDT -Midwest Issues and How to Talk About Them with Paul at Rust Belt Rising - Tuesday, January 18 | 7pm EDT -Data Micro Training Series: Walk Lists & MiniVAN with Megan McCullough - Thursday, January 20 | 7pm EDT -Persuasion Messaging with Paul at Rust Belt Rising - Tuesday, January 27 | 7pm EDT -Lists & MiniVAN with Megan McCullough - Thursday, January 20 | 7pm EDT -Save the Date! National Democratic Training Committee (NDTC) Training- Saturday, January 29 (all day event in Indianapolis, Indiana) | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: No SALT, No Dice!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | We just passed Build Back Better in the House, including the critical SALT provisions!

Months ago, I said “No SALT, No Dice.” I stuck to my promise, and now hard-working families are seeing a real tax cut.

This bill passed today will make life more affordable for the families of New Jersey.

This is a tax cut for New Jersey families and a victory for hardworking Americans. This legislation will also lower prescription drug costs, get lead out of drinking water, make child care more affordable, fight climate change, and expand the school breakfast program.

[But our fight isn’t over. subject: New Poll: 32% of Americans believe Trump is their POTUS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Turn up the heat! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a269dbe7bb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark FInchem. I am the Trump-endorsed, Election Integrity, America first candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. _[With your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=181b8a7f44&e=44b8c466b0), I WILL be the next Secretary of State in Arizona. [We have the momentum, the grassroots support, and Arizona is desperate for a change.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=baff935c06&e=44b8c466b0)_

Arizona is the epicenter of what amounts to treasonous fraud which led to Joe Biden’s “Presidency.” Arizona is the epicenter of distrust in the American system under the Democrats.

**A distrust which the Democrats have baked into the fabric of every day America life.**

_Monmouth University released a poll demonstrating this black-and-white._

The headline of their article reads:
_GOP Belief in 2020 election fraud couples with fundamental distrust_
Gee, I wonder why...

This poll digs into one crucial fact. Americans DO NOT TRUST the Democrats. How could they? Every time the clock strikes 3 AM, they call in their nightly “miracle” to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. _It happened in 2020. It happened again in New Jersey._

Let’s look at a few key data points.

_“Fewer than half of all Americans believe the American system is ‘basically sound.’”_

Don’t get it twisted. “Sound” doesn’t meant competent or they agree with it. It simply means that there are basic processes in place which the government is capable of executing.

**Americans right now don’t even believe that!**

But let’s look at what the Liberal propagator of this poll had to say:

_“The increase of distrust in the American system appears to be linked to the persistence of ‘the big lie.’ The fact that this belief continues to get oxygen is having a serious, and potentially dangerous, impact on faith in our fundamental democratic processes,” – Patrick Murray, director of Monmouth University Polling Institute_

So, let’s get this right. Patrick Murray thinks the belief that there was fraud is a reason that people don’t trust the government. Well, he’s right about that. But he is categorically wrong if he thinks that nothing shady happened in 2020.

**In fact,_according to his own poll_ , 32% of those polled believe that Biden is President _only_ due to Fraud. A number likely much higher given Republicans notorious disdain for pollsters (who can blame them?)**

And this is the heart of the Left. One man thinking that 32% of Americans wrong when they claim fraud.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4f625d455b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **In court, sometimes all it takes is one good witness and enough evidence to convict.**

_We have countless witnesses, in countless states, with piles of evidence, with 32% of Americans seeing the fraud, and that is still not enough for the Liberals!_

**Talk about double standards...but this is Democracy at stake.**

Many of us have probably said to our children or have heard it said “if everyone jumps off a bridge would you do it?”

**Well for liberals like Patrick, this analogy is more apt:**

_If you see that the building is on fire, and everyone is saying the building is on fire, and you see the smoke, and everyone is leaving the building, why would you stay there?_

In this particular instance, the answer would probably be “I don’t like Trump, so I will just choose to disbelieve the evidence.”

**Folks, we see the smoke, we know there’s a fire, and tens of millions of Americans know that the Biden Presidency is not legitimate.**

_So, to the pollsters over at Monmouth I ask this: What did you expect?_

If you agree that President Trump should be our President, and we are witnessing the Fraud of a lifetime, I need your help to root it out. Right now, I am pushing for a critical Audit of Pima County, while developing high-security techniques in partnership with currency-grade authentication firms to protect our elections.

**I will bring the same work ethic and innovation to Secretary of State, where I will protect Arizona’s election. [Can you help my efforts with a generous donation?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=59fc0f3ab7&e=44b8c466b0)**

[**_Please help out with a rush donation of $50, $100, or $250 today!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ddd5774445&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=479b8421ac&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3ec1ddcee5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=adbafe084c&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

body:
On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln delivered the famous Gettysburg Address during the dedication of the Soldiers National Cemetery. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38806792/317143767/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyY2Q3MzBjLTg0NDktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UgMTFTRpStFhtX_KyARoU3fqmoNPkys64w7nM9t3L5o=&emci=4d662bbb-4e49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=42cd730c-8449-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Team,

On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln delivered the famous Gettysburg Address during the dedication of the Soldiers National Cemetery.

At the time, our nation was facing an unprecedented crisis. We were in the midst of a deadly Civil War that tested whether our country and our democracy "could long endure." Lincoln's words that day proved he was the leader our country needed to get through this difficult time.

But just last year, our country faced another devastating crisis as the COVID-19 pandemic began to sweep the nation and claim the lives of hundreds of thousands of Americans. Take a look at how differently Donald Trump handled tragedy: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38806793/317143768/-333269159?refcode=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyY2Q3MzBjLTg0NDktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UgMTFTRpStFhtX_KyARoU3fqmoNPkys64w7nM9t3L5o=) Both Trump and Lincoln were our nation's leaders during times of unprecedented crisis. Both saw hundreds of thousands of Americans die during their presidency -- with COVID-19 deaths officially surpassing the 750,000 killed during the Civil War. Yet while Lincoln delivered one of the most stirring speeches in honor of the lives lost, Trump simply said **"It is what it is."**

That's not real leadership.

**[We're working to ensure Trump -- or any of his cronies -- never lead our country again. Will you chip in $5 or more right away to help us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38806794/317143769/-333269159?refcode=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyY2Q3MzBjLTg0NDktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UgMTFTRpStFhtX_KyARoU3fqmoNPkys64w7nM9t3L5o=)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38806795/317143770/-333269159?refcode=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211119_gettys_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyY2Q3MzBjLTg0NDktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UgMTFTRpStFhtX_KyARoU3fqmoNPkys64w7nM9t3L5o=)

name: FLIP THE SENATE
subject: RE: Kyle Rittenhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Saving Arizona PAC
body:
Republicans *must* stand up for Kyle.
_Sponsored message_

Republicans *must* stand up for Kyle.
| Friend,
---
Only a few Republicans have the GUTS to stand up for Kyle Rittenhouse.
---
Blake Masters is one of them. He said, **_“There are those who stand up for Kyle Rittenhouse... and there are cowards.”_**
---
_That’s why both Tucker Carlson and President Trump have shown support for Blake as he fights to FLIP the 1 SEAT that will end Kamala’s Senate majority._
---
[**Please make a contribution to FLIP Arizona’s blue Senate seat, to end Kamala’s 50-50 majority, and to save America.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjpfe6iah6buk5ue1n19kjucs3e125p72h8vt0ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cpim9oj2cth2bs)

This landmark legislation will make unprecedented investments in job creation, health care expansion, lowering prescription drug prices, and action to combat the climate crisis. This truly a historic moment for the House of Representatives, President Biden, and the United States. This legislation will invest heavily in programs that will benefit ALL Montanans. **Yet Matt Rosendale decided, once again, to play politics by calling anything that benefits the American people "socialism" and voted against it.** It’s very disappointing, but unfortunately, not entirely surprising that Matt has voted against the people of Montana twice in one month. clean_body: BREAKING: US House of Representatives Passes President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. Matt Rosendale a “no” vote, once again. Team, Last night, the | | | - BREAKING: Team, The House of Representatives JUST passed President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. This landmark legislation will make unprecedented investments in job creation, health care expansion, lowering prescription drug prices, and action to combat the climate crisis. This truly a historic moment for the House of Representatives, President Biden, and the United States. This legislation will invest heavily in programs that will benefit ALL Montanans. Yet Matt Rosendale decided, once again, to play politics by calling anything that benefits the American people "socialism" and voted against it. It’s very disappointing, but unfortunately, not entirely surprising that Matt has voted against the people of Montana twice in one month. I promise, as your representative, I will always vote with you and your family in mind. name: Tom Nelson
subject: there is no place for vigilantism in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin
body:
# [#]There is no place for vigilantism in our country. Unfortunately, the verdict acquitting Kyle Rittenhouse sends a different message. It will encourage other misguided individuals fueled by extremist groups and media to perform similar acts.

There is no question that Anthony Huber and Joseph Rosenbaum would still be alive had Mr. Rittenhouse not been present in Kenosha. The fact that Kyle Rittenhouse has become a hero to the extreme nationalists in our country is both disheartening and dangerous. This verdict will only empower them.

Regardless of political beliefs, we, as Americans, cannot tolerate violent action by citizens against others exercising their right to assemble.

When a lawful assembly gets out of control, it is the job of law enforcement and other local and state authorities to deal with it in a controlled and trained manner. The idea that any armed individual can insert themselves into a law enforcement scenario is a danger to our citizens, law enforcement, and our National Guard.

— Tom
VOLUNTEER » [https://go.nelsonforwi.com/a/pledge-to-volunteer]
Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. name: TheFairnessProject.com
subject: Divorcing partisan politics and putting power in the hands of voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
What you missed on Kelly’s Cheddar interview >> | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807466/317146664/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=&emci=a534c191-7249-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1b252feb-8749-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | **_“If we can win Medicaid expansion in Oklahoma, we can win on these issues anywhere.”_** Hey there! Last week, our Executive Director, Kelly Hall talked with Cheddar Politics about our recent 2021 ballot measure victories and how we’ve been able to secure a 23/24 winning record. _The answer? _ Ballot measures allow voters across the country to divorce issues often coined as “progressive” from partisan politics and ideologies and take the power into their own hands to create the changes they want to see in their communities. We’re preparing our legislative agenda for 2022, but before announcing the campaigns we’re fighting for in the midterms, we want to know how strong national support is for the ballot measure process. [_**Will you take our 1-click poll to let us know: Do you believe ballot measures are a powerful tool to enact change?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807467/317146665/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807469/317146666/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807471/317146668/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) Ballot measure campaigns have allowed us to carve a path for progress through partisan gridlock to bring workers higher wages, stop predatory payday lenders, improve health care access, secure more paid time off, and so much more. _And with this year’s victories, we’ve also been able to create real accountability for police misconduct. _ But, not everyone believes in the ballot measure process — some extremist politicians have noticed the change we’ve been able to create and now they are attacking this most-democratic tool. Friend: We want to know what you think... [_**Will you take our 1-click poll to let us know: Do you believe ballot measures are a powerful tool to enact change?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807473/317146670/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807476/317146672/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38807478/317146675/-654813562?refcode=E12520-20211119-1ClickPoll-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI1MmZlYi04NzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OO5SKst0vZ-SMRg0rNRgv0RIMhyvxZVts7nfwffZwNw=) — The Fairness Project

clean_body: What you missed on Kelly’s Cheddar interview >> | | “If we can win Medicaid expansion in Oklahoma, we can win on these issues anywhere.” Hey there! Last week, our Executive Director, Kelly Hall talked with Cheddar Politics about our recent 2021 ballot measure victories and how we’ve been able to secure a 23/24 winning record. The answer? Ballot measures allow voters across the country to divorce issues often coined as “progressive” from partisan politics and ideologies and take the power into their own hands to create the changes they want to see in their communities. We’re preparing our legislative agenda for 2022, but before announcing the campaigns we’re fighting for in the midterms, we want to know how strong national support is for the ballot measure process. = = = Ballot measure campaigns have allowed us to carve a path for progress through partisan gridlock to bring workers higher wages, stop predatory payday lenders, improve health care access, secure more paid time off, and so much more. And with this year’s victories, we’ve also been able to create real accountability for police misconduct. But, not everyone believes in the ballot measure process — some extremist politicians have noticed the change we’ve been able to create and now they are attacking this most-democratic tool. Friend: We want to know what you think... = = = — The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please click =.** = Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I am so proud of what we’ve accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZlQOB00vTwv3otkCajXMRoTEuI8Jdyl1dE0EJu1mFXs=/xFd7WzOecUYLUPe7ckEpIlPssHK0sXa85Qt6l-SN43I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211119-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Peter,

This morning, my House colleagues and I passed the transformative Build Back Better bill that, if passed by the Senate, will make an immediate positive impact on our country and our Central Virginia community.

The bill covers a lot, but here are a few highlights from this once-in-a-generation investment in our future. In short, Build Back Better will:

🍃 Invest in addressing climate change in a meaningful way

🧒 Extend the refundable child tax credit, helping tens of millions of families

🩺 Lower prescription drug costs and limit price increases

🏫 Expand access to early childhood education for children nationwide

Passing Build Back Better through the House is the first step in putting these impactful policies into law, and its passage shows what we can accomplish in Congress. **It also reminds us how crucial it is that we win this race in 2022 so we can continue making a positive impact for our country and its future.**

[_**Will you contribute to my re-election campaign today? Your contributions ensure I have the resources I need to run a robust campaign in one of the tightest races in the nation and continue working hard to pass consequential bills like Build Back Better.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZlQOB00vTwv3otkCajXMRoTEuI8Jdyl1dE0EJu1mFXs=/xFd7WzOecUYLUPe7ckEpIlPssHK0sXa85Qt6l-SN43I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211119-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Alex Padilla
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We cannot afford to lose his voice in the fight to protect and expand the right to vote
#

My friend Alex Padilla is a champion for voting rights and for our democracy. As California Secretary of State, he oversaw reforms that made it easier to vote and enabled more transparent and secure elections.
He’s taken his experience and pro-voter agenda to Washington to fight for the freedom to vote for every eligible American. In the Senate, he’s on the front lines fighting for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, the Freedom to Vote Act and more to make sure Americans’ access to democracy is not determined by zip code.
Alex knows the right to vote is fundamental to who we are as a nation, and he is willing to do whatever it takes as he works to pass federal voting rights legislation by whatever means necessary.
But now the same right-wing Trump supporters that poured millions into the failed Republican Recall attempt in California are turning their attention to Alex, so we need to make sure he has the resources to organize all across California and win!
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution, or any amount you can afford, to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate? We cannot afford to lose Alex in the fight to protect and expand the right to vote.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211119-1-15&t=1&refcode2=458_159979_zduwjy&akid=458%2E159979%2Ezduwjy)

subject: Major Milestone Alert
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We know that we have been pestering you to sign up to be paid poll workers for the past 12 months, but it is paying big dividends.

As the November 30th deadline looms for county party’s to submit their list of prioritized poll workers, **we wanted to let you know that thanks to the support of Republicans across Wisconsin, we are going to submit the largest number of Republican poll workers in the history of Wisconsin politics!

** **All of this work could not have been done without the hard work from individuals in our county party’s

** Some county party’s are submitting their list of prioritized poll workers as early as **TODAY**! If you are interested in being a paid poll worker, please reach out directly to your county party so they know of your interest. To find a list of your local county party’s please visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=2).

Thank you so much for your continued support of the Republican Party and ensuring conservative candidates are given fair treatment at the polls.

Sincerely,

Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=3).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=4) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ppw_thank_you_3&n=6), software for leaders.
