name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 19th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807939/317148534/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 19th, 2021**
Peter,
It was another busy week on the campaign trail! In addition to listening to and connecting with Marylanders from across the state, Tom secured another major endorsement from Amalgamated Transportation Union (ATU) International, as well as ATU Local 689 (Washington) and Local 1300 (Baltimore)! The unions represent over 19,000 households across the state. You can read more about the endorsement and what it means for the state of the race _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807940/317148535/-612531336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**_.
As we approach Thanksgiving, we wanted to extend our deepest gratitude for your support for Tom Perez for Maryland. We hope you and your loved ones have a safe and blessed holiday, and we look forward to keeping in touch as we continue to build our strong, grassroots movement.
Best,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland

* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807941/317148536/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Tom kicked off the week at the Metro Washington Labor Council AFL-CIO’s 43rd Annual Evening of Labor, where he celebrated the hardworking brothers and sisters in labor alongside his friends in AFSCME Maryland, AFGE, and locals from across the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807942/317148537/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
On Saturday, Tom spent the evening at the Legislative Black Caucus Weekend Extravaganza! The Legislative Black Caucus is on the front lines in the fight to create a Maryland that works for everyone, and Tom celebrated their work with his good friends, Senator Cory McCray and Herb Smith of AFGE.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807943/317148538/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
The energy at our fundraiser in Chevy Chase was incredible as Tom shared his vision for our great state. He joined strong leaders and activists from Montgomery County to discuss how we can work together to build a better Maryland.
Tom joined the Justice and Peace Committee at St. Ignatius Church in Baltimore for their gubernatorial forum. Tom has devoted his life to the pursuit of social justice, and he recognizes that too many Marylanders have been denied access to equal opportunity, economic empowerment and racial justice. He spoke about his experience fighting against injustices and laid out his plan to create a stronger Baltimore. You can watch a replay _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807944/317148539/-1630941408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**_.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807945/317148540/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Tom visited the Building Trades Convention in Ocean City to speak with the men and women in the building and construction professionals from every corner of our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807946/317148541/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Tom spent the evening at a full house in Arcadia speaking with folks that are ready to elect a leader that will ensure jobs and justice are available to everyone.
* * *
**Volunteer with us!**
**[Join Team Tom for the Annual Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807947/317148542/-1226893339?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
Sunday, November 20th | 10:00 AM
Veterans Plaza, Silver Spring, MD
_Please reach out to Catherine Scott at**[catherine@tomperez.com](mailto:catherine@tomperez.com)** with any questions._
* * *
**Endorsements**
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807948/317148543/-2065186243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
This week, the Amalgamated Transportation Union (ATU) International, as well as ATU Local 689 (Washington) and Local 1300 (Baltimore), endorsed Tom to be the next Governor of Maryland!
The unions represent over 19,000 households across the state. In their announcement, the unions cited Tom’s lifelong commitment to ensuring that workers have a seat at the table. The ATU has a demonstrated history of driving turnout on behalf of candidates up and down the ballot, and will mobilize members to participate in efforts to ensure that Tom is elected the next Governor of Maryland.
We are excited for this partnership and look forward to working with ATU members to ensure that labor workers will always have a seat at the table. You can read more about the endorsement in ATU’s press release _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807949/317148544/-612531336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**_.
* * *
**In the News**
**[Tom Perez: Some of Maryland’s Best Blue Collar Jobs are at the Port, and Now We Have an Opportunity to Create More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38807950/317148545/-1805957637?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTNlNjFkNi04YTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sJFIwKZUAvQ358a0kmE1bEmzXvmrgOAh410t1gI7qY=&emci=cccf237a-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e3e61d6-8a49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
_“Maryland will see $6 billion in federal dollars from the infrastructure legislation, including a significant investment in port infrastructure and intermodal freight transportation. In the wake of economic and supply chain disruptions of COVID-19, the East Coast is emerging as an equal to the West Coast in goods distribution. The Port of Baltimore is closer to the Midwest than any other East Coast port and is within an overnight drive of one-third of the nation’s population. This moment presents a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the Port of Baltimore back better by creating good-paying jobs, retaining those jobs, and investing in workforce development.”_

_“Befitting a man who has headed the state and federal government’s top labor agencies, Perez thinks a lot about climate change in the context of the economic opportunities — not just the policy challenges. A flourishing green economy, he said will boost the entire economy — and, if done properly, will provide opportunities for communities of color that have largely been shut out of the economic revival of the past decade. He argues that these opportunities will inevitably unite environmentalists and organized labor.”_

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 19th, 2021 Peter, It was another busy week on the campaign trail! In addition to listening to and connecting with Marylanders from across the state, Tom secured another major endorsement from Amalgamated Transportation Union (ATU) International, as well as ATU Local 689 (Washington) and Local 1300 (Baltimore)! The unions represent over 19,000 households across the state. You can read more about the endorsement and what it means for the state of the race . As we approach Thanksgiving, we wanted to extend our deepest gratitude for your support for Tom Perez for Maryland. We hope you and your loved ones have a safe and blessed holiday, and we look forward to keeping in touch as we continue to build our strong, grassroots movement. Best, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off the week at the Metro Washington Labor Council AFL-CIO’s 43rd Annual Evening of Labor, where he celebrated the hardworking brothers and sisters in labor alongside his friends in AFSCME Maryland, AFGE, and locals from across the state. On Saturday, Tom spent the evening at the Legislative Black Caucus Weekend Extravaganza! The Legislative Black Caucus is on the front lines in the fight to create a Maryland that works for everyone, and Tom celebrated their work with his good friends, Senator Cory McCray and Herb Smith of AFGE. The energy at our fundraiser in Chevy Chase was incredible as Tom shared his vision for our great state. He joined strong leaders and activists from Montgomery County to discuss how we can work together to build a better Maryland. Tom joined the Justice and Peace Committee at St. Ignatius Church in Baltimore for their gubernatorial forum. Tom has devoted his life to the pursuit of social justice, and he recognizes that too many Marylanders have been denied access to equal opportunity, economic empowerment and racial justice. He spoke about his experience fighting against injustices and laid out his plan to create a stronger Baltimore. You can watch a replay . Tom visited the Building Trades Convention in Ocean City to speak with the men and women in the building and construction professionals from every corner of our state. Tom spent the evening at a full house in Arcadia speaking with folks that are ready to elect a leader that will ensure jobs and justice are available to everyone. Volunteer with us! Sunday, November 20th | 10:00 AM Veterans Plaza, Silver Spring, MD Please reach out to Catherine Scott atmailto:catherine@tomperez.com with any questions. Endorsements This week, the Amalgamated Transportation Union (ATU) International, as well as ATU Local 689 (Washington) and Local 1300 (Baltimore), endorsed Tom to be the next Governor of Maryland! The unions represent over 19,000 households across the state. In their announcement, the unions cited Tom’s lifelong commitment to ensuring that workers have a seat at the table. The ATU has a demonstrated history of driving turnout on behalf of candidates up and down the ballot, and will mobilize members to participate in efforts to ensure that Tom is elected the next Governor of Maryland. We are excited for this partnership and look forward to working with ATU members to ensure that labor workers will always have a seat at the table. You can read more about the endorsement in ATU’s press release . In the News “Maryland will see $6 billion in federal dollars from the infrastructure legislation, including a significant investment in port infrastructure and intermodal freight transportation. In the wake of economic and supply chain disruptions of COVID-19, the East Coast is emerging as an equal to the West Coast in goods distribution. The Port of Baltimore is closer to the Midwest than any other East Coast port and is within an overnight drive of one-third of the nation’s population. This moment presents a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the Port of Baltimore back better by creating good-paying jobs, retaining those jobs, and investing in workforce development.” “Befitting a man who has headed the state and federal government’s top labor agencies, Perez thinks a lot about climate change in the context of the economic opportunities — not just the policy challenges. A flourishing green economy, he said will boost the entire economy — and, if done properly, will provide opportunities for communities of color that have largely been shut out of the economic revival of the past decade. He argues that these opportunities will inevitably unite environmentalists and organized labor.” “Working people in Maryland need a true champion as Governor,” said ATU International President John Costa. “Tom Perez is the leader Maryland needs with the experience necessary to build better public transit, support working families and create a better Maryland.” “Perez said he plans to ensure that all Marylanders have access to health insurance, including undocumented residents, by streamlining health insurance enrollment wherever possible. The Montgomery County Council implemented a program that allowed undocumented pregnant women to get access to maternal care while he was council president, he said. “We need to have the political will to say if you are undocumented in Maryland, you will get access to health insurance,” Perez said.” ICYMI Our webstore is now live! This was in spite of House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy’s 8-hour tantrum on the House floor last night. In all that time, McCarthy couldn’t come up with one single reason why he was opposed to lowering prescription drug costs, investing in early childhood education, and creating hundreds of thousands of good-paying clean energy jobs. Hey team, We're heading into the holiday season, a time when campaigns like ours typically see a slowdown in fundraising. We can understand why — folks are out holiday shopping, enjoying quality time with loved ones, and elections are sometimes the last thing on their minds. But the end of the year is a critical time for us. We want to finish 2021 as strong as possible so we can head into 2022 on solid footing, ready to ramp up our campaign in the final stretch before the Primary on March 1st. Unfortunately, we’ll feel this holiday slump much more than our Republican opponent Dan Patrick. He already has millions in his warchest. And unlike Mike, who refuses to take a penny from corporate PACs, Dan Patrick can make up the difference with big checks from his network of GOP mega donors. We want to get ahead of the holiday slump before it begins, so we're asking you to chip in $1 (just four quarters!) to our campaign today. One dollar may not seem like a lot to you, but that’s the power of a grassroots campaign. Lots of people chipping in a few bucks at a time can be enough to stand up to super PACs and special interests. [**So what do you say,****folks****? clean_body: | Hey team, We're heading into the holiday season, a time when campaigns like ours typically see a slowdown in fundraising. We can understand why — folks are out holiday shopping, enjoying quality time with loved ones, and elections are sometimes the last thing on their minds. But the end of the year is a critical time for us. We want to finish 2021 as strong as possible so we can head into 2022 on solid footing, ready to ramp up our campaign in the final stretch before the Primary on March 1st. Unfortunately, we’ll feel this holiday slump much more than our Republican opponent Dan Patrick. He already has millions in his warchest. And unlike Mike, who refuses to take a penny from corporate PACs, Dan Patrick can make up the difference with big checks from his network of GOP mega donors. We want to get ahead of the holiday slump before it begins, so we're asking you to chip in $1 (just four quarters!) to our campaign today. One dollar may not seem like a lot to you, but that’s the power of a grassroots campaign. Lots of people chipping in a few bucks at a time can be enough to stand up to super PACs and special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Now that Beto has officially jumped in the race for governor, together, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to move Texas in a better direction. We don't want to lose that opportunity just because we couldn’t afford the resources to get it done. Thank you in advance for your continued support, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: What is signature gathering?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
An explanation | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ec71098241e/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5316310?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d2d76939a9&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, Our team is preparing to gather signatures at the beginning of January. The more we talk about signature gathering with voters, the more we hear, “What does that mean?”. So I thought I’d take this opportunity to explain what we’re doing and why we’re doing it. Traditionally, Utah Republican candidates were chosen only via a caucus system. But in 2014 the Utah Legislature passed SB54, which provides candidates an additional path to the primary ballot outside of the caucus system. If a candidate gathers 28,000 signatures from voters affiliated with their party, they then enter a primary election between the convention winner and those who gather enough signatures. I will be participating in both the caucus/convention, as I did during my ten years in the Utah House, and gathering signatures to ensure I am on the 2022 primary ballot. There are rules and procedures in place for the signature-gathering process:
* The signatures must be collected in approved pamphlets issued by the campaign. We will send an email with the signature-gathering locations when the time comes.
* Voters must be 18 years or older and registered as Republicans to sign our signature packet. Signatures from anyone not registered to vote and not registered as a Republican will not count. Register to vote [here. ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=4956ab262d&e=10c1db3257)
* A voter’s signature will only be verified for one candidate, meaning if a voter sends for more than one candidate, only the signature that is verified and submitted first will be counted.

---
|
---
|
---
|
# How You Can Help
---
|
---
| Gathering 28,000 signatures from registered Republican voters will be no easy task, and we need all the help we can get. If you would like to volunteer to help us gather signatures, please fill out [this form](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a263d62f4a&e=10c1db3257) and register for an [online training](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=0fde3ab253&e=10c1db3257) session. Once you have completed the form we will send further instructions. As always, I am thankful for your support and look forward to seeing you in January when our signature-gathering begins!
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=da84507041&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a87e8da129&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a733a3e177&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.
---

Peter,

When it comes to the fight for America’s future, I’m proud to have always stood with President Trump on the right side of history.

I’m doing everything I can to take on big tech, put America first, and turn President Trump’s vision for our great country into reality -**but now, we have a new battle ahead of us.**

If we’re going to save America, we MUST take back the Senate with a pro-Trump majority in 2022.

RINOs and establishment Democrats are going to try every fraudulent trick in their book to stop us, Friend.

I need an A-team by my side if we’re going to WIN the fight for America - and that’s why I’m counting on you to be there.

**Join us today to TAKE BACK THE SENATE with a pro-Trump majority and start putting America FIRST again.**

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808084/317149120/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119BBB_TO_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWJhMTMwZi04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELWVlwn9pzSq4m4MRQl9tfa2vjV9JAGAwI_fTrj8oNc=)
---
Have you heard the news yet, friend? After months of bickering and negotiating, **the House has finally passed the Build Better Act.** In the final version, the bill includes: ☑️ Universal pre-kindergarten
☑️ $555 billion to combat the effects of climate change
☑️ Paid medical and parental leave
☑️ Child tax credits to support millions of families
☑️ Expanding affordable healthcare
☑️ Lowering prescription drug costs _(this provision is weaker thanks to conservatives like Lou Correa)_
☑️ Corporations and the 1% paying their fair share We’re not going to lie, it’s a much watered down version of what we _could_ have had. But conservative Democrats stonewalled at every chance they had. This bill is progress, but there’s still a lot of work to do and a lot of people who need real, meaningful help. **The next step? The bill will go up for a vote in the Senate — and that’s where the fight really starts.** Every single Republican in the House voted **against** the plan, and they’re expected to hold strong in the Senate as well. **Once again, it’ll come down to a few conservative Democrats slicing and dicing the bill to accommodate their big, corporate donors.** We need more progressive members of Congress who are willing to fight the hard fights — not compromise everyday people who need real relief. And we have an opportunity to replace Rep. Lou Correa, a corporate Democrat, with Mike Ortega, a lifelong organizer who won’t back down from fighting for what’s right. [**But we need your help to beat an entrenched, well-funded opponent. Chip in to our campaign today so we can send a real progressive champion for Santa Ana, Anaheim, and Orange to Congress >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808085/317149122/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119BBB_TO_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWJhMTMwZi04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELWVlwn9pzSq4m4MRQl9tfa2vjV9JAGAwI_fTrj8oNc=) | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808087/317149123/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119BBB_TO_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWJhMTMwZi04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELWVlwn9pzSq4m4MRQl9tfa2vjV9JAGAwI_fTrj8oNc=)
---
Para la próxima generación,

clean_body: | = Have you heard the news yet, friend? After months of bickering and negotiating, the House has finally passed the Build Better Act. In the final version, the bill includes: ☑️ Universal pre-kindergarten ☑️ $555 billion to combat the effects of climate change ☑️ Paid medical and parental leave ☑️ Child tax credits to support millions of families ☑️ Expanding affordable healthcare ☑️ Lowering prescription drug costs (this provision is weaker thanks to conservatives like Lou Correa) ☑️ Corporations and the 1% paying their fair share We’re not going to lie, it’s a much watered down version of what we could have had. But conservative Democrats stonewalled at every chance they had. This bill is progress, but there’s still a lot of work to do and a lot of people who need real, meaningful help. The next step? The bill will go up for a vote in the Senate — and that’s where the fight really starts. Every single Republican in the House voted against the plan, and they’re expected to hold strong in the Senate as well. Once again, it’ll come down to a few conservative Democrats slicing and dicing the bill to accommodate their big, corporate donors. We need more progressive members of Congress who are willing to fight the hard fights — not compromise everyday people who need real relief. And we have an opportunity to replace Rep. Lou Correa, a corporate Democrat, with Mike Ortega, a lifelong organizer who won’t back down from fighting for what’s right. = | = Para la próxima generación, Team Ortega | Mike Ortega is a Democrat running for Congress in CA-46 to fight for all working people who call America home. Mike is a lifelong organizer and a biomedical engineer who has worked on the ground to fight for his community and in the lab to save lives. = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
I know we just got introduced recently, but I wrote a longer personal update for you about why I’m running to defeat Ron Johnson. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it... | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808429/317150770/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzNmZhNC04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUyqlBZN0aRR3TC24XKDa5Guq4jHAKpl1Uyzz2rx1RU=&emci=c5ed72b0-a504-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0a36fa4-8c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25515813) | Team, I know we just got introduced recently, but I wrote a longer personal update for you about why I’m running to defeat Ron Johnson. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it: As a radiologist specializing in breast imaging, I have seen many patients who have felt a lump and suspected they may have breast cancer but have delayed seeing a doctor often because of the price tag of health care. **This is why we need a single-payer, Medicare for All system.** Preventable death and disease is particularly personal to me. My dad, Gene Lee Chapin, died suddenly at the age of 29 while playing with my sister and me. He died because he had untreated strep as a kid and developed rheumatic fever and rheumatic heart disease. My sister and I were 2 and 3, and my mom was 25 — and our world turned upside down. That loss has been a lifelong reminder of what health care access means and is part of what drove me to become a doctor. Unfortunately, my family’s story is far from unique: Medical bills are so overwhelming in the U.S. that over a quarter of GoFundMe fundraisers are for medical costs. The New York Times reported that medical debt, totaling $140 billion, is the most common reason for debt collectors to come knocking. Opponents of Medicare for All are putting insurance and pharmaceutical companies ahead of people. They disingenuously cite its cost as the reason for their opposition. This is nonsense. Numerous economic studies have shown that a single-payer system would decrease the overall cost of healthcare in our country, improve health outcomes for patients, and save taxpayers trillions over the next decade. **When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’m prepared to fight for Medicare for All, because no family should have to choose between putting food on the table and being able to afford the medical care that they need to survive.** We need leaders who will fight for us, and for a health care system driven by a desire to heal people — not by the status quo or the bottom line. **[Our campaign is run 100% by grassroots contributions — no Super PACs, no insurance money. If you can, chip in $5 or more to my campaign today, and help me fight to fix our broken healthcare system in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808430/317150771/730300445?refcode=E10896-20210823-Welcome2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzNmZhNC04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUyqlBZN0aRR3TC24XKDa5Guq4jHAKpl1Uyzz2rx1RU=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic female physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately:_ | **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808431/317150772/730300445?express_lane=true&refcode=E10896-20210823-Welcome2-EG-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzNmZhNC04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUyqlBZN0aRR3TC24XKDa5Guq4jHAKpl1Uyzz2rx1RU=)** | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808432/317150773/730300445?express_lane=true&refcode=E10896-20210823-Welcome2-EG-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzNmZhNC04YzQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FUyqlBZN0aRR3TC24XKDa5Guq4jHAKpl1Uyzz2rx1RU=)**

My dad, Gene Lee Chapin, died suddenly at the age of 29 while playing with my sister and me. He died because he had untreated strep as a kid and developed rheumatic fever and rheumatic heart disease. My sister and I were 2 and 3, and my mom was 25 — and our world turned upside down. That loss has been a lifelong reminder of what health care access means and is part of what drove me to become a doctor. Unfortunately, my family’s story is far from unique: Medical bills are so overwhelming in the U.S. that over a quarter of GoFundMe fundraisers are for medical costs. The New York Times reported that medical debt, totaling $140 billion, is the most common reason for debt collectors to come knocking. Opponents of Medicare for All are putting insurance and pharmaceutical companies ahead of people. They disingenuously cite its cost as the reason for their opposition. This is nonsense. Numerous economic studies have shown that a single-payer system would decrease the overall cost of healthcare in our country, improve health outcomes for patients, and save taxpayers trillions over the next decade. When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’m prepared to fight for Medicare for All, because no family should have to choose between putting food on the table and being able to afford the medical care that they need to survive. We need leaders who will fight for us, and for a health care system driven by a desire to heal people — not by the status quo or the bottom line. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic female physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for all that you do, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. Gillian built her career on integrity, advocacy, and action, and she’s ready to put that skill set to work in the U.S. Senate! It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . = Dr. Gillian Battino has dedicated her life’s work to bettering the world and continues that commitment every day. Gillian spent 20+ years serving the people of Wisconsin and helping women in the fight against breast cancer. She has seen, up close and personal, the difference that access to quality health care can make. =** | Paid for by Battino for U.S. Senate Gillian Battino for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 292 Wausau, WI 54402-0292 United States

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/e4db936a-23f0-4552-95c3-fff341e88398.png]

Rittenhouse is 100% guilty. . .of self-defense and nothing more.

The prosecution’s own witness admitted on the stand during the trial that he got shot by Rittenhouse after the witness had pointed a handgun at Rittenhouse. Witnesses and that video prove that Rittenhouse was innocent of the charges that were laid against him.

Self-defense is a basic human right that we should be allowed to freely exercise if we need to.

The prosecutor should be disbarred for sitting on evidence. Rittenhouse’s case should never have gone to trial and the prosecutor knew it.

We have to ask why are the mainstream media, Biden, and the prosecuting attorney trying to prosecute Rittenhouse?

It’s because Rittenhouse dared to defend himself with a firearm. If our elected public servants had done their jobs, we wouldn’t have had the riots and looting that took place across major cities in America.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/3b8c46c4-9204-4b6b-90c4-a724f077d1c6.jpg]

The left allowed criminals to roam our streets, tied the hands of law enforcement officials, while calling acts of violence a “summer of love"but then went after this young man who did nothing more than defend himself.

What's actually on trial is self-defense with a firearm.

The left is always looking for ways to undermine the 2nd amendment. Our right to "keep and bear arms" is so "we the people" can defend ourselves when we need to.

It's time we push back against the left and stand up for America.

Take a stand,

Loren

Peter, before I was elected to Congress, I was a teacher -- _for over 20 years._

My grandfather was an American immigrant.

And in the 1940s, my family had to start over with nothing when they were wrongfully interned in Japanese-American internment camps.

**All this is to say that I’m not a typical politician. I ran for Congress because I wanted to make a real difference in working class, marginalized communities.**

And as a result, my campaign isn’t funded by corporate special interests and wealthy donors.

**It’s funded by everyday people like you.**

clean_body: I’m not a typical politician | = Peter, before I was elected to Congress, I was a teacher -- for over 20 years. My grandfather was an American immigrant. And in the 1940s, my family had to start over with nothing when they were wrongfully interned in Japanese-American internment camps. All this is to say that I’m not a typical politician. I ran for Congress because I wanted to make a real difference in working class, marginalized communities. And as a result, my campaign isn’t funded by corporate special interests and wealthy donors. It’s funded by everyday people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = $1 helps fund digital ads $1 helps knock more doors $1 helps convince just one more voter to vote for progress instead of hate And with so much of our critical progressive agenda at risk -- climate change action, social infrastructure, racial justice -- the stakes have never been higher. name: Wes Moore
subject: The House just made historic progress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808684/317151923/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119bbb_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2U0Y2RlNS04ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSSNJr7ZdjFLiuJ34nQprKh2Tr7BTUDXCn8bCtuJfFI=)
---
Friends, I know you just heard from me yesterday, but I have some major news: This morning, **the United States House of Representatives successfully passed the Build Back Better Act** : a historic legislative package that invests in families, workers, and action on climate change. Some of the most impressive highlights of this landmark bill include:
* **Four weeks of paid leave** guaranteed to every worker, so that new parents, people taking care of sick loved ones, and more will have the opportunity to take time away from work without costing them;

* **Free, universal preschool for every 3- and 4-year-old in the country** (the largest expansion of free education in 100 years!), plus an extension of the **child tax credit** that lifts millions of families out of poverty;

* **The biggest expansion of affordable health care in a decade** , including lower prescription drug prices, hearing coverage for seniors, and lower premiums;

* **The largest effort to tackle climate change in U.S. history** , including tax breaks for families who switch to wind or solar, thousands of jobs in clean energy, and steps to create environmental justice in communities of color.

_Imagine what this will mean for families across Maryland._ Now, imagine what more we can accomplish if we win this governor seat next year. **[Our Congressional delegation has delivered. Let’s ensure we can make even more progress here in Maryland by winning this race next November: rush a donation of $10 or more now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808685/317151924/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211119bbb_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2U0Y2RlNS04ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSSNJr7ZdjFLiuJ34nQprKh2Tr7BTUDXCn8bCtuJfFI=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Stacey Abrams said this race is going to be a "nail-biter"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team – Stacey Abrams said this race will be a "nail-biter," and she's not wrong. Regardless of who we're up against in 2022, polls are showing that **this race will be tight.** But Maggie Hassan is no stranger to tough fights – in 2016, she won by only 1,017 votes, making it one of the closest Senate races in the country. And because of those 1,017 votes, Democrats have been able to pass meaningful legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the historic infrastructure bill that Maggie helped negotiate. If we lose Maggie's voice in the Senate, Granite Staters will lose one of their biggest champions, and Democrats could lose the Senate majority. Republicans are already working overtime to replace Maggie with a rubber stamp for Mitch McConnell. So far, they've spent over $4.5 million, with the promise that more is on the way. There's no doubt that this race will be tough, but if we work together, we can win. **[So please, before our weekend deadline, can you chip in $5 or more today? Whatever you give will go a long way in protecting this seat and our slim Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808719/317152126/-1803038125?refcode=e20211119_staff-nail-biter&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkzYmUyNC04ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VR6UMce6gspgGxxqaQZBDe7qaqgwYqMRGj4w_QK_gyo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808720/317152127/-1803038125?refcode=e20211119_staff-nail-biter&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkzYmUyNC04ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VR6UMce6gspgGxxqaQZBDe7qaqgwYqMRGj4w_QK_gyo=)

Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law.
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors.
* Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians.
* Banned mask requirements in schools and threatened to withhold pay from officials who’ve implemented them.
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade.
* Signed laws restricting abortion access.
* Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas.
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state.
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes.
* Ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s scaring off tourists.

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

**One thing is clear: Gov. DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians. He only cares about his presidential ambitions and satisfying his wealthy donors.**

**[We _don’t_ support Gov. DeSantis, and we know you don’t either. If you can, please contribute today to Charlie Crist’s campaign for governor. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808748/317152346/2028734929?refcode=20211119_f_2_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGYxNTA4Mi04ZTQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TEr_wDeghhl0QCN4Suwvr_F_A6pva7wiloc3MnNkwPI=)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
This isn’t a red or blue issue. This is an American issue. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808846/317152505/-1431549694?refcode=EM_PET_211119usps_ED_TE_90D_6_G_G_testb_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM2NTAxYy04ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUeAUNas4xu94suDJpmK6phzQmHrPgKH-Ow5P2T3n0o=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808847/317152506/-248216467?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM2NTAxYy04ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUeAUNas4xu94suDJpmK6phzQmHrPgKH-Ow5P2T3n0o=&emci=2e36501c-8f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3036501c-8f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249) Team, Millions of Americans rely on the USPS to get the medicine, goods, checks, and all the other things they need to keep everyday life moving forward. But with excessive delays and backlogs, it seems like the USPS isn’t hitting its own marks. And with a projected holiday season boom, and massive changes to delivery procedures, delays are only getting worse. [**These changes are going to hit marginalized and rural communities here in central PA the hardest. We need your voice to tell the USPS to stop the slowdowns, and get back to the service we all expect. Add your name here and let’s fix the USPS.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38808848/317152507/-248216467?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM2NTAxYy04ZjQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUeAUNas4xu94suDJpmK6phzQmHrPgKH-Ow5P2T3n0o=&emci=2e36501c-8f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3036501c-8f49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=10203249) This isn’t a red state issue or blue state issue. Slow downs in the Postal Service affect all of us. Without an effective and reliable service that makes sure mail gets delivered to every home on time, people lose confidence in the Postal Service, businesses lose revenue, seniors miss life-saving medications, and rural communities are further disconnected and marginalized. We know that problem has been decades in the making, but now we can make sure they hear our voices. It’s time to remind Postmaster General Louis DeJoy of his responsibility to the American people. [**Use your voice today. clean_body: This isn’t a red or blue issue. This is an American issue. | | = Team, Millions of Americans rely on the USPS to get the medicine, goods, checks, and all the other things they need to keep everyday life moving forward. But with excessive delays and backlogs, it seems like the USPS isn’t hitting its own marks. And with a projected holiday season boom, and massive changes to delivery procedures, delays are only getting worse. This isn’t a red state issue or blue state issue. Slow downs in the Postal Service affect all of us. Without an effective and reliable service that makes sure mail gets delivered to every home on time, people lose confidence in the Postal Service, businesses lose revenue, seniors miss life-saving medications, and rural communities are further disconnected and marginalized. We know that problem has been decades in the making, but now we can make sure they hear our voices. It’s time to remind Postmaster General Louis DeJoy of his responsibility to the American people. Thank you, Eugene DePasquale ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zivvj3brms3t712epil8gfchnkchej1vd4jf5450_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cphmcor4shh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongmuom5djjesqbcdpi6cp7cddhm1j6bd74cjgn2pjkmhq70or2c2rjdc9hcdpm0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3immr3fcjjcooj9d9gsuobapbi4no)

---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhf38vnhkk02bcnfiu2fjjcvu36ho9n3v40hltk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cphmcor4shh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvtv8o9m0jn2jaeth5mfpgiamb7jo52l5skef5o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cphmcor4shh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Replace anti-American School Board Members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820678:JBhBPq2Nn:m:1:3253819041:FDA39E35B63117159777A611B6A72B54:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

subject: I want to see all of my friends
body:
I know it’s the holiday season and we’re all busy, so I’ll keep this short. I’m having an end of the year virtual gala
---
| | Dear Peter, I know it’s the holiday season and we’re all busy, so I’ll keep this short. I’m having an end of the year virtual gala with my friend Bakari Sellers, and I want you to be there. **[We’ll be virtual at 6 PM on December 9th talking about the campaign so far and my vision for the future of our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38809252/317153713/-643211092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgxNWJkMC05MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsOrKEtziicUgE0Y4bq6bS6jwtTtPEe8HeA-DsjhwUo=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38809263/317153718/-643211092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgxNWJkMC05MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsOrKEtziicUgE0Y4bq6bS6jwtTtPEe8HeA-DsjhwUo=) Bakari is a CNN commentator and incredible civil rights attorney, and I’m honored to have him join us to talk about the issues we’re facing in Oregon and across the country. It’s been an intense year, and that’s putting it lightly. Before things heat up again after the holidays, I want to spend a little time with my friends and supporters for an evening in support of my campaign to be your next Governor. **[Will you be able to join me and Bakari Sellers on December 9th?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38809265/317153731/-643211092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgxNWJkMC05MDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsOrKEtziicUgE0Y4bq6bS6jwtTtPEe8HeA-DsjhwUo=)**
Thank you,

name: John Fetterman
subject: Me + the three rascals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
TBH, our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.
#
Derek,
The single coolest + most important achievement in my life has been being a dad to these three rascals: August, Gracie, and Karl.
While sometimes a bit of a handful, 🙄 they're still always just the all-time best. 💛
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37429?refcode=em20211119-3526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)
Campaigning for U.S. Senate means _a lot_ of time spent on the road. 67 counties across the Commonwealth is a lot of counties, after all!
Honestly, knowing Gisele and I would have to spend some weekends away was a big reason why launching this campaign to flip Pennsylvania blue wasn't a decision we took lightly. But we decided to go for it, as a family.
Because Derek, it's never lost on me that our future generations are going to feel the effects of what our governments do today. **On so many issues — from gun violence prevention, to education, to health care, to climate — our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.**
To me, that's what makes this fight worth fighting.
Here's my pledge to you: If you trust me with your vote and I get elected to the U.S. Senate, I will fight for you + your family just the same way I'd fight for my own. _*That's* what I believe we all deserve from our Senators._[**_So if you're with me in this campaign and are able to chip in $5 or even just a couple bucks today, I'd be so deeply grateful for every single ounce of your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37429?refcode=em20211119-3526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37429?refcode=em20211119-3526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)**
Not a day goes by that I don't feel beyond humbled by this team.
Thank you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211119-3526-footer&t=22&refcode2=3526_434096_ieDcjH&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3526%2E434096%2EieDcjH)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Eden, Megan, Jimena, and Annie
subject: How do you even come up with a subject line for this?
body:
Today, we're grieving.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38809394/317154253/1300596418?refcode=211119_CLTV_rittenhouseresponse_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkYjRhZGY5LTkxNDktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hc4Dz4Qo4o2besY8SmscixL2fDuJH27m6EsARx9r1m4=)
---
**TRIGGER WARNING: This email contains upsetting contents re: violence, racism, murder.**

Today, a jury declared Kyle Rittenhouse not guilty.

Rittenhouse, as we know, murdered three young men protesting in Kenosha, WI after a white police officer shot a young Black man named Jacob Blake in the back in the August of 2020, a summer fraught with police brutality. Jacob Blake is now paralyzed from the waist down.

Today is a shameful day in America— a country built upon systems of racism, patriarchy, imperialism, and capitalism that perpetuate violence.

Today, we remember the lives lost and those who were injured-- Joseph Rosenbaum (36) and Anthony Huber (26).

Huber was a hero who lost his life trying to stop Rittenhouse.

Our thoughts and hearts are with the survivor Gaige Grosskreutz (27) who told his story this past week in court.
Today, we channel our thoughts to all those suffering from pain and trauma caused by a young, dangerous white man with an automatic weapon.

This should not have happened. None of this should have happened.

Kyle Rittenhouse is a murderer. This was no form of self-defense. He traveled illegally across state borders with an AR-15 semi-automatic rifle and took the lives of two innocent people exercising their right to protest.

And thanks to Judge Shroeder, a geriatric psychopath who kept significant evidence from the jury, Rittenhouse is free.

**Today is a day to feel it all— anger, sadness, disgust, disbelief, grief.**

Today, we also remember other victims killed while protesting:

Calvin Horton, Jr. was killed in a protest for the murder of George Floyd — Horton was suspected to be one of the first people killed since the protests began in 2020.

Deona M. Knajdek, who was killed in Minneapolis when a car crashed into her in June of 2021 during a Black Lives Matter protest. Deona was 31.

Summer Taylor, a non-binary protestor who was killed when a car drove into them in Seattle in the summer of 2020 during a Black Lives Matter protest. Summer was 24.

Barry Perkins was driven over in June of 2020 in St. Louis during a Black Lives Matter protest. Barry was 29. He left behind two kids, age 9 and 4.

Robert Forbes was struck and killed by a vehicle in June of 2020 in Bakersfield, California during a Black Lives Matter protest.

James Scurlock, a Black Lives Matter protester, was killed in Omaha while walking with his infant daughter.

As activists and protestors ourselves who marched that summer and have continued to march since, we are especially horrified. We won’t lie. We are hurting really bad right now. And we imagine some of you are too.

So today, we just remember. Cry. Grieve. Today, we reflect on the shoulders and sacrifices we stand on. Today, we practice self care and check in with our loved ones. To those reading this email who are hurting, please know that you are in our hearts right now. You are not alone.

Together, we will grieve. And then, we will hold one another up and find strength in community.

Yours in solidarity,
**_Eden, Megan, Jimena, and Annie_**
Team Barrier To Entry
* * *

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.**
---

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: 253 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

When our rally to demand that Rhode Island’s elected leaders spend all
$1.1 billion in COVID relief funds was interrupted by a tornado warning
and folks needed shelter from the storm, Cynthia jumped into action:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/1936?t=1003&akid=244%2E43343%2E8S2X8s ]Cynthia Mendes standing and waving inside the Rhode Island State House

Cynthia (along with State Senator Sam Bell — thanks, Sam!) helped unlock
the doors to the State House and led rally attendees to safety.

This is classic Cynthia, and we wanted to share this picture because it’s
emblematic of the current problem with leaders like Dan McKee and the
corrupt establishment — we constantly fight and plead with the people in
the State House to help the people outside of it.

WE keep us safe.

And it’s why Matt and Cynthia are running. We’ve had emergency COVID
relief funding sitting in the State House for 253 days, and Governor McKee
hasn’t spent a single penny.

That’s 253 missed opportunities to give families relief, 253 missed
opportunities to jumpstart our economy, and 253 missed opportunities to
ensure Rhode Islanders can meet their basic needs.

And on top of that, while the rest of the country has seen unemployment
decrease, we’re learning that unemployment in Rhode Island has actually
increased over the past two months. It’s past time for new leadership, and

clean_body: Team, When our rally to demand that Rhode Island’s elected leaders spend all $1.1 billion in COVID relief funds was interrupted by a tornado warning and folks needed shelter from the storm, Cynthia jumped into action: [ ]Cynthia Mendes standing and waving inside the Rhode Island State House Cynthia (along with State Senator Sam Bell — thanks, Sam!) helped unlock the doors to the State House and led rally attendees to safety. This is classic Cynthia, and we wanted to share this picture because it’s emblematic of the current problem with leaders like Dan McKee and the corrupt establishment — we constantly fight and plead with the people in the State House to help the people outside of it. WE keep us safe. And it’s why Matt and Cynthia are running. We’ve had emergency COVID relief funding sitting in the State House for 253 days, and Governor McKee hasn’t spent a single penny. That’s 253 missed opportunities to give families relief, 253 missed opportunities to jumpstart our economy, and 253 missed opportunities to ensure Rhode Islanders can meet their basic needs. And on top of that, while the rest of the country has seen unemployment decrease, we’re learning that unemployment in Rhode Island has actually increased over the past two months. It’s past time for new leadership, and we need actual leaders who will fight for us. [ ]If you can, chip in to help power this movement, and bring real fighters for our communities to the State House. Every single gift, no matter how big or small, makes a difference, and supports our work to reach voters across the state. name: Team Morganize
subject: re: The Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is exactly why electing Morgan is so critical.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211119-404-footer-ak&t=2&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)
**BREAKING: The Build Back Better Act passed the House** Can you donate $10 to Morgan right now so we can build off this momentum and elect more progressives to Congress?**
****[Donate Now »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15213?refcode=em20211119-404&t=3&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)**
---
**The House just voted to pass the Build Back Better Act!** This was a long hard battle, and it took _months_ and tons of compromise to get here. But one thing is abundantly clear: **We need more progressives in Congress.**
We still have progressive priorities included in the Build Back Better Act because of the determination and bravery of progressives who #heldtheline.
[**_Can you step up today and support Morgan in our campaign for U.S. Senate by donating $5 right now? Morgan will proudly vote YES on meaningful policies and will fight hard to hold the line when she needs to._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15214?t=4&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15220?refcode=em20211119-404&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)**
Passing the Build Back Better Act is a huge win and it should be celebrated. But it’s also only the first step on the road to progress and a country and Ohio that work for everyone.
The work is ongoing and we can’t take a minute to rest.
We’ve got to keep organizing and putting pressure on Congress and our elected reps to ensure that progress doesn’t stop here. If we’re going to change this country it’s NOT going to be with corporate Democrats. [**_Can you donate $5 to Morgan’s campaign today so we can elect a true progressive who will fight tooth and nail for everyday working people to the Senate?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15214?t=24&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)
Together,
Team Morganize
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15214?t=25&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211119-404-footer&t=26&refcode2=404_90090_noqwgC&akid=404%2E90090%2EnoqwgC)**
---

Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The MEDIA lies about Kyle
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58821230:JlAeMq2N4:m:1:3253819041:7A9E5C7C77D9AA9993C8C1CD82E8AC5B:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58821230:JlAeMq2N4:m:1:3253819041:7A9E5C7C77D9AA9993C8C1CD82E8AC5B:r)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58821230:JlAeMq2N4:m:1:3253819041:7A9E5C7C77D9AA9993C8C1CD82E8AC5B:r)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58821230:JlAeMq2N4:m:1:3253819041:7A9E5C7C77D9AA9993C8C1CD82E8AC5B:r)
[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58821230:JlAeMq2N4:m:1:3253819041:7A9E5C7C77D9AA9993C8C1CD82E8AC5B:r)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: LBR
subject: What building back better actually means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
Today was step one.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810199/317166615/326428347?refcode=EM_fr_211119bbb_bbb_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmViNzliOC05ODQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s87mGyUH8bEKKi3AVrb0YC2PiQmMp5cjULCtaIAX0e8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810200/317166618/326428347?refcode=EM_fr_211119bbb_bbb_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmViNzliOC05ODQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s87mGyUH8bEKKi3AVrb0YC2PiQmMp5cjULCtaIAX0e8=) Today I was proud to vote in favor of the Build Back Better Plan, but I wanted to make sure that you knew exactly what building back better means for Delaware and the country as a whole. **[But first, can you chip in $5 to help me win reelection and keep fighting for you in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810201/317166619/326428347?refcode=EM_fr_211119bbb_bbb_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmViNzliOC05ODQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s87mGyUH8bEKKi3AVrb0YC2PiQmMp5cjULCtaIAX0e8=)**

First off, it means tax cuts. Over 50 _million families_ would see their taxes go down because of the Build Back Better Plan -- one of the largest middle-class tax cuts in history. Beyond that, it would create a fairer tax system, so the ultra-wealthy will finally pay their fair share of taxes.

It also means **_jobs_**. From investments in job training to combating climate change, we’ll create tens of thousands of blue-collar jobs, and making sure everyone can access child-care would strengthen our workforce and our economy.

Finally, it means a better future for our children. From universal pre-k to preventing childhood hunger to lower-cost higher education, children in every zip code will have the support they need to succeed.

**_These aren’t Democratic or Republican issues, they are issues facing Americans of all backgrounds and political affiliations, and it’s my number one priority that they are addressed in this Congress._**

**[Now, can you make a $5 donation to my reelection campaign so I can continue to fight for common-sense solutions to the problems facing our country today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810202/317166620/326428347?refcode=EM_fr_211119bbb_bbb_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmViNzliOC05ODQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s87mGyUH8bEKKi3AVrb0YC2PiQmMp5cjULCtaIAX0e8=)**

Thank you,

Lisa ** ** | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810203/317166621/326428347?refcode=EM_fr_211119bbb_bbb_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_na_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmViNzliOC05ODQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s87mGyUH8bEKKi3AVrb0YC2PiQmMp5cjULCtaIAX0e8=)****
---

# We are in this to fight!
#
## I jumped in this race to go to Washington to be an advocate for GA-10!

This week in Washington, DC the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill was passed. This bill is the most consequential piece of legislation since the Affordable Care Act.

We rely on our infrastructure everyday and we need to be making the proper investments and maintenance. This bill not only addresses the problem with our infrastructure, but it also is going to create 1.5 million jobs over the next 10 years and provide rural broadband access to communities that have not had internet access for decades.

I will go to Washington to advocate for more bills like this, and to make sure that the funding from this bill is properly allocated to our district and Georgia. In order to be able to do this, I need your support. Can I count on you to chip in $10 by using the link below?
