clean_body: | | | | | | | We are in this to fight! I jumped in this race to go to Washington to be an advocate for GA-10! This week in Washington, DC the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill was passed. This bill is the most consequential piece of legislation since the Affordable Care Act. We rely on our infrastructure everyday and we need to be making the proper investments and maintenance. This bill not only addresses the problem with our infrastructure, but it also is going to create 1.5 million jobs over the next 10 years and provide rural broadband access to communities that have not had internet access for decades. I will go to Washington to advocate for more bills like this, and to make sure that the funding from this bill is properly allocated to our district and Georgia. In order to be able to do this, I need your support. Can I count on you to chip in $10 by using the link below? | "Chip in to support my campaign. " | "Shop!" | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Committee to Elect Kimberly Clark Reuter to United States Congress, All rights reserved.

Thankfully, Senator Elizabeth Warren released a new plan to expand and protect Social Security for millions ↘↘ Millions of Americans rely on Social Security every day -- this plan would change lives!! That’s why we need an overwhelming swell of support to prove voters support Senator Warren’s new plan!! | | | Thanks for your input, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Wesley Hunt
subject: My Thoughts on Joe Biden's $1.75 Trillion Reckless Tax and Spending Spree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend, Just two weeks after Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi passed their
outrageously overpriced $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill, they have now passed
an additional $1.75 trillion socialist wishlist that adds nearly $400 billion
to our nation's already soaring debt. It is despicable to think that Democrats
will add billions of dollars to our debt while increasing taxes on hard-working
American families. Inflation will ravage our economy even more than what we're
seeing currently, all in the name of the Green New Deal.

Our Texas oil and gas industry has also been under constant attack by Joe
Biden over the last year, and there seems to be no end in sight. Hidden deep in
this 2,500-page bill is a new methane fee that will tax natural gas and
petroleum facilities, causing irreparable harm to an industry that Americans
rely upon each and every day. The prices of gasoline, energy, food, cell
phones, household necessities, and thousands of other goods will also increase
tremendously due to this one small provision.

The passage of Joe Biden's Build Back Better plan is the single largest step
our country has taken towards socialism, and it is clear that Joe Biden and his
radical allies in Congress do not have the American people's best interest at
heart. Now is time to take back our country and keep the radical left from
destroying the greatest nation our world has ever seen.

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=f2fa1a340aef4fa1ae6b46ed89cafdf7&_t=F1I5rtQtbjA-ulAC54rC5obe5lgH7_W_AfbLk5wHFMvD21hwy9Aox979DXXt21cUqb4SuP9ETA1YvwJZd7ZeinfYQNtPCnsSbooSO4p0kYgu-e4WQ98641vLO-ISP9oBxXkTNm302HjCafuNU8EOhvJ8T3kD7cetMBfrG10vqa4%3D>
.

Hidden deep in this 2,500-page bill is a new methane fee that will tax natural gas and petroleum facilities, causing irreparable harm to an industry that Americans rely upon each and every day. The prices of gasoline, energy, food, cell phones, household necessities, and thousands of other goods will also increase tremendously due to this one small provision. The passage of Joe Biden's Build Back Better plan is the single largest step our country has taken towards socialism, and it is clear that Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress do not have the American people's best interest at heart. Now is time to take back our country and keep the radical left from destroying the greatest nation our world has ever seen. Sincerely, Wesley Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Volunteer with Beto for Texas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need all hands on deck.
#
My name is Katherine, and I’m the Organizing Director for Beto for Texas. It’s my job to build a grassroots army of volunteers to directly reach millions of Texans through calls, texts, door-knocks, and more — because that’s what we’re going to need to win this election.
I’m emailing to ask you to sign up for a **Beto for Texas Letter Writing Party** , where we'll all write letters to Texans and build support for Beto. They’re hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere. [Click here to sign up or learn more!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49901?t=3&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)
**[Write letters for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49901?t=4&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)**
We’re facing a lot of challenges in this race, including an extreme new voter suppression law that makes it even harder than before to cast a ballot in Texas, especially for Black and Brown voters, voters with disabilities, and working-class voters.
That’s why it’s critical we use every tool we have to reach people with Beto’s vision and help folks all across Texas participate in this election.
[Will you sign up for a Beto for Texas Letter Writing party? This is a critical way you can help Beto build a winning campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49901?t=6&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)
Thanks for your help,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49912?refcode=ema20211119-163084&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211119-163084-footer&t=8&refcode2=163084_444211_5lTVLD&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=9&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=163084%2E444211%2E5lTVLD)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: What “build back better” means to your family
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810428/317175673/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzc2ZWIwYy05ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jIMLq7dPmhTbv0B2LJdtvuKc6jMpijWOULZkYN8-NHk=&emci=5c7348d0-9b49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0376eb0c-9d49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)
---

| | This morning, I voted to pass the Build Back Better Act to create millions of jobs, tackle the climate crisis, and drive long-term economic growth as we bring the pandemic to a close. Here is what it means for you, your family, and families across Washington when it comes to housing and child care:
* Every 3- and 4-year-old in America—including 181,000 in Washington state—will have access to free, high-quality preschool.

* In addition, no working family will pay more than 7% of their income for child care, ensuring that every family can afford child care.

* We are extending the $250-300 per child refundable tax credit that has lifted half of all children nationwide out of poverty. In Northwest Washington, over 75,000 families received an average of $438 each last month.

* The Build Back Better plan includes funds to build over 1 million units of affordable housing nationwide, as well as billions of dollars in lifeline rent assistance. This is a provision that I personally championed, and I am proud to make it happen.

* For the first time in history, all workers will have access to four weeks of _paid_ family and medical leave.

Here is what it means for you, your family, and families across Washington when it comes to health care:
* Medicare will finally be able to negotiate lower drug prices.

* Under Medicare Part D, seniors will no longer pay more than $2000/year for prescription drugs.

* We are lowering the cost of health care premiums and extending access to affordable hearing care through Medicare.

Here is what it means for you, your family, and families across Washington when it comes to tackling climate change:
* We are investing over $550 billion to lower energy costs, reduce pollution, and create millions of jobs in the clean energy economy.

* We are making it more affordable for middle-class families to install rooftop solar or buy electric vehicles.

* We are hiring 300,000 people to serve in a national Climate Conservation Corps that will help communities become resilient in the face of climate change and restore and protect our public lands.

Between the bipartisan infrastructure plan and the Build Back Better plan, we are making strong progress toward rebuilding our economy, putting people back to work, and making it possible for working families to thrive.

name: Virginia for Everyone
subject: what do you think, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginia For Everyone PAC P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38810451/317176212/1991471847?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTIyZTgzMC05ZDQ5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGyFYp-SvEHPtpLZrtGbsp-oeyu_RUd5YRbyV8V-CKk=)
---
Peter,

As we look forward to fights ahead of us in 2022, we need to build a strong, grassroots strategy that motivates people all across our Commonwealth.

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate**. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHFB7-tOMjdFuQXa1dB0ufX5UIgISZ1FmcYdAZZeqL9_K72tWP9EETimNu63QkFfssupMol-xCHxNQIGlGLKr1BmFraruKpUR_YafpLrfsV0WnM6xwysJ_V8CpyChaExGxe58yqGcLesyMULFceQm5XeUUxpvYtnlW9z1MI4APLvwVwekzmXWqXWp0H8-LLdRO_PHnhn1NdyOifcy86EwBW3V78vaNiMbZ66m-LefQE1oSWvkVaNjTih773coWkeKl4amMYbSzJHZb4LmbkKKepA6nY_wVpxJHMfWEW39wVNe/3h5/oZW-ASwDSgGQiqA61TLE4Q/h2/8gXSMZ14NkC-vFNEprKLgcWlZa5UlUwlUYMbmbdAPJo)

He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done.

clean_body: | | | | Hello everyone, My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades. Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!) As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events. No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him. Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today. Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done. But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs. Thank you for everything you can do, Jordan Franken | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. Franken for Iowa PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | | Sent via . Friends,

I am pleased to announce my endorsement of my friend and future Congressman, Assemblyman Colin Schmitt. Colin has proven himself to be a man of integrity, honor, service to the community, and will be an excellent addition to the Halls of Congress.

Colin will be a full-time fighter for his constituents, not a spokesman for the failed Biden-Pelosi agenda. Hudson Valley families deserve better from their federal representatives. They deserve a leader like Colin Schmitt.

Colin Schmitt will be their voice and fight for them in Washington. **[I look forward to working with Assemblyman Schmitt to ensure his victory in 2022 and am confident that the residents of the 18th Congressional district will join me in supporting him.](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=8d4bb63d5b6444b0a1a1c464e0df351b&_e=h4QfmpYN-wUk0ADDwduupifbafmBpqV4kkXOuRuc8VDuwI7J1VMQCIdXOKtVyNNyu-u5kKIbEc2g8_WvcEiRmxwLdZSdBUBNA5LetvRdosFMTAlvcMO_mjOPe7HcHQWXIKKaVw_bHNwDgEo8ds5C6Sagz01xf17Sqr7qQckQyBBcwaDv1zTHR2_tUAgPPElhEy83oimriAWbb84a-_FkL7TbabJxKFOFNurJxZYzydOGX_Qt3o25t7oedYjugSxUHHMDvKyA1vmDLms9bAqHILnMZYAkbFLBwSmtATDLGKbdPcSuRZOVZsJ3_ICmiYE1XvwUveuzoSa7xGUaAkXXtqlfVxS6nlxnq53PMj3KtFJTD1Yg1cXaDypOESkUs4bcuKNaTVu6kFyoW4ozbjZ4nS7CxLDEBBVLJlBo_DjlzaSTzgBmXAbGxdt03SUq9-LknqP-xENn87C26hRf62lNZ3N56ev241tPiSfpu0fich5I2HFawU7eQRxUSWU8NbPG) **

PRIVATE POLL LINK: Because this internal poll is meant to reflect the values of our constituents, we ask you NOT to forward or share your private link with anyone. Your continued support and advice mean everything to Erika and our campaign. Thank you, Constituent Outreach Team Erika Benfield for Congress (FL-07) | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Time sensitive, act fast, Fellow Patriot!
body:
This is all hands on-deck.

|
---
| | | Fellow Patriot, I really need your help.

My fundraising deadline was yesterday, and I missed the goal by only $5,000... I was crushed when I heard the news.

**But I 've extended it for 30 minutes because I believe in our team and your dedication to our fight to take back the Senate!**
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
I know you won't let me down, friend. You've always gone the extra mile to help, and I know you're one of the most key members of President Trump's team too.

So I'm asking for your help one last time before this deadline permanently ends in 30 minutes. _**[Can you be the grassroots supporter who sends us to success?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "Can you be the
grassroots supporter who sends us to success?")**_
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "CHIP IN $25")
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| | [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| | [CHIP IN $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "CHIP IN $250")
---
I can't stress enough how much I need your help. I can't let my team down - and we can't let the radical Left win.

They've already destroyed our border and skyrocketed our inflation rates. It's terrifying to think of what they will do if we let them surge ahead of us. You have to help before it's too late.
---
| | [RUSH HELP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820706:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "RUSH HELP!")
---
_I 'm counting on you._

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

* * *
---
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820707:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| | _A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Friend, as the liberal Left seeks to eradicate President Trump's legacy from our country, I will always work to protect our America First Agenda. I couldn't do it without your help.

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820707:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "please, click
here to support my efforts if you can. ")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter and Trump Patriot,

Marsha Blackburn
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58820707:JzW4nq2yN:m:1:3299561967:18E2C919E26CBC45FAEBC1BDA5B2A1E2:r "SUPPORT MY FIGHT")
---

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 11/19/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=1)
---
Friend, Illinois can learn a valuable lesson from Virginia. Recently, in a so-called “blue” state, Virginians voted for a clean sweep of statewide Republican candidates, also flipping the Virginia House of Delegates from Democratic to Republican control. This year’s election marked the first time since 2009 that any Republican had won a statewide race in Virginia. Even Illinois has elected a Republican to statewide office more recently than that. So, why would a blue state vote red? **It’s simple: Republican s listened to voters, focusing on what matters most to them — their wallets, their freedom, and, most importantly, their children.** Many voters simply want to know what leaders will do to help give their kids the best possible future. That’s also a top-of-mind concern in Illinois, as government officials here have callously exerted ever-expanding state control over children. These misguided bureaucrats and politicians have increasingly infringed on parents’ rights, preventing mothers and fathers from raising kids as they see fit. **We've seen how JB Pritzker has failed our children in Illinois over the last 2 years.** A pro-family reset is long overdue. Just as Glenn Youngkin successfully stressed in his campaign, nothing is more important than for parents — not the government — to have the power to decide what’s best for kids when it comes to education, health, and more. Let’s restore the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government to one that gives back to parents the respect that they never should have lost in the first place. [Read my full op-ed on this topic and more on my proposed Parents' Bill of Rights here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=ADYil8iLoSH_gYUwtbBJ661V67BRSB1AExlxvFfyrwbc3OrMHjWgRfOhY0oR2Aydo-Dk9bj3aTnEHRok0B0o0wR30whMK_ZelfiNBPGIbmVYO-mrlDIOn8ywDe-zm_b3_JiL0sRJ5DRHCBvVIcS-gw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=2) S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to highlight is Jessica McClelland. Jessica has been a friend and volunteer since 2015. When not assisting political candidates, she volunteers with groups combating mental illness. Currently, Jessica helps with data entry and sign assembly in our Waterloo campaign office. Thank you, Jessica, for your support--but more importantly your friendship! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqArUMyOl8qlG0pEDJGrcRFoc-dj2DRxy_IxsjQt-BLnNE&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=3)[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=4)
* * *
**In the News** **My Statement on the Signing of SB 536 and the Lack of Election Integrity Safeguards:** _"Out of all of the items included in SB 536, improving and increasing election integrity safeguards was not one of them.

If the Democrats are going to make voting vastly more accessible, they need to increase voting safeguards. Yet, they are so focused on their one-party control that they don't even consider what the voters want—and Illinoisans want to know their vote will be counted fairly and securely. But Democrats couldn't even reach across the aisle to make election integrity a pillar of our voting process. Good government and governance starts at the top and under JB Pritzker's leadership deficit, Illinois voters will experience another election with a lack of safeguards that promote integrity in the system._

_I would have VETOED SB 536 because of the lack of election integrity safeguards. Integrity and trust must be restored in our elections."_
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAd_FnRP9GLj4JO71poEz8QuovPeYKk93FRiKtgsPyUNA&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=5) The relationship between parents and our state government needs to be rebalanced. Parents, not the government, should have the power to decide what’s best for their children. Many voters simply want to know what leaders will do to help give their kids the best possible future! [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAd_FnRP9GLj4JO71poEz8QuovPeYKk93FRiKtgsPyUNA&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=6)
* * *
**Army-Navy Game Watch Party** **Join me and fellow veterans on December 11th at Bandito Barney's in East Dundee for a Watch Party for the Army vs. Navy game!** [RSVP to attend our watch party here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=7) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=8)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=9)** so we can share our [Facebook post](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAd_FnRP9GLj4JO71poEz8QuovPeYKk93FRiKtgsPyUNA&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=10) highlighting the service of our Illinois veterans. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___

You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=12) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_19&n=13).

clean_body: | Friend, Illinois can learn a valuable lesson from Virginia. Recently, in a so-called “blue” state, Virginians voted for a clean sweep of statewide Republican candidates, also flipping the Virginia House of Delegates from Democratic to Republican control. This year’s election marked the first time since 2009 that any Republican had won a statewide race in Virginia. Even Illinois has elected a Republican to statewide office more recently than that. So, why would a blue state vote red? It’s simple: Republican s listened to voters, focusing on what matters most to them — their wallets, their freedom, and, most importantly, their children. Many voters simply want to know what leaders will do to help give their kids the best possible future. That’s also a top-of-mind concern in Illinois, as government officials here have callously exerted ever-expanding state control over children. These misguided bureaucrats and politicians have increasingly infringed on parents’ rights, preventing mothers and fathers from raising kids as they see fit. We've seen how JB Pritzker has failed our children in Illinois over the last 2 years. A pro-family reset is long overdue. Just as Glenn Youngkin successfully stressed in his campaign, nothing is more important than for parents — not the government — to have the power to decide what’s best for kids when it comes to education, health, and more. Let’s restore the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government to one that gives back to parents the respect that they never should have lost in the first place. S/F, Paul Schimpf Volunteer of the Week This week's volunteer to highlight is Jessica McClelland. Jessica has been a friend and volunteer since 2015. When not assisting political candidates, she volunteers with groups combating mental illness. Currently, Jessica helps with data entry and sign assembly in our Waterloo campaign office. Thank you, Jessica, for your support--but more importantly your friendship! In the News My Statement on the Signing of SB 536 and the Lack of Election Integrity Safeguards: "Out of all of the items included in SB 536, improving and increasing election integrity safeguards was not one of them. If the Democrats are going to make voting vastly more accessible, they need to increase voting safeguards. Yet, they are so focused on their one-party control that they don't even consider what the voters want—and Illinoisans want to know their vote will be counted fairly and securely. But Democrats couldn't even reach across the aisle to make election integrity a pillar of our voting process. Good government and governance starts at the top and under JB Pritzker's leadership deficit, Illinois voters will experience another election with a lack of safeguards that promote integrity in the system. I would have VETOED SB 536 because of the lack of election integrity safeguards. Integrity and trust must be restored in our elections." Social Media Spotlight The relationship between parents and our state government needs to be rebalanced. Parents, not the government, should have the power to decide what’s best for their children. Many voters simply want to know what leaders will do to help give their kids the best possible future! Army-Navy Game Watch Party Join me and fellow veterans on December 11th at Bandito Barney's in East Dundee for a Watch Party for the Army vs. Navy game! Get Involved Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? ** so we can share our highlighting the service of our Illinois veterans. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! _ Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.

Dear Friend,
Marylanders know you can't have good government without checks and balances.

You know that one party rule will crush our economic recovery... just like it did before.

**Because if you have one party controlling both the legislature and the governor's office,**_**there is no dialogue and no check on power.**_

**And they will raise your taxes, simply because they can.**

Parents, taxpayers, and small business owners want a governor who will provide balance and responsible government to improve the lives of all Marylanders - not a governor who thinks raising taxes is the solution to our problems.
I will be that governor. Together, we'll cut taxes, grow our economy, and empower parents by expanding educational choice. But I can't do it without your help. [**Will you please consider a contribution of $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 to help us make history next year?**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7Exu7Qkr5oJ-2BrH8PIjSt22tmnke98tIPBlaoel8n9GNgVL84XS_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6eVEnxWdD-2BZUzarJI4Di5jv0QP6HpE9tGSxkREW7Y-2Fti6SQ3cVMSxhP3l8oML-2Fw6UD68pGVM4rPJlQuuKV84hAo8yAEdCsUurkMTuOoMDrKSSR1tvv62EqSMv2EE3GJt0WtPBfTyAZTn52ZZv3g6BpuvztYgb5LmlnK2r1EcSPC08z87IDlxRwxw1-2FSbbxOR94K-2BhsbYsj2dZh-2FZjepzaZ4SRn0OLj1NuLzyE4K3IAi8bpcCtNTxv7qSdqHj4OTRxYGFvpEI-2F0rjyCgNfyvjE3OzDVcTJkEjFBhGoJD0PEkKBEcJX-2B13RD2pldLYLsU-2F12hD9OQGcDThuhQ4Or6G4AyrePGSmlsIih2Xdo3w5U98K0qdTZdLCE2Wuu8sK-2BlXexdQZV6cWunJYz9AN9R68emOUsxoXX6x6Cy0SXK6yswlNzrNoewivrz-2BhzErObz7zKAt0ieqor9KT318SR0NNjPpBK-2FnmWmW1BfYdsrRz93Ls4VMxMdi6gGo6NdLMc6NIGcBqV550WTjBoKtWjtgCn5VPYS4iLaGcBwyU-2BxJra2Mu-2FkQLOQldL0w14jskfopTydOE9ZLm0j7CUJDrDj8hCsospj7jDcoDXcpFIvEGDCEq6RXBD76WxsP0lmnzB7bTb44B0HC0emxihavBfuyiGXMqJhYyoaOz-2B4otqJDMtunNMRHSfOtfMtkwUWoeMJeibSopHXNDowQJm1IIDBAteO35yYKGthOHb3wB5rMvb97FcXA3Nfz1-2Ft3hkDkX3jFRyB0G1FarytXjOWM-2BMJlKgcBRfE638N-2BMO25CljDgh56mEkuCCMTZys9KFWfxSac8rAYO3RuZ98LxX4O18sm7WQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Marylanders know you can't have good government without checks and balances. You know that one party rule will crush our economic recovery... just like it did before. Because if you have one party controlling both the legislature and the governor's office,there is no dialogue and no check on power. And they will raise your taxes, simply because they can. Parents, taxpayers, and small business owners want a governor who will provide balance and responsible government to improve the lives of all Marylanders - not a governor who thinks raising taxes is the solution to our problems. I will be that governor. Together, we'll cut taxes, grow our economy, and empower parents by expanding educational choice. But I can't do it without your help. One party rule is bad for your family, and it's bad for Maryland. Join my team today to provide balance and create prosperity for all Marylanders. Thank you, Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
Joe Biden takes the throne as the worst President in US History!

|
* * *
---
Fellow Patriots,

Democrat leaders are attempting to fund the Green New Deal by disguising it as an infrastructure bill and calling it the "Build Back Better Plan." The truth? It will not build back anything and only 9% of the funding is allocated to real infrastructure!
**_Check out what North Carolina US Senate candidate Ted Budd had to say!_** [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f746d668428948a9a08b4106c27eb515&_e=2jSYcoDUCYoGDo1Wcd_5-CwAe6nb4oYLSvkVM5KJy294SFHpfB653-tseitjnrCjehkKp5s0pJRX6-2pHKB6k22pEiXEXtjbippLn-ImgPtiZ8AcrKdWlDS-GcLg-nfwzycOPe9Wyux6Aezudayv7eGHGaTXP3G3rlRPJi2BKeR6dfr7DWNzX1LrcquZrmLmdF54fwyxUOkdvY8ZcK10tdAShiz7izUmGd2iqRMn8aRPGGtfsvwZMd_dRqBZNyVSntn87j03ubKmCSckIFNzKqGcqrajRLZhZfc4714KostmCgMKaYiZwnWYSWdH1Fu0Bmxwx9eVEcB-qQEslBfTv0_ZPJ0BvR9R_JG3TcC_uRVREJjtu61rNJRUssPAGByAxmY1lhmCVRHRmrLNvaI-m99nWY73SNxb7xYCfPkpqJCYAhaQqReCHkcV7tzIHVc3sCrUbS-spmxU4MvjCsWM86Q1dQoIUwtBb-8DdjCxit4i5XXVGiKFM0s3rPgEQpTGhHgJ2hnhOliVGPzjA2DBFQ%3D%3D)
**_We must elect leaders like Ted Budd who are fiscally responsible and understand that the people he represents cannot afford Biden's inflation‐skyrocketing agenda when they are living off fixed incomes._** Inflation levels are at a 40 year high and show no signs of slowing down. The Build Back Better plan will only increase the issue!

Donald J. Trump November 19th, 2021
Looks like the Democrats are getting far more than they ever dreamed possible, largely because of Mitch McConnell’s idiotic move of giving in on the Debt Ceiling and giving them two months to get their act together. They are destroying our Country! We have been put in a much worse negotiating position, but we have the “Trump Card,” and it’s called the Debt Ceiling. If they don’t drop this horrendous, Communistic style Bill that will be ruinous to all we stand for as a Country, we should not approve a Debt Ceiling increase. The Old Broken Crow has to be willing to play this hand, not like last time when he folded up like a cheap umbrella. Play it and mean it, because the Debt Ceiling is far less destructive than the Bill that they will otherwise successfully pass, especially when added to the “Unfrastructure” Bill that was just so stupidly approved. Republicans should not have allowed the separation, McConnell should not have given a two month reprieve, but it is what it is. Win with the Debt Ceiling, or resign!

_🎶 🎶It's beginning to look a lot like Christmas...🎶🎶_ Maybe not in Florida, we don't get that fluffy stuff I see in all the Christmas movies...I think it's called snow?

Okay BACK TO BUSINESS. I am coming to you live from Mark's Laptop, I asked permission this time so don't worry about me getting in trouble!

I have the MOST exciting news, Peter. I am being completely FUR-real when I say this is gonna knock your socks off.

My Dad, Marco Rubio, is finally selling Merch, just in time fur the Howl-iday season. His team made these really cool ornaments. They are shatterproof too, which trust me, Arthur and I have tested it out for ourselves...safe to say, my dad was not pleased after chasing us around, we honestly thought it was a new toy!!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team: Tomorrow will be TEN MONTHS since Joe Biden officially became President of the United States — we can’t believe it!

[We’re amazed at all he’s done since inauguration, so we need YOU to sign this letter we’re sending him first thing tomorrow! ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=6&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=7&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=8&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
---
TO: PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN
ADDRESS: 1600 PENNSYLVANIA AVENUE
FROM: A PROUD DEMOCRAT
DATE: NOVEMBER 19, 2021

**_Dear President Biden,_**

Over the past four years, our nation has faced unprecedented hardships at the hands of Donald Trump.

But in 10 short months, I’ve watched you steady the ship and heal a deeply divided nation. I couldn’t be prouder to call you my president!

[I know your work is just beginning, Mr. President, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP to elect Congressional Democrats who will fight for your agenda » ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=9&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=10&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
---
_I know how important it is to keep our Majorities, Mr. President._

I still remember what happened when Republicans won the midterms in 2010 -- they stonewalled the entirety of President Obama’s agenda!

Even without the majority, MAGA freaks are trying to destroy your progress!

**We won’t take our majorities for granted -- which is why we need to start our fight right now.**

[So I’m rushing $2 to PROTECT and EXPAND the Majority and help you accomplish your historic agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=11&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=12&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
---
Thank you,

**_x. A Proud American_**
[SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION, GIVE NOW!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3833?t=13&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=937%2E878179%2EshfH2t)

name: Katie Britt for Alabama
subject: Official Team Britt Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **Katie Britt Endorsed by Alabama Retail Association** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B44FRzJy31m6LyuUk-aBtIr_D-SbNdwEJQeGJ0Z9ULJh318UCCtta_x1HuwtXiAVIvM1LJ-pcEg0KcvGqPyV9onqcV5403k8IFBdns9ieM_KqHOVChepFo3HHdDChuh6UkYwWeIHma-nSmPH-DypwVpnR9SNbnzcCxAV6GPDC16Qt1NkXdsHDttF9xYjKzmqppd_Q3aA4VhFM8rptY2poNjN3IjozNAvI7feLBqMygGaFU0xoE-7yxhspZzD7hbLRxbPwTPKwEBymuzJjHbKZIGU0PMs15y2l7_bFHVJIZge1) I am proud to announce that our campaign has been endorsed by the Alabama Retail Association’s political arm! Local retailers are the cornerstones of communities across Alabama, including my hometown of Enterprise. I grew up counting nuts and bolts in my dad’s hardware store, scrubbing bathrooms in my mom’s dance studio and keeping the showroom clean at Strickland’s Jewelers. I learned from an early age that good employers cut their check last and that the best thing government can do is to get out of the way. I will fight tirelessly in the Senate to grow good-paying jobs and increased opportunity for all hardworking Alabamians, ensuring small businesses and Alabama families can thrive, no matter their zip code. Read more here: [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B44FRzJy31m6LyuUk-aBtIr_D-SbNdwEJQeGJ0Z9ULJh318UCCtta_x1HuwtXiAVIvM1LJ-pcEg0KcvGqPyV9onp1iOpY3c0DUxjzs81UjM9bZTAs3zZtaKsVoaUfts1fY716QpKde6Pv6OZ57wDMQvLZw9u5h4IDb5tA0iPrC_iPAW7whUCKn4BCdmG8fPhnVqCsRvPYe5AxcH4m--utDfgEzAasR_Edua9bBVQClVdWprhgOlXCIe_myZu17R_mtbDILNE8o72TnX3FgB9QEIX0GboN75XBGsuTc2ufiSat) **Katie Britt Surges in Recent Polls** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B44FRzJy31m6LyuUk-aBtIr_D-SbNdwEJQeGJ0Z9ULJh3ZTRhj9GVS8GBo_zI8rRmOwejAQW8V1LaTGcdLJJnIBvYnSTUo5BHcuIGjwOHaO_5uRRckcAkRZooLZlAGfOBbqDA1ahniwTuFv94fojtgGXAj1zgQmMf41bWdrznqT9SIZRTzwKpO0fWbuOG1VLOPd4Vr2dOZmJ7SCOWz8e_Co48A3SCboo2nbNoA-SvWHIcThAFvzZ8CAFRGIweadHg1447UMLiCWcuyAia6OsGfkpOGNTq43tAK2M_J35EVkGO) **NEW POLL RESULTS JUST IN** We are working hard each day, traveling to every corner of our great state to visit with Alabamians and listen to them. It is clear that our grassroots campaign and Alabama First message is resonating. People know that I’ll fight tirelessly every day to protect our Christian conservative values and preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. We will continue to outwork the field through Election Day and beyond, so we can retake the Senate and the House in 2022 and the White House in 2024. Our country is worth fighting for, and now is the time to step up and win! [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B44FRzJy31m6LyuUk-aBtIr_D-SbNdwEJQeGJ0Z9ULJh3ZTRhj9GVS8GBo_zI8rRmOwejAQW8V1LaTGcdLJJnIBvheA_WzQ3pJDG7ODqWKpDJDgwQXPcbObDEu987IFldogOkguNzkRaz7_FzMiWAfdl63bi1V14kEKGr7_JKOph7xjArM92vhsY0prXYz1-Fmh0refL2cZ6_HiViaVHxkpVwmCPEbpHS3WAtXtTrolOA9ArQC7D-DkFOYVAyaJeGx_njFyr7X4Ot26V-7n800xMaPSq554p7OmAJAJHxaOei) ****Katie Britt on Biden's Spending Plan **** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B4-6gnlzZ_UfyZQNKFPp3WAr1uwiKK2foXcsIJpIa0rsFmO1tuNZ5yKIZElsh2wKxncUy0UtNAKmvtdsnexDkA-aNG7QJAtvp9jPOTCfnVqzic3py_3ywrfPObeREAHC-D3WeTu-cKmPwAQoWxD1ELebiUmgWHt2-clM4gfkFPmD8vpms-rNfOiTL380cKENccNlYHT3hqzusawxuLwOjiyIcwyGrYgZIRViEGVRBxXcJ0KFTDsWWsK87jyrqN9tO4AVXXvBE7UuzWXhdZ3cbM82BqvnT8rCKpkAbcF02k2yE) President Biden’s ‘Build Back Broke’ plan would raise taxes on 20-30% of the middle class while giving tax breaks to 66% of millionaires, costing our nation $285 billion. All while the hidden tax of soaring inflation hits hardworking Americans the most. [**LIKE AND SHARE TWEET**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B4-6gnlzZ_UfyZQNKFPp3WAr1uwiKK2foXcsIJpIa0rsFmO1tuNZ5yKIZElsh2wKxncUy0UtNAKmvtdsnexDkA-ZKsqam_3RkqhQYRNhqDmrdeCDycRyX8XT7eX1fdPycxnIzan5WbqgalRnlPlknbj3LDFRNgL2VhkuqcXD6eNUT9IKzjjAL6EdZtVvL9x70qKv8PGwaGWHdUEtKNuTmeFUG1rV4blRmMpCBWqsq-QZdUSPnCKtKI1XvuIL6W3fnhS2u2hrAwXAthGmqDW3-5YEfOoFOTBrEIJBbrVIAANTz) ****Katie Attends Alabama Association of Rescue Squads’ Banquet**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e189ceb4009940faa5063754dd979c79&_e=Kus9vzDaA7IOo7Jb60-B44FRzJy31m6LyuUk-aBtIr_D-SbNdwEJQeGJ0Z9ULJh3ZSm1kR-V3SbPFQ0DvYRVhy6O3q1uz_s3jx68aaBI3h2dmECKSL8ZXHGdralKwxpStHvefEHQEKuZkYf5w9ZibrSXPSaxvau7G705nwLDH2C3lWXUoNowdntzGeDGfG2zNu7O4ZBbAqczA6z16n1_xAf054cTzYp-h0Z0gLO5A-UOMKQ0p1Ygg9uqTirHjlWyzY4xihMBXHYATXvt2QUk3lI716zafbVsMHh3wmi-dP2fm2Mj63jZWWkL63xEYl1-) Great time visiting with everyone at the Alabama Association of Rescue Squads’ annual meeting and banquet in Baldwin County! clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Britt Endorsed by Alabama Retail Association I am proud to announce that our campaign has been endorsed by the Alabama Retail Association’s political arm! Local retailers are the cornerstones of communities across Alabama, including my hometown of Enterprise. I grew up counting nuts and bolts in my dad’s hardware store, scrubbing bathrooms in my mom’s dance studio and keeping the showroom clean at Strickland’s Jewelers. I learned from an early age that good employers cut their check last and that the best thing government can do is to get out of the way. I will fight tirelessly in the Senate to grow good-paying jobs and increased opportunity for all hardworking Alabamians, ensuring small businesses and Alabama families can thrive, no matter their zip code. Read more here: Katie Britt Surges in Recent Polls NEW POLL RESULTS JUST IN We are working hard each day, traveling to every corner of our great state to visit with Alabamians and listen to them. It is clear that our grassroots campaign and Alabama First message is resonating. People know that I’ll fight tirelessly every day to protect our Christian conservative values and preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. We will continue to outwork the field through Election Day and beyond, so we can retake the Senate and the House in 2022 and the White House in 2024. Our country is worth fighting for, and now is the time to step up and win! **Katie Britt on Biden's Spending Plan President Biden’s ‘Build Back Broke’ plan would raise taxes on 20-30% of the middle class while giving tax breaks to 66% of millionaires, costing our nation $285 billion. All while the hidden tax of soaring inflation hits hardworking Americans the most. Katie Attends Alabama Association of Rescue Squads’ Banquet - Great time visiting with everyone at the Alabama Association of Rescue Squads’ annual meeting and banquet in Baldwin County! These brave Alabamians leave the safety and comfort of their own homes and families to ensure complete strangers can return to theirs. We are grateful for their selfless service! Dinner was provided by Eat Alabama Wild Seafood. Can’t beat fresh Gulf Coast seafood! Always happy to support our local Alabama fishermen. Thank you to April Mason for sharing her support of our campaign! April knows firsthand that Katie is a tireless worker who is effective at getting things done and moving the needle. Hear from April here. Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

body:
Over the weekend, my friend and former employer James O'Keefe had his apartment raided by FBI agents over a missing diary.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw) While Sleepy Joe has been asleep at the wheel since taking office, he finally turned over the reins of the Presidency to Kamala Harris while he was napping harder than usual under anesthesia as he underwent a colonoscopy this morning.

**Hours after Kamala was sworn in as Acting President, Democrats in the House rammed through the most radical piece of legislation in our nation 's history, otherwise known as Biden's "Build Back Better" spending plan.**

This is why we MUST flip Congress Red next year and restore BOLD, unstoppable leadership in the GOP! Help me do that by [supporting my Congressional race today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw) | [**SEND LAURA LOOMER
TO CONGRESS**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw)
---

The "Social Spending Bill" is just as it sounds. It throws money at ridiculous causes and projects, while leaving all of us with a big, fat invoice of $1.75 trillion to pay for it!

The bill weaponizes the IRS by adding 87,000 new agents to comb through our bank statements.

If the bill passes in the Senate, it will blow up already rising inflation rates and increase our energy costs by 30% or more!

And the GOP Establishment only **pretended** to fight against Biden's bill because pollsters manipulated the popularity of the bill and made it look like it had widespread support among the public.

Outsiders like me are waiting in the wings to **storm the gates with a hostile takeover of the GOP** so we can retake the Republican Party and mold it in the image of **America First Fighters** . . . [but it will take your support to get me there!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw)

If you haven't already, [please support my campaign today with whatever amount you can afford](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/892Ej3763vj7635LIcKBuqqUtrNw/l7KjkHqD3r2y49ev2XrbDw).

Thanks so much, friend.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=54ad3cca291c4ce6a9733221a33fb58d&_e=4xq-nxhpaCBjf25v49quEqUce1eUcYcg3njiI4Ef4PRRqRAg_mzZ8M177qVSFc9uAXRWfiBU0mXORzVJIbBd1VOALDR457uDwriPdzqhK6J6g0bxJKnZGeP5W2u7oEyZ-Nnw60EYvfrrnUOW-Lh-PY4c4X2GEbUePvKk_YlO04uobsC9niE-rq085-2-UVd3ORzK0G9yhSzatuPLmKMOXZZTqAbGbUq77n6fklE_Xq7f59ktwiUFC9FclnrqiBtpRBOcekEtbaoL642FumfgZg7dfp8Go5U85L3TYlh8kjL6P3PSCaoSgtbU2b3X-FLk2JZQ6Uxeal0aq-15ZUYkTjb6HnpiRAowcIfsQY7r0m6k8GjjCLaRAUOipOzcLq93lm5S4kay9D3sTiO96ppvR1_lsEqFv7t72QvRC7eMuPvnkAZ6OHemtZLoHiVitbwscCLtM4zp5bbS0QVKslAIh5ataGJhk8JdbqqlxqFfOqg%3D)

Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=54ad3cca291c4ce6a9733221a33fb58d&_e=4xq-nxhpaCBjf25v49quEqUce1eUcYcg3njiI4Ef4PRRqRAg_mzZ8M177qVSFc9uAXRWfiBU0mXORzVJIbBd1VOALDR457uDwriPdzqhK6J6g0bxJKnZGeP5W2u7oEyZ-Nnw60EYvfrrnUOW-Lh-PY4c4X2GEbUePvKk_YlO04uobsC9niE-rq085-2-UVd3ORzK0G9yhSzatuPLmKMOXZZTqAbGbUq77n6fklE_Xq7f59ktwiUFC9FclnrqiBtp8H4MMpNdSUPp7Ou_-wXEWlLdk9rNm4rOXao5sdmy0H679W9FHNjPT1IQNYsX-23DHl1Xl9MFxMrp0mCJmxLURrCBZU43jm6mIBwyb1cMQmi2yCqn0jkAW5V0TAsGmEXajJ3G2Nm6IqqnxueLaMZGhNHg3SFdx-3zoD8A3OUv69qkw31VY1C2DIdF1eE7vZW6JHF3flA5ceohccBIXUpzOgTXMB7TukMtCYnySsh79FI%3D)

Peter,
---
We cannot allow radical Democrats to continue emboldening Far Left violence and Woke Mobs to run rampant throughout our streets.

Kyle Rittenhouse was put on trial for defending his own life, and with the liberal media painting him as a villain, we’re already seeing people lashing out.

Cities, towns, and communities should never feel so scared by violent mobs that people have to put up signs on their homes stating, _**“KIDS LIVE HERE!!!”**_

It is appalling that the situation involving Kyle Rittenhouse was even able to take place, and it’s all thanks to radical socialist Democrats allowing woke mobs to **riot, burn, and attack people across our nation.**

clean_body: | | | | Law and Order is needed now more than ever Peter, We cannot allow radical Democrats to continue emboldening Far Left violence and Woke Mobs to run rampant throughout our streets. Kyle Rittenhouse was put on trial for defending his own life, and with the liberal media painting him as a villain, we’re already seeing people lashing out. Cities, towns, and communities should never feel so scared by violent mobs that people have to put up signs on their homes stating, “KIDS LIVE HERE!!!” It is appalling that the situation involving Kyle Rittenhouse was even able to take place, and it’s all thanks to radical socialist Democrats allowing woke mobs to riot, burn, and attack people across our nation. We must never allow this type of violence to hold our communities hostage again. I am more fired up than ever to take on the woke mobs of the Left in Washington D.C., and trust me when I say they will not get any sympathy from me. I’ve already received endorsements from great members of our law enforcement including: Walton County Sheriff Joe Chapman Morgan County Sheriff Robert Markley Retired Snellville Police Chief Roy Whitehead Loganville Police Chief Mike McHugh Make a donation to my campaign today if you agree that America needs LAW AND ORDER: | It's time we let our law enforcement do their job and end violence that is being encouraged by the radical Left agenda. For Georgia, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | Connect with us on and | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse - A win for ALL Americans.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| While mainstream media presented this case as being about vigilante racism, that was never the case. In addition to 18-year-old Kyle Rittenhouse, the right to self-defense and the Second Amendment were also on trial. The prosecution became so desperate in their closing arguments they even portrayed this as a "mass shooter" incident. Nothing could be further from the truth.
In the face of accusations and intimidation from mainstream media and even the President of the United States, the jury did their job and justice prevailed. We should all celebrate that courageous verdict. But this is a cautionary tale for all of us about the importance of standing firmly for the Second Amendment and the right to self-defense. Those are just two more reasons I'm running for Congress, and I need your support.
For Liberty!
---

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Another busy week in the books for Jane Timken as she continued crisscrossing the state to share her vision for the U.S. Senate. Our Parents First Tour continued with stops in Columbus and Cleveland and Jane had another strong performance at the Ohio GOP Senate Forum in Strongsville. Jane continued to prove that she is the America First Workhorse in this race! I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Put America First by Putting Parents First** This week Jane penned an op-ed for the [Canton Repository](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e76ffab016cf462aaf0820019db26451&_e=JgfepqYZTCD6wuuuzG6xbjPRiPIXY5VMCKvo2Jb9kzMj-GLH80ndiWBcLeWLOFpzxBhZFoGHuaOFgbMKtvDxJ6s3G-qe9ImpJjZNLS-yosMZ5I-G_t-ZSlgz7-oII07w0OwwilKWEqf1XzBZPQ7nuY_MmR68CyshpxzUMBQ94zW3m-87CDKaqCF3zLeaWda0e2GpY2gRn8n2vQgGknPmw5NvHyuwgsb3E0dxEpeuJY8JRhEmef_SIKy95VPJ6VE6TSbHL3qE-8IYUpSz4WEDv22VPVS9mLB6alkb_vlZ9tdRUR4BhNT2uCdOf-C71rbZ7NoZVAqFMrJcu_zWEZAmqXmSH_70AP2LdsTgQ927CZRtia2ZRtcLrNPwNHANs91Mtv1dFdRJqbNuVuxhW990Zg%3D%3D) about the school board mom and dad movement we’ve seen in Ohio and across the country. “Looking back on 2020, the one silver lining of the COVID-19 pandemic is that living rooms became classrooms and parents could finally see what their children were being taught. Parents saw that missed time in the classroom, and increased time in front of the blue screen, led to failing test scores, wandering attention, and lost learning that will be impossible to quantify. They saw that instead of teaching the fundamentals of math, reading and science, schools focused more on buzzwords like “diversity, equity and inclusion.” They saw that instead of long division, schools preached division, labeling classmates either an “oppressor” or the “oppressed” based on the color of their skin. And parents continue to see that as politicians violate their own mask mandates, children are expected to sit masked for eight hours a day, unable to smile at their peers or connect with their teachers.” Read the full piece [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e76ffab016cf462aaf0820019db26451&_e=JgfepqYZTCD6wuuuzG6xbjPRiPIXY5VMCKvo2Jb9kzMj-GLH80ndiWBcLeWLOFpzxBhZFoGHuaOFgbMKtvDxJ6s3G-qe9ImpJjZNLS-yosMZ5I-G_t-ZSlgz7-oII07w0OwwilKWEqf1XzBZPQ7nuY_MmR68CyshpxzUMBQ94zW3m-87CDKaqCF3zLeaWda0ZXV15MSeQme_7Nc5duq52gyzpPQbLunhkMLFYPZtYZ2gSAs60EVbCBmPHuiYL9HyfSi9aPcEc0eeBucYRpiLlGl6PkoNsO7zhbK1tp4LinD6c2-7rh8_dcCNCb9qA8nilzXOxUoDgb8cJuQmPFd2B-IdwqOXzQ-YBTsQb8rQp5zcDvVcMN3fD_L7WtQZevQL_vLwL6tAIHEzY3wIqEZUsQ%3D%3D). **From the Trail** On Monday, Jane joined Bruce Hooley at 98.9 The Answer in Columbus for a great interview on education and how we can put kids and parents FIRST. You can check out the full interview [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e76ffab016cf462aaf0820019db26451&_e=JgfepqYZTCD6wuuuzG6xbvHlS8Auqh8UhqqQ1wgbs4B-SJUKytOCHNNuDMR5zphkkg61noYNMsuw_rXviW7ItLp7QIzIm4Ui9Flg1qd0Ib9k2JeAcABLXdKCv2gy_Ovq-VAoh5XalV-wc1gRa0_HutS6Ga3hbQr5cR6tn8RuM4vcuBrm4BI7oJf3obv6rJyQkPw7qStHbysnVdOqXMCmnxodeEc4ZYCFw4-1S7_e83OBlhhA-tbGUHNV5hcNQVFG88BWk58zq4BA4ZKZhrfj83oOhv3vjSytLcEcTSYtLCSu2R2GKvG-cOdCAxmfVpjI4JvSUlQ6v9Y6yHcPOMss0NgzZp356cIdq6qg-tX9nLM%3D). Later on Monday, Jane joined the Upper Arlington High School Conservative Club. It is exciting to see young conservatives organizing a new group and getting involved! On Thursday, the Parents First Tour stopped in Westlake. With School Board Members and parents from the area, we had a great conversation about parents’ rights, transparency, and school choice. Earlier today, Jane was thrilled to join the Greater Columbus Republican Women's Club for their monthly meeting. Jane is constantly encouraged by the enthusiastic response she receives throughout the state and Friday afternoon was no different. **Ohio GOP Senate Forum** Thursday night Jane participated in her seventh U.S. Senate Candidate Forum of the primary at the Ohio Press Network's Ohio GOP Senate Forum. Jane continued to prove why she is the America First Workhorse in this race. There is no person in this race who has done more to further Republican causes in the last five years than Jane Timken, and that's exactly the message she's taking across the state, but don't just take my word for it: "Tonight, Jane Timken proved why she continues to rise head and shoulders above the field. Jane doesn't just talk to be the loudest in the room - instead, she listens to Ohioans and then fiercely delivers for them. Grassroots Ohioans all across Ohio know Jane as a fighter, problem solver, and leader who will make an excellent next Senator from Ohio." **\- Lake County Commissioner John Plecnik** Here's one highlight from Jane from the night: [ | | |

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, Another busy week in the books for Jane Timken as she continued crisscrossing the state to share her vision for the U.S. Senate. Our Parents First Tour continued with stops in Columbus and Cleveland and Jane had another strong performance at the Ohio GOP Senate Forum in Strongsville. Jane continued to prove that she is the America First Workhorse in this race! I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Put America First by Putting Parents First This week Jane penned an op-ed for the about the school board mom and dad movement we’ve seen in Ohio and across the country. “Looking back on 2020, the one silver lining of the COVID-19 pandemic is that living rooms became classrooms and parents could finally see what their children were being taught. Parents saw that missed time in the classroom, and increased time in front of the blue screen, led to failing test scores, wandering attention, and lost learning that will be impossible to quantify. They saw that instead of teaching the fundamentals of math, reading and science, schools focused more on buzzwords like “diversity, equity and inclusion.” They saw that instead of long division, schools preached division, labeling classmates either an “oppressor” or the “oppressed” based on the color of their skin. And parents continue to see that as politicians violate their own mask mandates, children are expected to sit masked for eight hours a day, unable to smile at their peers or connect with their teachers.” Read the full piece . From the Trail On Monday, Jane joined Bruce Hooley at 98.9 The Answer in Columbus for a great interview on education and how we can put kids and parents FIRST. You can check out the full interview . Later on Monday, Jane joined the Upper Arlington High School Conservative Club. It is exciting to see young conservatives organizing a new group and getting involved! On Thursday, the Parents First Tour stopped in Westlake. With School Board Members and parents from the area, we had a great conversation about parents’ rights, transparency, and school choice. Earlier today, Jane was thrilled to join the Greater Columbus Republican Women's Club for their monthly meeting. Jane is constantly encouraged by the enthusiastic response she receives throughout the state and Friday afternoon was no different. Ohio GOP Senate Forum Thursday night Jane participated in her seventh U.S. Senate Candidate Forum of the primary at the Ohio Press Network's Ohio GOP Senate Forum. Jane continued to prove why she is the America First Workhorse in this race. There is no person in this race who has done more to further Republican causes in the last five years than Jane Timken, and that's exactly the message she's taking across the state, but don't just take my word for it: "Tonight, Jane Timken proved why she continues to rise head and shoulders above the field. Jane doesn't just talk to be the loudest in the room - instead, she listens to Ohioans and then fiercely delivers for them. Grassroots Ohioans all across Ohio know Jane as a fighter, problem solver, and leader who will make an excellent next Senator from Ohio." \- Lake County Commissioner John Plecnik Here's one highlight from Jane from the night: You can watch the full forum . I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

Under Democrat Abigail Spanberger our borders are open, the FBI is targeting parents for speaking up at school board meetings, we botched the withdrawal from Afghanistan and gas prices are crippling working class families. Sadly, all of this could have been prevented. However, Democrat politicians like Abigail Spanberger are leading our country in the wrong direction. She claims she will go against her party's radical ways, but consistently falls in line on policies they support.

**Spanberger believes in open borders, raising taxes on hard working Virginia families, raising prices of everyday goods, allowing the IRS and FBI to target Americans, and implementing Socialist spending plans that will endanger VA small businesses!**

I will always fight for you and refuse to let politics get in the way of ensuring that America remains the beacon of light for the world. _I believe that good policy comes before politics, and that means being open to accepting ideas from anybody._ I will go to work on day one to bring better services for Virginia families and ensure the FBI focuses on criminal terrorists coming across the border and not parents. I will return to the priority of supporting our veterans, law enforcement and first responders, tackling the drug epidemic and making sure your tax dollars are spent efficiently!

At the end of the day, I believe in common sense solutions, and that is something that is currently missing in politics! And the problem doesn’t just start in Virginia...the entire country is struggling right now because of the failed leadership from Democrat Leaders. _As a former Navy SEAL, I know what it takes to be an effective leader and promise to bring that leadership to DC on Day ONE._ [**SUPPORT MCGUIRE FOR VA 7**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=5ae8da0b68164f35af9cf4fafda7a919&_e=w6lciwJ3buZf6-ZQUlthHeL3L2sKMCp2vPIe1tuEetHrNsqZNDdElia0r2PkKA8BXPz_WK1vuK6AS2bpTp4rg_gZQYH31FWbB61SZH39_uE-invBhLKM1wKlNhNpIAMhfkjXdxoXUeNpkSFj2wffzC5Ag3DT1Zm9orci01tEsYsMQmPAWhzrLy_odNAyxwplrSb-wzNW-D35gMdPV1d_D8KutKt-MSovMOW6vE1NnzYhfrCDe_rMngMSFopnEHiGN-fovOJ87bdAvrPUetvrWK545getTjfue-0dASsUtkMu-jqmzuCRalc_rtkHNBGv-ucgNMsddtf4AM4-uW51nYwXlGqfIt7NfClKCUKQC6ZZonYia81pkz59iJj9hCuow_2Dyum6ANOT0BZSbn1yDiSQNXMNBcFUbUwrOI67GbqiTai9nofXJYmdvwlaF-HRdAPF-aPMlslPWXt9A6gHbR7Y1ckojQTnhIRMfQdSD0JKNZbgQlXgNBQB38TkEH7g)

_Image courtesy of the Washington Post_
Democrats like to pretend they care about hard-working Americans. That’s a load of bull hockey.

Turns out, the Democrats’ massive spending bill that just passed the House includes [$285 billion in tax breaks](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2e1cbe6a03044b99f55e44b0cba8a7e&_e=PBhbTUV9QXErOXk67QdAubNvI20bnXEeM8LICtVR6-haaU-WqVbnbGM2q2xNDFhfrexueIdGdIc-gkTs-JHfh8C59s6D_-1FYDgAGFwuwwEItcYmOHENQ6IyPTDnmvh3q8m84YJWi7EW7E8SS4bqpk4-9dkZYu6W4XuanfDcBxt3ZP3mnkx7ZmqenjwebvoypucTUGUBIJv1Mcf7rQDIpbJuFBJbGCFGLXr7FJRFYPscgOWWs8ShgA3CMbrLV-gX3sQr8Gq-17F1H1v_bc4HeMoBCgj62OIKpM2kLGqcrsVv8XFEt_yb8u759vuLRB1gO_fft0GvZew1LcUPixDif6suWM-QSf29Jzbu7S2swrgP5M_6e_bUwig36Q_w_VHw) that would primarily go to billionaires in blue states.

Here's the background: Under President Trump's 2017 tax legislation, Republicans got rid of [the special deductions for state taxes](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2e1cbe6a03044b99f55e44b0cba8a7e&_e=PBhbTUV9QXErOXk67QdAubNvI20bnXEeM8LICtVR6-haaU-WqVbnbGM2q2xNDFhfrexueIdGdIc-gkTs-JHfh8C59s6D_-1FYDgAGFwuwwEItcYmOHENQ6IyPTDnmvh3q8m84YJWi7EW7E8SS4bqpk4-9dkZYu6W4XuanfDcBxtwSmB8wBTBJ4yxc2q8HROgQBvYVR6AgKy8OZ5mrifTmXqfZedk5_Ap1sRq_PeandbMFqjbZTFnUU-pDVRL_HmM7phT6z1Glm1F_1W2OlZqhxRqYNTKVPjNBg50yX8Ev61ONGNqMZ5F2DWtgpvxDYD98La1CHRoeWOUos7D6wJcZlej1XrLfrgrPwgjs7VCg0qHMqglIuPbqj_5F4OXWCo4), also known as the state and local tax deduction (SALT). High-taxed states like New York, California, and New Jersey push local taxes through the roof and then make the rest of taxpayers subsidize their high rates with a federal deduction.

In reality, it's a giveaway to blue states who want to tax and spend like drunken sailors.

Democrats are desperate to bring the SALT deduction back, and they just snuck it in their latest spending bill. They'll use acronyms and fancy language to obscure what they're trying to do, but it's really very simple: They're trying to make hard-working taxpayers subsidize blue state billionaires.

Take Tennessee, where we don’t have a state income tax. Our federal tax dollars would go towards paying for the deductions for billionaires in New York City. No thank you.

**Silver Alert Continues To Save Lives 🙏**

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2e1cbe6a03044b99f55e44b0cba8a7e&_e=PBhbTUV9QXErOXk67QdAuU99acN0q_QrzII9tkG6n9r6qP375zuVm9A1IIubjufCobaDkkm-ueq2byY47I6qBLJcrF4dI-K4v-RPC7A4uLdRBynXHmCUTvCwHvRURJYpbpt5Xr7Tkn_yJT2KYykdBPGMPCghVO592f30N1RfXzGOztrmn2GqLiA63L001dEJxsXR_szoKvcv6sEJJ2bdBgyCSmLpAYiH5nak0K-Cq_vyZjZRTsXC2BdxUL5zpn8Gokg1ldkHkXiZ3H3IC2WJ_5EdIji-xEQnRluJvCaoV8vX3rWrrLPQvtjt9ayUufNa)

Earlier this year, my good friends State Representative Jeremy Faison (11th district) and State Senator Becky Duncan Massey (6th district) passed the [Silver Alert Law](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2e1cbe6a03044b99f55e44b0cba8a7e&_e=PBhbTUV9QXErOXk67QdAuU99acN0q_QrzII9tkG6n9r6qP375zuVm9A1IIubjufCobaDkkm-ueq2byY47I6qBLJcrF4dI-K4v-RPC7A4uLe-TH9oeJf_DrPfJKs8i-ejmYuAfifjyaiCYaOWlJ8PUzUa7snLIqFcszlleDobAHyYkzGy_2OEyYmJSFguc1TLCRATF_B5mqdOZKGJqUs8gD54eN-isNwc9RSLZhdKFDKssDjOcoHINVrU5eGqfP2Nmsx5-4nDfuVFpryoyaWKVmzbGNji8Id53yd4XKC2bRKM9tj-2Hykeuu8GYqSY0Ne). This bill created a system to issue alerts whenever an individual with Alzheimer’s or dementia goes missing.

Since the bill’s passage, [30 Tennesseans have been found](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2e1cbe6a03044b99f55e44b0cba8a7e&_e=PBhbTUV9QXErOXk67QdAuXwNyfaGkwZJSlxJa5KaKXNcoaZdUO6N8CMdlXXOgrylJakrgBSNKEmgG_JQF78VCm3AtRH_LmpXlWWcmza6go33aEpKSnFnx82x2B3lh5_9R7HHICtXJ4puFb0QXeUSHOgIfVPMhmX3-J1x4g7AQ9WKoUyjzkNt1pPjh9kTp_CRKcV3KOhsWqaROwxOCCV_rbBGO1WG9mIXwVRl8dhy1ltiCtB4BP05ZLAqN0soPrrWFazYRVyD2aWwUQFgYGOy-fvnP6LB245INITHYxst5br8j_YGs4Gs7eBZrXvSLB4z) and safely reunited with their families. This is definitely a proud friend moment for me, and I extend my kudos to Rep. Faison and Sen. Massey for their hard work and dedication.

| **Derek,****

****Today will forever be remembered as the day Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster banded with Joe Biden to provide financial relief to the Democrat’s wealthiest at the expense of hard working families here in the Granite State.****

While blue collar workers in New Hampshire try to juggle sky-high inflation, peak pricing at the grocery stores and at the gas pump, our Federal Delegation’s only concern is an obscene giveaway for the richest residents in Democrat-led states across the country.

This bill is not only incredibly irresponsible, it’s insulting to Americans across the country who are working hard to make ends meet. Too many Granite Staters aren't sure they’ll be able to put food on the table or afford fuel for their homes this winter. This bill puts already vulnerable Granite Staters in an even worse economic position, and Democrats couldn’t be bothered to care.

****Democrats here in New Hampshire, and down in Washington D.C., have repeatedly put their own self-interests ahead of their own constituents - and come next November, it won’t be forgotten. Congressman Chris Pappas and Congresswoman Ann Kuster will soon be left behind by voters as quickly as they abandoned Granite Staters over the last year.**

| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) and Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) released the following statements after the Education Committee passed HB255, as amended, on a bipartisan vote of 11-8.**
**Speaker Packard** "Today's vote relative to HB255 - coinciding with President Biden's visit - sent a message loud and clear: Granite Staters will not be ruled by an unconstitutional mandate. When it comes to standing up for what's right, NH has always led the way. We will continue to do that – together." "The Education Committee passed HB255, in the name of medical freedom. Employers are struggling to fill vacancies, gas and food prices are rising, and chaos reigns at the border – the President has shown his ineptitude to lead. He has instead chosen to rule by mandates. That is not the NH way – and today's small victory proved that."

**Majority Leader Osborne:** “Welcome to New Hampshire, President Biden! I hope that we made you feel welcome by giving HB255 a bipartisan green light out of the Education Committee. An overwhelming majority of those who attended today’s hearing made it clear they do not support your vaccine mandate. This is the first step in pushing back against your vastly overreaching federal government and ensuring that Granite Staters who choose to exercise their right to health freedom will not lose their job.” “I applaud the members of th Education Committee who took this amendment up today and did the right thing for New Hampshire. While it is my hope that the president pays attention to the message we sent him on the heels of his visit today, I will not hold my breath. I look forward to passing this bill at our first opportunity when it comes before the House in January.”
